36adcde2-4c40-5824-84b2-757a0609c6e7.name: Drain Life
36adcde2-4c40-5824-84b2-757a0609c6e7.description: The harbinger drains the life force of one creature impaled on its spikes. The target must succeed on a DC 20 Constitution saving throw or take 55 (10d10) necrotic damage. If a creature dies from this attack, its soul is absorbed into the harbinger and can be restored to life only by means of a wish spell. The harbinger then regains hp equal to the necrotic damage dealt.

5970a067-5ebd-53a2-a549-a4516a73e383.name: Impale
5970a067-5ebd-53a2-a549-a4516a73e383.description: The harbinger makes one slam attack against a creature it is grappling. If the attack hits, the target is impaled on the harbinger's spikes. While impaled, the creature is restrained and takes 21 (6d6) piercing damage at the start of each of the harbinger's turns. A creature, including the impaled target, can take its action to free the impaled target by succeeding on a DC 20 Strength check. A freed creature falls prone in a space within 10 feet of the harbinger. If the harbinger dies, a creature is no longer restrained and can escape from the harbinger's spikes by using 10 feet of movement.

8bb58e4a-0f54-50cb-9b60-2608c00e7879.description: The harefolk has advantage on Intelligence (Investigation) and Wisdom (Insight) checks to determine if a creature is a shapechanger. It automatically succeeds when the shapechanger is a werewolf. In addition, the harefolk has advantage on its first attack roll each turn against a creature with the Shapechanger trait or Change Shape action, regardless of whether the harefolk was previously aware of the shapechanger’s nature.

0e46d9c5-b2af-5175-86a2-17c17da15eef.name: Transfixing Rattle
0e46d9c5-b2af-5175-86a2-17c17da15eef.description: The hebi-doku rattles its tail at one creature it can see within 30 feet of it. The target must make a DC 14 Wisdom saving throw or be incapacitated and have its speed reduced to 0 until the end of its next turn.

attributes.description: The hebi-doku rattles its tail at one creature it can see within 30 feet of it. The target must make a DC 14 Wisdom saving throw or be incapacitated and have its speed reduced to 0 until the end of its next turn.

04beb00f-8d24-58ad-8132-258754894f39.name: Cat Sneak
04beb00f-8d24-58ad-8132-258754894f39.description: While in dim light or darkness, the heggarna has advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks made to hide. It can use this trait only while it is disguised as a cat.

attributes.description: While in dim light or darkness, the heggarna has advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks made to hide. It can use this trait only while it is disguised as a cat.

3d709ff4-543f-530a-83cd-f0a3bbe25f76.name: Dream Eating
3d709ff4-543f-530a-83cd-f0a3bbe25f76.description:
As a bonus action, the heggarna can attach its lamprey-like maw to a sleeping creature. The target’s Charisma score is reduced by 1d4 when the heggarna first attaches to it. The target’s Charisma score is then reduced by 1 for each hour the heggarna stays attached. The target dies if this reduces its Charisma to 0. Otherwise, the reduction lasts until the target finishes a long rest at least 24 hours after the heggarna reduced its Charisma.

While attached, the heggarna fills the target’s dreams with nightmares. The target must succeed on a DC 13 Wisdom saving throw or it doesn’t gain any benefit from its current rest. If the target succeeds on the saving throw by 5 or more, it immediately awakens.

The heggarna can detach itself by spending 5 feet of its movement. It does so after it reduces the target’s Charisma by 8 or if the target dies.

52bb5f42-6cd0-5120-8e8e-b287352e8209.name: Bite (Heggarna)
52bb5f42-6cd0-5120-8e8e-b287352e8209.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d4 + 3) piercing damage plus 3 (1d6) psychic damage.

f1323ad7-0cbf-5846-a474-1b0834249294.name: Dream Rift
f1323ad7-0cbf-5846-a474-1b0834249294.description: The heggarna unleashes a barrage of psychic energy in a 15-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 13 Wisdom saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 7 (2d6) psychic damage and is incapacitated until the end of its next turn as it is bombarded with nightmarish images. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't incapacitated.

On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't incapacitated.

b3d800b4-1a13-511e-b5fa-a1fe6ceb2ee0.name: Illusory Appearance
b3d800b4-1a13-511e-b5fa-a1fe6ceb2ee0.description:
The heggarna covers itself with a magical illusion that makes it look like a Tiny cat. The illusion ends if the heggarna takes a bonus action to end it or if the heggarna dies. The illusion ends immediately if the heggarna attacks or takes damage, but it doesn't end when the heggarna uses Dream Eating.

The changes wrought by this effect fail to hold up to physical inspection. For example, the heggarna could appear to have fur, but someone touching it would feel its slippery flesh. Otherwise, a creature must take an action to visually inspect the illusion and succeed on a DC 15 Intelligence (Investigation) check to discern the heggarna is disguised.

c8310b38-ad3d-5824-95c6-ac9f2958792a.description: The helashruu can innately cast gate, requiring no material components. Its innate spellcasting ability is Charisma.

7b62726c-a074-5a3e-8775-cba7f62c6c91.name: Dimensional Hop
7b62726c-a074-5a3e-8775-cba7f62c6c91.description: The helashruu can transport itself to a different plane of existence. This works like the plane shift spell, except the helashruu can affect only itself and can't use this action to banish an unwilling creature to another plane.

36ef8c1d-c6d7-580e-8668-a141d1759c80.name: Multiattack (Helashruu)
36ef8c1d-c6d7-580e-8668-a141d1759c80.description: The helashruu uses Trap Life if it can. It then makes four shard whip attacks.

b7b7aa4d-fc6d-5859-aeaa-0eec271fb6ca.name: Reflect Energy
b7b7aa4d-fc6d-5859-aeaa-0eec271fb6ca.description: The helashruu releases stored energy in a 60-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 18 Dexterity saving throw, taking 35 (10d6) damage of the most recent type dealt to the helashruu on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. If the helashruu hasn't taken damage within the past 1 minute, the damage type is force.

3ff99ef8-0317-5298-86e9-5e869039b2e3.name: Shard Whip
3ff99ef8-0317-5298-86e9-5e869039b2e3.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 15 ft., one target. Hit: 15 (3d6 + 5) slashing damage.

f10c757c-e0fa-58be-830a-abc8552ab167.name: Teleport (Helashruu)
f10c757c-e0fa-58be-830a-abc8552ab167.description: The helashruu magically teleports, along with any equipment it is wearing or carrying, up to 120 feet to an unoccupied space it can see.

attributes.description: The helashruu magically teleports, along with any equipment it is wearing or carrying, up to 120 feet to an unoccupied space it can see.

05e2754b-841c-564d-bebc-5d4bfc01c706.name: Trap Life
05e2754b-841c-564d-bebc-5d4bfc01c706.description:
One creature of the helashruu's choice that is within 30 feet of the helashruu and that can see it must succeed on a DC 18 Wisdom saving throw or be trapped inside the helashruu's mirror. While trapped, the target is blinded and restrained, it has total cover against attacks and other effects outside the helashruu, and it takes 21 (6d6) force damage at the start of each of the helashruu's turns. The helashruu can have only one creature trapped at a time. A fragmented caricature of the trapped creature appears on the helashruu's surface while a creature is trapped inside it.

If the helashruu takes 30 or more bludgeoning or thunder damage on a single turn, the helashruu must succeed on a DC 15 Constitution saving throw or release the creature, which falls prone in a space within 10 feet of the helashruu. If the helashruu dies, a trapped creature is immediately released into a space within 10 feet of the helashruu.

7b4e5f72-c79b-5b2f-87c2-97058c974e7e.name: Corrupting Aura
7b4e5f72-c79b-5b2f-87c2-97058c974e7e.description: The calm emotions spell instantly fails when cast within 60 feet of the herald. In addition, any creature that starts its turn within 30 feet of the herald must succeed on a DC 16 Wisdom saving throw or grow hostile. On its turn, a hostile creature must move to and make one attack against the nearest creature other than the herald. If no other creature is near enough to move to and attack, the hostile creature stalks off in a random direction, seeking a target for its hostility. At the start of each of the herald’s turn, it chooses whether this aura is active.

c3c0e05e-9757-5c33-b5b3-96819360bb52.name: Innate Spellcasting (Herald of Slaughter)

The herald’s innate spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 16). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:
At will: detect thoughts
3/day: charm person, fear, suggestion
1/day: modify memory, seeming

5985fce5-1f27-547f-afb7-d7a0635f7615.description: The herald can use its action to polymorph into a Small or Medium humanoid it has seen, or back into its true form. Its statistics, other than its size, are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn’t transformed. It reverts to its true form if it dies.

05fc0644-9943-56b1-932a-066ca0da11e3.description: The herald of slaughter makes three attacks: one with its gore and two with its cleaver. Alternatively, it can use Enkindle Hate twice. If it hits one target with Enkindle Hate twice using this action, the target must succeed on a DC 16 Charisma saving throw or use its reaction to immediately move up to half its speed and make one melee attack against a random target within range.

65551f01-a4a0-5f86-a112-3c6c58368b2a.name: Annihilating Form
65551f01-a4a0-5f86-a112-3c6c58368b2a.description: Any object that touches or hits the herald of the Void vaporizes. If the object is being worn or carried by a creature, the creature can make a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw to prevent the object from being vaporized. If the object is magical, the creature has advantage on the saving throw. The herald can choose to not vaporize an object.

Each target must succeed on a DC 17 Constitution saving throw or become intangible until the end of its next turn. While intangible, the creature is incapacitated, drops whatever it's holding, and is unable to interact with physical objects. The creature is still visible and able to speak.

f86364ae-ff3d-586b-8948-52ca18b4e2c0.name: Miser’s Fury
f86364ae-ff3d-586b-8948-52ca18b4e2c0.description: The hoard drake knows the scent of every coin, gem and item of value in its hoard. The drake has advantage on Wisdom (Perception and Survival) checks to find and track its hoard. In addition, it has advantage on attack rolls against a creature if the creature is in possession of any portion of its hoard.

bbcb3aed-ab31-5a6a-9d3b-2dc71e025a2b.name: Treasure Sense
bbcb3aed-ab31-5a6a-9d3b-2dc71e025a2b.description: A hoard drake can pinpoint, by scent, the location of precious metals and minerals, such as coins and gems, within 60 feet of it. In addition, it can differentiate between various types of metals and minerals and can determine if the metal or mineral is magical.

7e93a53d-fa80-5ff0-a906-9e8e8c7ee5f8.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 14 (3d6 + 4) slashing damage.

3fa6cff4-4131-51b9-b27f-87126fb8c139.name: Midas Breath
3fa6cff4-4131-51b9-b27f-87126fb8c139.description:
The hoard drake spits molten gold in a 30-foot cone. Each creature in the area must make a DC 16 Dexterity saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 36 (8d8) fire damage and the gold clings to it. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and the gold doesn't cling to it. A creature with gold clinging to it has its speed halved until it takes an action to scrape off the gold.

The gold produced by Midas Breath can be collected once it has cooled, providing roughly 50 gp worth of gold dust and scraps each time it spits molten gold.

fe60b2e7-d1ab-5f2a-aac9-14abc6404eb1.description: The hoarfrost drake can move across and climb icy surfaces without needing to make an ability check. Additionally, difficult terrain composed of ice or snow doesn’t cost it extra movement.

d27ec336-5d4c-5165-b585-bd8dbf466a34.name: Claw (Hoarfrost Drake)
d27ec336-5d4c-5165-b585-bd8dbf466a34.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) slashing damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) slashing damage.

2545bddb-953c-569a-b3a6-fc8edba85950.name: Cloud of Riming Ice
2545bddb-953c-569a-b3a6-fc8edba85950.description:
The hoarfrost drake creates a cloud of freezing fog that rimes everything in frost. Each creature within 20 feet of it must make a DC 14 Constitution saving throw. On a failure, the target takes 14 (4d6) cold damage and must succeed on a DC 12 Dexterity saving throw or drop whatever it's holding. On a success, the target takes half the damage and doesn't drop what it's holding.

The area becomes difficult terrain until the end of the hoarfrost drake's next turn. A creature that enters the area or ends its turn there must succeed on a DC 14 Dexterity saving throw or fall prone.

de51ac60-ea1f-5761-a4af-baba5b279b52.name: Retaliatory Slip
de51ac60-ea1f-5761-a4af-baba5b279b52.description: When a creature grapples the drake, the drake can immediately attempt to escape. If it succeeds, it can make a bite attack against the creature that grappled it.

If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 14 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone.

9c92b629-66a1-5a8e-9f28-6df816340dc6.name: Territorial Display
9c92b629-66a1-5a8e-9f28-6df816340dc6.description: The hodag rears and stomps on the ground then roars a territorial challenge. Each creature within 10 feet of the hodag must make a DC 14 Dexterity saving throw, taking 14 (4d6) thunder damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. A creature that fails the saving throw by 5 or more is also knocked prone.

8ccb1969-a568-5ec5-b094-9ecc7a2ca47a.name: Sound Alarm
8ccb1969-a568-5ec5-b094-9ecc7a2ca47a.description: When the holler spider detects a creature within 60 feet of it, the spider can emit a hoot or trumpet audible within 300 feet of it. The noise continues until the creature moves out of range, the spider's handler uses an action to soothe it, or the spider ends the alarm (no action required).

474312da-032f-57c7-afe8-eed451c28d97.name: Exacerbate Affliction
474312da-032f-57c7-afe8-eed451c28d97.description: The hongaek has advantage on attack rolls against a creature that is suffering from a disease or that has the poisoned condition.

ef04a86a-f27b-50c4-abb8-0d0f73d0254a.name: Gas Form
ef04a86a-f27b-50c4-abb8-0d0f73d0254a.description: The hongaek can enter a hostile creature’s space and stop there. It can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing, but it can’t move through water or other liquids.

1f1c36d8-c4b6-5ffc-aaf1-8e7483ca9410.name: Prolong Affliction
1f1c36d8-c4b6-5ffc-aaf1-8e7483ca9410.description: Each creature within 30 feet of the hongaek that is suffering a disease or that has the poisoned condition has disadvantage on saving throws against the disease or poison afflicting it. In addition, the hongaek can pinpoint the location of such creatures within 30 feet of it.

46125157-9c18-5a1a-8b2b-ccb82fe94cfd.name: Invisibility (Hongaek)
46125157-9c18-5a1a-8b2b-ccb82fe94cfd.description: The hongaek magically turns invisible until it attacks or casts a spell, or until its concentration ends (as if concentrating on a spell). Any equipment the hongaek wears or carries is invisible with it.

df305033-795f-5548-9bec-ec53618939e5.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 18 (4d8) poison damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 14 Constitution saving throw or be poisoned for 1 minute. The creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

e71fa44d-362d-5aae-b8fb-39fb5b9c0e7b.name: Harvest Life
e71fa44d-362d-5aae-b8fb-39fb5b9c0e7b.description: When the hooden horse reduces a creature to 0 hp, the hooden horse regains 10 (3d6) hp.

29911d40-64ed-55a0-9733-1ff3670ab218.name: Seek Wrongdoer
29911d40-64ed-55a0-9733-1ff3670ab218.description: The hooden horse automatically knows the general direction to the nearest surviving perpetrator of the crime that provoked its creation.

attributes.description: The hooden horse automatically knows the general direction to the nearest surviving perpetrator of the crime that provoked its creation.

ac0f8054-2782-574a-b8c2-390f95fd0b73.name: Blade of Retribution
ac0f8054-2782-574a-b8c2-390f95fd0b73.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (1d10 + 4) necrotic damage. The target must make a DC 13 Wisdom saving throw, taking 14 (4d6) psychic damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. If the target is a perpetrator of the crime that provoked the hooden horse's creation, it has disadvantage on this saving throw.

ab90a9d8-5f63-58c0-90a6-cb43b2ed55ce.name: Call to Judgment
ab90a9d8-5f63-58c0-90a6-cb43b2ed55ce.description:
The hooden horse points at a being it can see and demands that the creature submit to justice. The target must succeed on a DC 15 Charisma saving throw or be charmed for 1 minute. If the charmed target is more than 5 feet away from the hooden horse, the target must take the Dash action on its turn to move toward the hooden horse by the most direct route. It doesn't avoid opportunity attacks, but, before moving into damaging terrain, such as lava or a pit, the target can repeat the saving throw. The creature can also repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns or whenever it takes damage from the hooden horse. If a creature's saving throw is successful, the effect ends on it.

The hooden horse can have only one target charmed at a time. If it charms another, the effect on the previous target ends.

aede571d-fad3-5822-98fb-21f75e1241e5.name: Bite (Huecambra)
aede571d-fad3-5822-98fb-21f75e1241e5.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 13 (2d8 + 4) piercing damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 16 Constitution saving throw or become cursed. While cursed, the creature grows gem-like growths across its body. When the cursed creature takes damage that isn't poison or psychic, it and each creature within 5 feet of it must succeed on a DC 16 Constitution saving throw or take 7 (2d6) thunder damage. This damage doesn't trigger further explosions. The curse lasts until it is lifted by a remove curse spell or similar magic.

cb4993a3-9a1f-577b-8af1-d592ea99828e.name: Gem Explosion
cb4993a3-9a1f-577b-8af1-d592ea99828e.description: The huecambra causes some of the gem-like nodules on its body to detonate. Each creature within 20 feet of the huecambra must make a DC 16 Dexterity saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 24 (7d6) thunder damage and is stunned until the end of its next turn. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't stunned. A creature cursed by the huecambra's bite has disadvantage on this saving throw.

4f4a6a18-e2de-522a-8a4d-5dc0029f0e03.name: Innate Spellcasting (Huli Jing)
4f4a6a18-e2de-522a-8a4d-5dc0029f0e03.description:
The huli jing’s innate spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 17, +9 to hit with spell attacks). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components.
At will: charm person, invisibility (self only), major image
3/day each: cure wounds, disguise self, fear
2/day each: bestow curse, confusion
1/day each: divination, modify memory

b7452512-eacb-5637-a4d7-2a0b012b8037.name: Shapechanger (Huli Jing)
b7452512-eacb-5637-a4d7-2a0b012b8037.description: The huli jing can use its action to polymorph into a Medium female human of unearthly beauty, or back into its true, nine-tailed fox form. Its statistics, other than its size, are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying transforms with it. It reverts to its true form if it dies.

865176fa-cd4a-5cf1-ba14-707d056d6853.name: Bite (Huli Jing)
865176fa-cd4a-5cf1-ba14-707d056d6853.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 911 (2d6 + 4) piercing damage and 14 (4d6) psychic damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 911 (2d6 + 4) piercing damage and 14 (4d6) psychic damage.

89f745f7-d5a7-59c9-a20d-842ee1331d32.name: Curse of Luck
89f745f7-d5a7-59c9-a20d-842ee1331d32.description: Each creature of the huli jing's choice within 60 feet of it and aware of it must succeed on a DC 16 Wisdom saving throw or have disadvantage on attack rolls and saving throws for 1 minute. A creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. If a creature's saving throw is successful or the effect ends for it, the creature is immune to the huli jing's Curse of Luck for the next 24 hours. Alternatively, the huli jing can choose up to three willing creatures within 60 feet of it. Each target has advantage on attack rolls and saving throws for 1 minute.

966bbc7b-baa1-52fb-8d1f-4fdbd6bfb402.name: Draining Glance
966bbc7b-baa1-52fb-8d1f-4fdbd6bfb402.description: The huli jing draws sustenance from the psyches of living creatures in a 30-foot cone. Each creature in the area that isn't a construct or an undead must make a DC 16 Wisdom saving throw, taking 28 (8d6) psychic damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. The huli jing regains hp equal to the single highest amount of psychic damage dealt.

43fe161a-81e7-554a-8ae6-d526dc779d73.description: In fox form, the huli jing uses Curse of Luck then makes two bite attacks. In humanoid form, it uses Curse of Luck then makes three jade dagger attacks.

471fe793-9a9b-564e-b54f-87254dfc1bf3.name: Amphibious (Hverhuldra)
471fe793-9a9b-564e-b54f-87254dfc1bf3.description: The hverhuldra can breathe air and water.

5fad3957-8797-52ed-a20c-1dc2f9f8c6ad.name: Innate Spellcasting (Hverhuldra)
5fad3957-8797-52ed-a20c-1dc2f9f8c6ad.description:
The hverhuldra’s innate spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 14). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no components:
At will: create or destroy water, detect poison and disease, purify food and drink
1/day each: blindness/deafness, protection from poison

56cd0f94-003c-5b75-a581-92795afd6e0a.name: Purify Water
56cd0f94-003c-5b75-a581-92795afd6e0a.description: If the hverhuldra sits in a body of slow-flowing or standing water, such as a hot spring or a small creek, for at least 1 hour, the water becomes purified and rendered free of poison and disease. In slow-flowing water, this purification fades 1 hour after the hverhuldra leaves the water. In standing water, this purification lasts until a contaminant enters the water while the hverhuldra isn’t in it.

2777eeb7-ae8f-5bbb-9d33-9b5137ac8e59.name: Quick Rescue
2777eeb7-ae8f-5bbb-9d33-9b5137ac8e59.description: As a bonus action, the hverhuldra gives one willing creature within 60 feet of it the ability to breathe water for 1 minute.

92581c0c-7879-536e-9e01-dfb11843afa3.name: Water Protection
92581c0c-7879-536e-9e01-dfb11843afa3.description: While the hverhuldra submerged in water, it has advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks, and it has resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage from nonmagical attacks. If it takes cold damage, this trait doesn’t function until the end of its next turn.

d7bc6553-319f-577f-8ad6-75015f20d4cc.name: Multiattack (Hverhuldra)
d7bc6553-319f-577f-8ad6-75015f20d4cc.description: The hverhuldra makes two steaming fist attacks.

attributes.description: The hverhuldra makes two steaming fist attacks.

10f10d00-f89d-503c-97d6-6ff1da936d64.name: Scalding Stream
10f10d00-f89d-503c-97d6-6ff1da936d64.description: The hverhuldra spits scalding water in a 30-foot line that is 5 feet wide. Each creature in that line must make a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw. On a failed save, the target takes 21 (6d6) fire damage and is blinded for 1 minute. On a successful save, the target takes half the damage and isn't blinded. A blinded creature can make a DC 15 Constitution saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

af64ad21-5e99-532c-b562-1ba8be2f2cd2.name: Steam Cloud
af64ad21-5e99-532c-b562-1ba8be2f2cd2.description: When the hverhuldra takes cold damage, it uses the steam from the impact of the cold on its body to magically create a cloud of steam centered on a point it can see within 60 feet of it. This cloud works like the fog cloud spell, except the hverhuldra can dismiss it as a bonus action.

d4c62767-68f5-5cd0-a284-78e1ce22b9ba.name: Steaming Fist

2c4caadf-156c-5f4e-a9f7-210f3d71e4d1.name: Nimble Escape
2c4caadf-156c-5f4e-a9f7-210f3d71e4d1.description: The bogie can take the Disengage or Hide action as a bonus action on each of its turns.

f67e4e1c-bc66-5f02-8088-8c59026c309e.name: Pack Tactics (Ice Bogie)
f67e4e1c-bc66-5f02-8088-8c59026c309e.description: The bogie has advantage on attack rolls against a creature if at least one of the bogie’s allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally isn’t incapacitated.

9ca85ecc-0caf-50c6-9866-5a0cd37c25fc.name: Frosty Aid
9ca85ecc-0caf-50c6-9866-5a0cd37c25fc.description: Whenever an allied ice bogie within 30 feet is reduced to 0 hp, this ice bogie can choose to reduce its hp by 3 (1d6), and the ally regains hp equal to the amount of hp this ice bogie lost.

ea749449-d6e5-5426-ba5e-219dc5ad31c8.name: Icicle Fist
ea749449-d6e5-5426-ba5e-219dc5ad31c8.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 1 bludgeoning damage plus 2 (1d4) cold damage.

afe10600-d903-5c13-ae4c-ccc8159c350b.name: Spiteful Hail
afe10600-d903-5c13-ae4c-ccc8159c350b.description: Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, range 30/120 ft., one target. Hit: 2 (1d4) cold damage, and the target's speed is reduced by 10 until the end of its next turn.

attributes.description: Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, range 30/120 ft., one target. Hit: 2 (1d4) cold damage, and the target's speed is reduced by 10 until the end of its next turn.

55707bb1-57a4-5560-9e57-f51e99cc4359.name: Ice Glide
55707bb1-57a4-5560-9e57-f51e99cc4359.description: The elemental can burrow through nonmagical ice. While doing so, the elemental doesn’t disturb the material it moves through.

attributes.description: The elemental can burrow through nonmagical ice. While doing so, the elemental doesn’t disturb the material it moves through.

298f917a-71e7-5010-a4b9-4561f2a9d9b0.name: Ice Walk (Ice Elemental)
298f917a-71e7-5010-a4b9-4561f2a9d9b0.description: The ice elemental can move across and climb icy surfaces without needing to make an ability check. Additionally, difficult terrain composed of ice or snow doesn’t cost it extra movement.

attributes.description: The ice elemental can move across and climb icy surfaces without needing to make an ability check. Additionally, difficult terrain composed of ice or snow doesn’t cost it extra movement.

1535c034-eccd-5d04-b76a-c47d4fd36115.name: Splinter
1535c034-eccd-5d04-b76a-c47d4fd36115.description: A creature that hits the ice elemental with a melee weapon attack that deals bludgeoning damage while within 5 feet of the elemental takes 3 (1d6) piercing damage as shards of ice fly out from the elemental’s body.

attributes.description: A creature that hits the ice elemental with a melee weapon attack that deals bludgeoning damage while within 5 feet of the elemental takes 3 (1d6) piercing damage as shards of ice fly out from the elemental’s body.

defe3a9f-f58b-5ef2-b3ca-a90802ed998d.name: Encase in Ice
defe3a9f-f58b-5ef2-b3ca-a90802ed998d.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 10 ft. one creature. Hit: 14 (4d6) cold damage, and the target must make a DC 14 Constitution saving throw. On a failure, ice begins to form around the creature, and it is restrained. The restrained creature must repeat the saving throw at the end of its next turn, becoming petrified in ice on a failure or ending the effect on a success. The petrification lasts until the creature spends at least 1 hour in a warm environment. Alternatively, a creature can be freed of the restrained or petrified conditions if it takes at least 10 fire damage.

6b367db7-4f5c-56e1-a0e6-b5cddd8aa267.name: Magic Resistance (Ichor Ooze)
6b367db7-4f5c-56e1-a0e6-b5cddd8aa267.description: The ooze has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

913dc4d9-de48-53ef-8060-39ab53831d95.name: Sense Destroyer
913dc4d9-de48-53ef-8060-39ab53831d95.description: The ichor ooze knows the direction and distance to the creature that performed the killing blow on the fiend that created the ooze, as long as the two of them are on the same plane of existence.

e4cf3bbc-9f38-5a10-990f-1ca5a37b63da.name: Hurl Mote
e4cf3bbc-9f38-5a10-990f-1ca5a37b63da.description: Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, range 10/30 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) fire damage.

7b1f5fd7-a2ff-5ca6-b320-37eaf19a95ac.name: Life Drain
7b1f5fd7-a2ff-5ca6-b320-37eaf19a95ac.description: One creature grappled by the ooze must make a DC 12 Constitution saving throw, taking 10 (3d6) necrotic damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. The target's hp maximum is reduced by an amount equal to the damage taken, and the ooze regains hp equal to that amount. This reduction lasts until the target finishes a long rest. The target dies if this effect reduces its hp maximum to 0.

8bfb5ae9-3f80-554c-abde-b660218a2b4d.name: Ikuchi Oil
8bfb5ae9-3f80-554c-abde-b660218a2b4d.description: The ikuchi constantly emits a thick, nonflammable, yellowish oil. When the ikuchi is underwater, this oil makes the water within 30 feet of the ikuchi difficult terrain. Each time a creature moves more than 10 feet through this area it must succeed on a DC 15 Strength saving throw or be restrained by the thick oil until the end of its next turn. A creature under the effects of a freedom of movement spell or similar magic is immune to the effects of Ikuchi Oil.

535ff204-c458-56b3-98c9-b68e51dd2af4.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 20 ft., one Huge or smaller creature. Hit: 14 (2d8 + 5) bludgeoning damage. The target is grappled (escape DC 16) if the ikuchi isn't already constricting two other creatures. Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained.

06736597-43de-5d19-90c1-474b4c51ecc9.description: The kembingur has advantage on melee attack rolls against any creature that doesn’t have all its hp.

9aadfb21-f48f-56f5-8b23-858f57d45be4.name: Blood Scent (Illhveli, Kembingur)
9aadfb21-f48f-56f5-8b23-858f57d45be4.description: The kembingur can smell blood in the water within 5 miles of it. It can determine whether the blood is fresh or old and what type of creature shed the blood. In addition, the kembingur has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) and Wisdom (Survival) checks to find or track a creature that doesn’t have all its hp.

fed6877e-dad3-51cf-99ed-e52730ebdb4e.description: The kembingur deals double damage to objects and structures.

13d4832e-6d7c-5782-a968-e4709e236c56.name: Bite (Illhveli, Kembingur)

fe5a8a70-3ca9-5cc1-af64-9813f195e537.name: Churn Water
fe5a8a70-3ca9-5cc1-af64-9813f195e537.description:
The kembingur thrashes violently. Each creature within 20 feet of the kembingur must make a DC 17 Dexterity saving throw, taking 36 (8d8) bludgeoning damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

The water within 60 feet of the kembingur becomes difficult terrain for 1 minute. Each creature that starts its turn on the deck of a ship in this area must succeed on a DC 17 Dexterity saving throw or fall overboard.

a6602d0d-7423-51de-90f1-28eb4ad1aaa1.description: The nauthveli deals double damage to objects and structures.

64c2d3f3-ca45-5f36-8454-6b8932a24121.name: Terror of the High Seas
64c2d3f3-ca45-5f36-8454-6b8932a24121.description: The nauthveli is surrounded by a supernatural aura of dread. Each creature that starts its turn within 60 feet of the nauthveli must succeed on a DC 18 Wisdom saving throw or become frightened for 1 minute. A creature immersed in water has disadvantage on this saving throw. A frightened creature can repeat this saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. If a creature’s saving throw is successful or the effect ends for it, the creature is immune to the nauthveli’s Terror of the High Seas for the next 24 hours.

If the target is a creature, it is grappled (escape DC 18). Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained, and the nauthveli can't bite another target.

01281457-c14e-58d0-bc1e-f865d52b7ecf.name: Multiattack (Illhveli, Nauthveli)
01281457-c14e-58d0-bc1e-f865d52b7ecf.description: The nauthveli makes one bite attack and one tail attack.

df0c078f-f64d-543e-a579-68e6afb9f44a.name: Swallow (Illhveli, Nauthveli)
df0c078f-f64d-543e-a579-68e6afb9f44a.description:
The nauthveli makes one bite attack against a Large or smaller creature it is grappling. If the attack hits, the target is also swallowed, and the grapple ends. While swallowed, the creature is blinded and restrained, it has total cover against attacks and other effects outside the nauthveli, and it takes 28 (8d6) acid damage at the start of each of the nauthveli's turns.

If the nauthveli takes 40 damage or more on a single turn from a creature inside it, the nauthveli must succeed on a DC 22 Constitution saving throw at the end of that turn or regurgitate all swallowed creatures, which fall prone in a space within 10 feet of the nauthveli. If the nauthveli dies, a swallowed creature is no longer restrained by it and can escape from the corpse using 15 feet of movement, exiting prone.

ba42ca1f-7d34-59b2-9bf1-686c8ab30cea.name: Thunderous Bellow
ba42ca1f-7d34-59b2-9bf1-686c8ab30cea.description: The nauthveli bellows in a 60-foot cone. Each creature in the area must make a DC 20 Dexterity saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 54 (12d8) thunder damage and is pushed up to 15 feet away from the nauthveli and knocked prone. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't pushed or knocked prone.

9321468b-a6be-5919-9064-b202aabc193b.name: Innate Spellcasting (1/Day) (Imperial Dragon Wyrmling)
9321468b-a6be-5919-9064-b202aabc193b.description: The dragon can innately cast fog cloud, requiring no material components. Its innate spellcasting ability is Charisma.

c18a8926-6c03-51b7-a543-1287866adbf9.name: Lightning Breath (Imperial Dragon Wyrmling)
c18a8926-6c03-51b7-a543-1287866adbf9.description: The dragon exhales lightning in a 30-foot line that is 5 feet wide. Each creature in that line must make a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw, taking 22 (4d10) lightning damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

b3ae4683-d9fc-5c10-9d67-fbe56284b2ef.name: Calm Vulnerability
b3ae4683-d9fc-5c10-9d67-fbe56284b2ef.description: The incarnate gloom can be targeted by the calm emotions spell. If it fails the saving throw, it takes 11 (2d10) psychic damage at the start of each of its turns, as long as the spellcaster maintains concentration on the spell. If it succeeds on the saving throw, it takes 11 (2d10) psychic damage but isn’t further affected by that casting of the spell.

2873fca3-21b3-55e6-9b3f-f9a1543827a3.name: Deepening Gloom
2873fca3-21b3-55e6-9b3f-f9a1543827a3.description: A 30-foot radius of magical darkness extends out from the incarnate gloom at all times, moving with it and spreading around corners. Darkvision can’t penetrate this darkness, and no natural light can illuminate it. If any of the darkness overlaps with an area of light created by a spell of 3rd level or lower, the spell creating the light is dispelled. A successful dispel magic (DC 16) cast on the gloom suppresses this aura for 1 minute or until the incarnate gloom reduces a creature to 0 hp.

attributes.description: A 30-foot radius of magical darkness extends out from the incarnate gloom at all times, moving with it and spreading around corners. Darkvision can’t penetrate this darkness, and no natural light can illuminate it. If any of the darkness overlaps with an area of light created by a spell of 3rd level or lower, the spell creating the light is dispelled. A successful dispel magic (DC 16) cast on the gloom suppresses this aura for 1 minute or until the incarnate gloom reduces a creature to 0 hp.

cceb4e59-5328-5046-b188-e166fb6bda04.name: Incorporeal Movement (Incarnate Gloom)
cceb4e59-5328-5046-b188-e166fb6bda04.description: The incarnate gloom can move through other creatures and objects as if they were difficult terrain. It takes 5 (1d10) force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.

attributes.description: The incarnate gloom can move through other creatures and objects as if they were difficult terrain. It takes 5 (1d10) force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.

4903eebd-3a00-5cbe-8dd5-51954f747efd.name: Despairing Touch
4903eebd-3a00-5cbe-8dd5-51954f747efd.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 19 (4d6 + 5) psychic damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 19 (4d6 + 5) psychic damage.

514731b6-bd49-56cb-9f5d-59d8cf1c0120.name: Engulf in Shadow
514731b6-bd49-56cb-9f5d-59d8cf1c0120.description:
The incarnate gloom moves up to its speed. While doing so, it can enter Huge or smaller creatures' spaces. Whenever the gloom enters a creature's space, the creature must make a DC 18 Dexterity saving throw.

On a successful save, the creature can choose to sidestep to just outside the gloom's space. A creature that chooses not to sidestep suffers the consequences of a failed saving throw.

On a failed save, the gloom enters the creature's space, the creature takes 18 (4d8) necrotic damage, suffers one level of exhaustion, and is engulfed in shadow. The engulfed creature is blinded and restrained, it has total cover against attacks and other effects outside the gloom, and it takes 18 (4d8) necrotic damage at the start of each of the gloom's turns. When the gloom moves, the engulfed creature doesn't move with it.

An engulfed creature can try to escape by taking an action to make a DC 18 Wisdom check. On a success, the creature escapes the gloom and enters a space of its choice within 5 feet of the gloom.

34f48665-a327-5de5-aac5-91df484b3517.name: Multiattack (Incarnate Gloom)
34f48665-a327-5de5-aac5-91df484b3517.description: The incarnate gloom makes three attacks with its despairing touch.

attributes.description: The incarnate gloom makes three attacks with its despairing touch.

88da756a-9d47-5b06-8a31-7c213c056f02.name: Cruelty
88da756a-9d47-5b06-8a31-7c213c056f02.description: If the infernal centaur scores a critical hit with a melee attack, it can make a second attack against the same target as a bonus action. It has advantage on this attack roll.

07d2c968-32c1-513c-89d3-9784dc0a3b54.name: Hell Hound Affinity
07d2c968-32c1-513c-89d3-9784dc0a3b54.description: Hell hounds view infernal centaurs as leaders of their packs. A hell hound refuses to attack an infernal centaur unless the centaur attacks it first. If magically coerced, the hell hound has disadvantage on attack rolls against the centaur. The centaur has advantage on Charisma (Persuasion) checks against hell hounds.

If magically coerced, the hell hound has disadvantage on attack rolls against the centaur. The centaur has advantage on Charisma (Persuasion) checks against hell hounds.

11d7bebe-16ee-5651-bb7a-3f2995a2da7f.name: Pack Tactics (Infernal Centaur)
11d7bebe-16ee-5651-bb7a-3f2995a2da7f.description: The centaur has advantage on attack rolls against a creature if at least one of the centaur’s allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally isn’t incapacitated.

attributes.description: The centaur has advantage on attack rolls against a creature if at least one of the centaur’s allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally isn’t incapacitated.

bd7c2f9f-02fe-5329-a453-19ceae2f097c.name: Fiery Breath
bd7c2f9f-02fe-5329-a453-19ceae2f097c.description: The infernal centaur exhales fire in a 15-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw, taking 28 (8d6) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

attributes.description: The infernal centaur exhales fire in a 15-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw, taking 28 (8d6) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

afe96006-2d8e-5986-906b-f0223f8c54a9.name: Multiattack (Infernal Centaur)
afe96006-2d8e-5986-906b-f0223f8c54a9.description: The infernal centaur makes two dagger attacks.

attributes.description: The infernal centaur makes two dagger attacks.

2a63cab6-db80-568f-9164-d4a14b163332.name: Devil’s Sight (Infernal Swarm)
2a63cab6-db80-568f-9164-d4a14b163332.description: Magical darkness doesn’t impede the infernal swarm’s darkvision

attributes.description: Magical darkness doesn’t impede the infernal swarm’s darkvision

b7ba71b1-a92b-559e-a30e-a08aa30fc52d.name: Magic Resistance (Infernal Swarm)
b7ba71b1-a92b-559e-a30e-a08aa30fc52d.description: The infernal swarm has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

attributes.description: The infernal swarm has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

e4053950-9e5c-59e3-8035-b1b03f31d0e6.name: Shaped Swarm
e4053950-9e5c-59e3-8035-b1b03f31d0e6.description:
As a bonus action, the swarm can shape itself into a Huge fiend or back into a shapeless mass. Its statistics are the same in each form, and it can’t regain hp or gain temporary hp. If a creature is more than 10 feet away from the infernal swarm, it must take an action to visually inspect the fiend form and succeed on a DC 25 Intelligence (Investigation) check to discern the Huge fiend is actually a swarm of Small insects. A creature within 10 feet of the swarm immediately discerns the truth.

While in fiend form, it can wield weapons and hold, grasp, push, pull, or interact with objects that might otherwise require a more humanoid form to accomplish. If the infernal swarm takes thunder damage while in its fiend form, it immediately changes to its shapeless form.

While in shapeless form, it can occupy another creature’s space and vice versa and can move through any opening large enough for a Small fiend, but it can’t grapple or be grappled.

0d6c3875-1718-545a-894b-ce69fdc702aa.name: Poisonous Barb
0d6c3875-1718-545a-894b-ce69fdc702aa.description: Ranged Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, range 30/120 ft., one target. Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained, and the infernal swarm can't slam another target. In addition, at the start of each of the target's turns, the target takes 14 (4d6) piercing damage.

51269a77-3476-5664-b2e3-17332b5acbd4.name: Spellcasting (Initiate of the Elder Elementals)
51269a77-3476-5664-b2e3-17332b5acbd4.description:
The initiate of the elder elementals is a 5th-level spellcaster. Its spellcasting ability is Intelligence (spell save DC 13, +5 to hit with spell attacks). The initiate has the following wizard spells prepared:

- **Cantrips** (At Will): pummelstone, light, mage hand, ray of frost
- **1st Level** (4 slots): burning hands, mage armor, tidal barrier
- **2nd Level** (3 slots): gust of wind, misty step, scorching ray
- **3rd Level** (2 slots): lightning bolt, frozen razors

bb6e16bb-d6b4-579b-a17c-310384c6fe91.description: While in sunlight, the initiate has disadvantage on attack rolls, as well as on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight.

22a136da-8a5d-5026-987d-cae38421248e.name: Versatility of the Elder Elementals
22a136da-8a5d-5026-987d-cae38421248e.description: As a bonus action, the initiate can change the damage of a spell it casts from acid, cold, fire, or lightning to another one of those elements.

697ad140-19fc-558f-ad68-33c15943c86b.name: Dagger (Initiate of the Elder Elementals)

38dea861-b55f-53de-9801-5a0f99bbde12.name: Gift of the Elder Elementals
38dea861-b55f-53de-9801-5a0f99bbde12.description: Ranged Spell Attack: +5 to hit, range 60 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (2d6) acid, cold, fire, or lightning damage, and the target has disadvantage on its next saving throw against any of the initiate's spells that deal the chosen type of damage.

21efa0b2-045d-5650-9982-e9464795b33c.name: Iridescence
21efa0b2-045d-5650-9982-e9464795b33c.description: The irid sheds bright light in a 10-foot radius and dim light for an additional 10 feet. The light can be any color the irid desires. The irid can create or suppress the light as a bonus action.

738e06be-d7d1-52e7-82f0-8302cb5ac205.name: Photographic Memory
738e06be-d7d1-52e7-82f0-8302cb5ac205.description: The irid can perfectly recall anything it has seen or heard in the last month.

7cdbd847-0c74-5558-988b-d4b4950c337f.name: Gossip
7cdbd847-0c74-5558-988b-d4b4950c337f.description: The irid spouts gossip and exaggerated truths about a target it can see within 30 feet. If the target is hostile, it must succeed on a DC 13 Charisma saving throw or have disadvantage on its next attack roll. If the target is friendly, it has advantage on its next attack roll.

8db6c126-7daf-5a60-b8d4-509d13e08a5c.name: Invisibility (Irid)
8db6c126-7daf-5a60-b8d4-509d13e08a5c.description: The irid magically turns invisible until it attacks or uses Gossip, or until its concentration ends (as if concentrating on a spell). Any equipment the irid wears or carries is invisible with it.

a39380d5-f3f6-5f37-a204-4a4cccfab29f.name: Magic Resistance (Jack of Strings)
a39380d5-f3f6-5f37-a204-4a4cccfab29f.description: The jack of strings has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

f67983bb-1936-5830-9417-9caee8e8d58a.name: Animate Puppet
f67983bb-1936-5830-9417-9caee8e8d58a.description: The jack of strings animates up to three wooden puppets it can see within 60 feet of it. This works like the animate objects spell, except the wooden puppet uses the statistics of a Small object, regardless of the puppet's actual size. The jack can have no more than five puppets animated at one time.

bc0d1012-f690-5e45-bbc6-091552ffb8ac.name: Mocking Slap

87f9da31-a056-59c2-91f9-f5006e368fa1.name: Multiattack (Jack of Strings)
87f9da31-a056-59c2-91f9-f5006e368fa1.description: The jack of strings makes two mocking slap attacks.

c195b07b-c421-5d46-885a-91fbccc61c83.name: Puppet Link
c195b07b-c421-5d46-885a-91fbccc61c83.description:
One humanoid or beast the jack of strings can see within 60 feet of it must succeed on a DC 15 Wisdom saving throw or become magically linked to the jack's marionette. This link appears as a barely perceptible string between the jack's marionette and the target. A linked creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the link on a success.

While a target is linked, the jack of strings can use its reaction at the start of the target's turn to control the linked target. The jack of strings can make the target move, manipulate objects, attack, or take other purely physical actions. The jack can't make the target cast spells. While controlled, the target moves awkwardly and has disadvantage on attack rolls and ability checks. If the target receives a suicidal command from the jack of strings, it can repeat the saving throw, ending the effect on a success.

The jack of strings can have only one target linked at a time. If it links another, the effect on the previous target ends. If a creature dies while linked to the jack's marionette, the creature's body becomes a wooden puppet that resembles the creature.

c2956367-3446-5f25-872b-834c837923e3.name: Consume Soul
c2956367-3446-5f25-872b-834c837923e3.description: A creature slain by the kachlian can’t be restored to life unless the kachlian is killed within 24 hours of slaying the creature. After 24 hours, the soul becomes part of the kachlian, and the creature can be restored only with a wish spell.

f290a18c-da02-5737-9dc3-460e2947b5ba.name: Spellcasting (Kachlian)
f290a18c-da02-5737-9dc3-460e2947b5ba.description:
The kachlian is a 7th-level spellcaster. Its spellcasting ability is Intelligence (spell save DC 14, +6 to hit with spell attacks). The kachlian has the following wizard spells prepared:

- **Cantrips** (At Will): chill touch, minor illusion, ray of frost, shocking grasp
- **1st Level** (4 slots): detect magic, hideous laughter, identify, magic missile
- **2nd Level** (3 slots): blindness/deafness, darkness, see invisibility
- **3rd Level** (3 slots): counterspell, slow
- **4th Level** (1 slots): confusion

88a21718-c8e8-524b-a892-b260656fe14a.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 17 (3d8 + 4) bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it is grappled (escape DC 16). The kachlian has three tentacles, each of which can grapple only one target.

048c2414-7b21-5ef2-9f2a-b3055b82aec2.name: Air Form (Wintry Swirl Form Only)
048c2414-7b21-5ef2-9f2a-b3055b82aec2.description: The kamaitachi can enter a hostile creature’s space and stop there. It can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing.

4f88be3f-407f-59ed-86bf-fc9b0bfe8414.name: Concealing Snow (True Form Only)
4f88be3f-407f-59ed-86bf-fc9b0bfe8414.description: As a bonus action, the kamaitachi sheathes itself in blowing ice and snow, causing attack rolls against it to have disadvantage. The kamaitachi can use this trait only if it is in snowy terrain. Flyby (Wintry Swirl Form Only). The kamaitachi doesn’t provoke opportunity attacks when it flies out of an enemy’s reach.

The kamaitachi can use this trait only if it is in snowy terrain. Flyby (Wintry Swirl Form Only). The kamaitachi doesn’t provoke opportunity attacks when it flies out of an enemy’s reach.

dcc78048-dcc1-5d36-8f5f-e72e241de741.name: Keen Smell (Kamaitachi)
dcc78048-dcc1-5d36-8f5f-e72e241de741.description: The kamaitachi has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on smell.

attributes.description: The kamaitachi has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on smell.

0f39b999-8832-5003-a6ba-cbadc1a94cf7.name: Shapechanger (Kamaitachi)
0f39b999-8832-5003-a6ba-cbadc1a94cf7.description: The kamaitachi can use its action to polymorph into a swirl of wintry weather. It can revert back to its true form as a bonus action. Its statistics are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn’t transformed. It reverts to its true form when it dies. While a wintry swirl, it has a flying speed of 40 feet, immunity to the grappled, petrified, prone, and restrained conditions, and resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage from nonmagical attacks.

Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn’t transformed. It reverts to its true form when it dies. While a wintry swirl, it has a flying speed of 40 feet, immunity to the grappled, petrified, prone, and restrained conditions, and resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage from nonmagical attacks.

400b5650-b277-5074-ae72-79e0dcd8f653.name: Snow Devil (Wintry Swirl Form Only)
400b5650-b277-5074-ae72-79e0dcd8f653.description: Until it attacks or uses Wintry Assault, the kamaitachi is indistinguishable from a natural swirl of snow unless a creature succeeds on a DC 15 Intelligence (Investigation) check.

attributes.description: Until it attacks or uses Wintry Assault, the kamaitachi is indistinguishable from a natural swirl of snow unless a creature succeeds on a DC 15 Intelligence (Investigation) check.

0c8d488e-7176-572e-9065-5f2237fa2428.name: Multiattack (Kamaitachi)
0c8d488e-7176-572e-9065-5f2237fa2428.description: The kamaitachi makes two sickle paw attacks.

attributes.description: The kamaitachi makes two sickle paw attacks.

7105ded7-992c-5d6f-82a3-04ce9a001042.name: Sickle Paw
7105ded7-992c-5d6f-82a3-04ce9a001042.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 18 (4d6 + 4) slashing damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 18 (4d6 + 4) slashing damage.

ed9e8095-96ac-578e-aea5-4fc03556bb6e.name: Wintry Assault
ed9e8095-96ac-578e-aea5-4fc03556bb6e.description: Each creature in the kamaitachi's space must make a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw. On a failure, the creature takes 9 (2d8) slashing damage plus 9 (2d8) cold damage and is blinded until the end of its next turn. On a success, it takes half the damage and isn't blinded.

c368b63e-e532-5938-a7e4-d4424c766d08.name: Rampage
c368b63e-e532-5938-a7e4-d4424c766d08.description: When the kaveph reduces a creature to 0 hp with a melee attack on its turn, it can take a bonus action to move up to half its speed and make a smash attack.

attributes.description: When the kaveph reduces a creature to 0 hp with a melee attack on its turn, it can take a bonus action to move up to half its speed and make a smash attack.

5cfe7129-284a-5b08-b12b-0ea9e37cffc5.name: Multiattack (Kaveph)
5cfe7129-284a-5b08-b12b-0ea9e37cffc5.description: The kaveph makes two smash attacks.

attributes.description: The kaveph makes two smash attacks.

714d87ce-2ef6-5739-83b2-704aea7ae335.name: Revenge
714d87ce-2ef6-5739-83b2-704aea7ae335.description: When a kaveph is dealt 20 damage or more by a single attack and survives, it can make a smash attack against the attacker.

attributes.description: When a kaveph is dealt 20 damage or more by a single attack and survives, it can make a smash attack against the attacker.

f9e808a5-b7c7-5a00-b930-b3a2059b244e.name: Rock (Kaveph)
f9e808a5-b7c7-5a00-b930-b3a2059b244e.description: Ranged Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, range 30/120 ft., one target. Hit: 21 (3d10 + 5) bludgeoning damage.

attributes.description: Ranged Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, range 30/120 ft., one target. Hit: 21 (3d10 + 5) bludgeoning damage.

f5fb63d2-b846-59e8-b598-2cb93eb812c4.name: Smash
f5fb63d2-b846-59e8-b598-2cb93eb812c4.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 14 (2d8 + 5) bludgeoning damage. The target must succeed on a DC 15 Strength saving throw or be pushed up to 10 feet away from the kaveph.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 14 (2d8 + 5) bludgeoning damage. The target must succeed on a DC 15 Strength saving throw or be pushed up to 10 feet away from the kaveph.

730d68cb-8f00-5435-a33e-17023ee030fe.name: Amphibious (Keelbreaker Crab)
730d68cb-8f00-5435-a33e-17023ee030fe.description: The crab can breathe air and water.

attributes.description: The crab can breathe air and water.

8dbe409b-5e6f-5e83-be5c-f11f6ce86b00.name: Living Figureheads
8dbe409b-5e6f-5e83-be5c-f11f6ce86b00.description:
Three magical figureheads adorn the crab’s back. While at least one figurehead remains intact, the crab has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks and can use its Wail.

Each figurehead is an object with AC 15, 20 hp, resistance to bludgeoning and piercing damage, and immunity to poison and psychic damage. If all the figureheads are reduced to 0 hp, the keelbreaker crab can’t use its Wail action. Damaging a figurehead does not harm the crab.

33870d73-7cea-5463-a6ff-c88b2a55f99e.name: Siege Monster (Keelbreaker Crab)
33870d73-7cea-5463-a6ff-c88b2a55f99e.description: The crab deals double damage to objects and structures.

attributes.description: The crab deals double damage to objects and structures.

41ef63a3-a88d-5a06-b1c1-1002bbd0a3b4.name: Multiattack (Keelbreaker Crab)
41ef63a3-a88d-5a06-b1c1-1002bbd0a3b4.description: The crab can use its Wail. It then makes two pincer attacks.

attributes.description: The crab can use its Wail. It then makes two pincer attacks.

fc8c29dc-229e-5bc2-82ca-3c827c0b9030.name: Pincer (Keelbreaker Crab)
fc8c29dc-229e-5bc2-82ca-3c827c0b9030.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 17 (3d8 + 4) bludgeoning damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 16) if it is a Large or smaller creature. The crab has two claws, each of which can grapple only one target.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 17 (3d8 + 4) bludgeoning damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 16) if it is a Large or smaller creature. The crab has two claws, each of which can grapple only one target.

69adb715-acbe-559c-affd-3d824f2e033b.name: Wail
69adb715-acbe-559c-affd-3d824f2e033b.description:
As long as at least one if its living figureheads remains intact, the keelbreaker crab can cause the figurehead to wail. Roll a d6 and consult the following table to determine the wail.

| d6 | Wail |
|----|------|
| 1-2 | Frightening Wail. Each creature within 60 feet who can hear the crab must succeed on a DC 16 Wisdom saving throw or become frightened for 1 minute. A creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. If a creature's saving throw is successful or the effect ends for it, the creature is immune to the keelbreaker crab's Frightening Wail for the next 24 hours. |
| 3-4 | Maddening Wail. Each creature within 60 feet who can hear the crab must succeed on a DC 16 Wisdom saving throw or take 18 (4d8) psychic damage. |
| 5-6 | Stunning Wail. Each creature within 60 feet who can hear the crab must make a DC 16 Constitution saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 9 (2d8) thunder damage and is stunned until the end of its next turn. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't stunned. |

dc2d3056-3b01-575b-83e4-f75569aba518.name: Aggressive (Kelp Drake)
dc2d3056-3b01-575b-83e4-f75569aba518.description: As a bonus action, the drake can move up to its speed toward a hostile creature that it can see.

attributes.description: As a bonus action, the drake can move up to its speed toward a hostile creature that it can see.

aee04ddb-0a29-51f2-a630-24b3ac9abe72.name: Limited Amphibiousness
aee04ddb-0a29-51f2-a630-24b3ac9abe72.description: The drake can breathe air and water, but it needs to be submerged at least once every 6 hours to avoid suffocation.

attributes.description: The drake can breathe air and water, but it needs to be submerged at least once every 6 hours to avoid suffocation.

b093515f-c09b-5d58-8699-b9969a07b06f.name: Binding Bile
b093515f-c09b-5d58-8699-b9969a07b06f.description: The drake forcibly vomits a long line of bile-coated kelp that unravels in a 30-foot-long, 5-foot-wide line. Each target in the area must make a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 14 (4d6) acid damage and is restrained by kelp for 1 minute. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't restrained. A creature, including the target, can take its action to remove the kelp by succeeding on a DC 13 Strength check. Alternatively, the kelp can be attacked and destroyed (AC 10; hp 3; immunity to bludgeoning, poison, and psychic damage).

On a failure, a creature takes 14 (4d6) acid damage and is restrained by kelp for 1 minute. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't restrained. A creature, including the target, can take its action to remove the kelp by succeeding on a DC 13 Strength check. Alternatively, the kelp can be attacked and destroyed (AC 10; hp 3; immunity to bludgeoning, poison, and psychic damage).

32fb8053-2766-5a3c-8bc4-b8e77f5e8d12.name: Deathroll
32fb8053-2766-5a3c-8bc4-b8e77f5e8d12.description: The kelp drake latches onto a Medium or smaller creature it can see within 5 feet of it and rolls itself and the target. The target must make a DC 13 Constitution saving throw. On a failure, the creature takes 7 (2d6) slashing damage and is stunned until the end of its next turn. On a success, the creature takes half the damage and isn't stunned. The kelp drake can use this action only if both itself and the target are immersed in water.

attributes.description: The kelp drake latches onto a Medium or smaller creature it can see within 5 feet of it and rolls itself and the target. The target must make a DC 13 Constitution saving throw. On a failure, the creature takes 7 (2d6) slashing damage and is stunned until the end of its next turn. On a success, the creature takes half the damage and isn't stunned. The kelp drake can use this action only if both itself and the target are immersed in water.

66c595ca-09a1-547c-86d9-0a8e1fcae649.name: Multiattack (Kelp Drake)
66c595ca-09a1-547c-86d9-0a8e1fcae649.description: The drake makes one bite attack and one claw attack. If both attacks hit the same target, the drake can use its Deathroll on the target.

attributes.description: The drake makes one bite attack and one claw attack. If both attacks hit the same target, the drake can use its Deathroll on the target.

2238295d-a04c-5825-b2e0-2f4199c243fc.name: Disperse
2238295d-a04c-5825-b2e0-2f4199c243fc.description: When the kelp eel is reduced to 0 hp, it disperses into its component kelp in a 30-foot cube. The area is difficult terrain for 1 hour. At the end of that hour, the kelp eel reforms, regaining half its hp and becoming active again. If more than half the kelp that comprises the dispersed kelp eel is removed from the water and dried, it can’t reform and the creature is destroyed.

At the end of that hour, the kelp eel reforms, regaining half its hp and becoming active again. If more than half the kelp that comprises the dispersed kelp eel is removed from the water and dried, it can’t reform and the creature is destroyed.

170c23a0-fdaf-53fe-b442-df59e3b5441e.name: False Appearance (Kelp Eel)
170c23a0-fdaf-53fe-b442-df59e3b5441e.description: While the kelp eel remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from ordinary kelp.

attributes.description: While the kelp eel remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from ordinary kelp.

b9a001c5-d125-5d46-b6fa-6051f7adfcb4.name: Kelp Tendril
b9a001c5-d125-5d46-b6fa-6051f7adfcb4.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 50 ft., one creature. Hit: The target is grappled (escape DC 16). Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained, and the kelp eel can't use the same kelp tendril on another target. In addition, at the start of the target's next turn, it begins to suffocate as the eel's grip crushes the breath out of it.

15422897-479e-5d67-a7c6-307d34db3ef0.name: Multiattack (Kelp Eel)
15422897-479e-5d67-a7c6-307d34db3ef0.description: The kelp eel makes two attacks with its kelp tendrils, uses Reel, and makes two attacks with its slam.

attributes.description: The kelp eel makes two attacks with its kelp tendrils, uses Reel, and makes two attacks with its slam.

743735a5-8c65-5bc5-9e5f-7bc4a3b34c2a.name: Reel (Kelp Eel)
743735a5-8c65-5bc5-9e5f-7bc4a3b34c2a.description: The kelp eel pulls each creature grappled by it up to 25 feet straight toward it.

attributes.description: The kelp eel pulls each creature grappled by it up to 25 feet straight toward it.

a9dc2b30-48aa-5b6c-96cd-8298d7632cd4.name: Slam (Kelp Eel)
a9dc2b30-48aa-5b6c-96cd-8298d7632cd4.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 10 ft., one creature. Hit: 31 (6d8 + 4) bludgeoning damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 10 ft., one creature. Hit: 31 (6d8 + 4) bludgeoning damage.

c07521c0-f2d6-5a3a-ad55-9a3e84dd9446.name: Compress
c07521c0-f2d6-5a3a-ad55-9a3e84dd9446.description: The dragonette can squeeze through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide.

attributes.description: The dragonette can squeeze through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide.

317bb3ea-3fd6-52cf-8a27-3fff70871cd3.name: Leaping Withdraw
317bb3ea-3fd6-52cf-8a27-3fff70871cd3.description: The dragonette’s long jump is up to 20 feet, and its high jump is up to 10 feet, with or without a running start. If the dragonette leaps out of a creature’s reach, it doesn’t provoke opportunity attacks.

attributes.description: The dragonette’s long jump is up to 20 feet, and its high jump is up to 10 feet, with or without a running start. If the dragonette leaps out of a creature’s reach, it doesn’t provoke opportunity attacks.

ece68671-ad56-5187-8c4c-e97345cf408d.name: Tongue Pick
ece68671-ad56-5187-8c4c-e97345cf408d.description: The dragonette can use its tongue to pick locks and disarm traps, as if its tongue was a set of thieves’ tools. It is proficient in using its tongue in this way.

attributes.description: The dragonette can use its tongue to pick locks and disarm traps, as if its tongue was a set of thieves’ tools. It is proficient in using its tongue in this way.

1ea308b3-99ab-5121-acf5-e98e326060cc.name: Vermin Hunter
1ea308b3-99ab-5121-acf5-e98e326060cc.description: Swarms of beasts don’t have resistance to piercing and slashing damage from the dragonette. In addition, as a bonus action, the dragonette can use Scale Slash against a swarm of beasts occupying its space.

attributes.description: Swarms of beasts don’t have resistance to piercing and slashing damage from the dragonette. In addition, as a bonus action, the dragonette can use Scale Slash against a swarm of beasts occupying its space.

c3b308db-d38a-59a9-a2df-97c7d9b1bfd8.name: Soporific Breath
c3b308db-d38a-59a9-a2df-97c7d9b1bfd8.description: The dragonette exhales a cloud of sleep gas in a 15-foot cone. Each creature in the area must succeed on a DC 12 Constitution saving throw or fall unconscious for 1 minute. This effect ends for a creature if the creature takes damage or someone uses an action to wake it.

attributes.description: The dragonette exhales a cloud of sleep gas in a 15-foot cone. Each creature in the area must succeed on a DC 12 Constitution saving throw or fall unconscious for 1 minute. This effect ends for a creature if the creature takes damage or someone uses an action to wake it.

9dbbf508-7ec9-5cdf-a715-79b43d2a1b0e.name: Nauseous Gas
9dbbf508-7ec9-5cdf-a715-79b43d2a1b0e.description: The kezai produces a faint, nauseating gas. Any creature that starts its turn within 20 feet of the kezai must succeed on a DC 14 Constitution saving throw or take 2 (1d4) poison damage. The area within 20 feet of the kezai is lightly obscured by the thin gas.

13e3b5c9-7c66-59ce-a447-5744454f53ba.name: Claw (Kezai)
13e3b5c9-7c66-59ce-a447-5744454f53ba.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 7 (1d6 + 4) bludgeoning damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 7 (1d6 + 4) bludgeoning damage.

b953de48-acf5-5a37-ae83-7e140a833305.name: Multiattack (Kezai)
b953de48-acf5-5a37-ae83-7e140a833305.description: The kezai makes three attacks: one with its poison barb and two with its claws.

attributes.description: The kezai makes three attacks: one with its poison barb and two with its claws.

9045c633-2d45-5f2b-9393-837967432c9b.name: Poison Barb
9045c633-2d45-5f2b-9393-837967432c9b.description: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 30/120 ft., one creature. Hit: 6 (1d4 + 4) piercing damage, and the target must make a DC 14 Constitution saving throw. On a failure, the creature takes 7 (2d6) poison damage and is poisoned for 1 minute. On a success, the creature takes half the damage and isn't poisoned. The creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. While poisoned in this way, the creature takes 3 (1d6) poison damage at the start of each of its turns.

attributes.description: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 30/120 ft., one creature. Hit: 6 (1d4 + 4) piercing damage, and the target must make a DC 14 Constitution saving throw. On a failure, the creature takes 7 (2d6) poison damage and is poisoned for 1 minute. On a success, the creature takes half the damage and isn't poisoned. The creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. While poisoned in this way, the creature takes 3 (1d6) poison damage at the start of each of its turns.

247bd84c-e5db-51f7-b591-535bae43478a.name: Searing Acid
247bd84c-e5db-51f7-b591-535bae43478a.description: The kezai's mandibles drip a searing acid, instantly igniting the gas around it. Each creature within 20 feet of the kezai must make a DC 14 Dexterity saving throw, taking 18 (4d8) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. The kezai's Nauseous Gas trait becomes inactive for 1 minute. The kezai can't use Searing Gas unless Nauseous Gas has been active for at least 1 minute.

199e2a44-fbe5-552e-9a7e-ccc7200c2dc0.name: False Appearance (Khodumodumo)
199e2a44-fbe5-552e-9a7e-ccc7200c2dc0.description: While the khodumodumo remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from an ordinary earthen hill.

attributes.description: While the khodumodumo remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from an ordinary earthen hill.

977f7070-eb8e-509f-9852-5d308b993f4b.name: Impaling Tongues
977f7070-eb8e-509f-9852-5d308b993f4b.description: The khodumodumo can have up to six impaling tongues at a time. Each tongue can be attacked (AC 20; 15 hp; immunity to poison and psychic damage). Destroying a tongue deals no damage to the khodumodumo. A tongue can also be broken if a creature takes an action and succeeds on a DC 18 Strength check against it. Destroyed tongues regrow by the time the khodumodumo finishes a long rest.

attributes.description: The khodumodumo can have up to six impaling tongues at a time. Each tongue can be attacked (AC 20; 15 hp; immunity to poison and psychic damage). Destroying a tongue deals no damage to the khodumodumo. A tongue can also be broken if a creature takes an action and succeeds on a DC 18 Strength check against it. Destroyed tongues regrow by the time the khodumodumo finishes a long rest.

a179c64c-6871-57ec-a4d8-5d017b74c079.name: Bite (Khodumodumo)
a179c64c-6871-57ec-a4d8-5d017b74c079.description:
Melee Weapon Attack: +11 to hit, reach 10 ft., one creature. Hit: 33 (6d8 + 6) piercing damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature grappled by the khodumodumo, that creature is swallowed, and the grapple ends. While swallowed, the creature is blinded and restrained, it has total cover against attacks and other effects outside the khodumodumo, and it takes 21 (6d6) acid damage at the start of each of the khodumodumo's turns.

If the khodumodumo takes 30 damage or more on a single turn from a creature inside it, the khodumodumo must succeed on a DC 20 Constitution saving throw at the end of that turn or regurgitate all swallowed creatures, which fall prone in a space within 10 feet of the khodumodumo. If the khodumodumo dies, a swallowed creature is no longer restrained by it and can escape from the corpse using 15 feet of movement, exiting prone.

6e89088d-4bb3-564a-82b7-87cc719ab92e.name: Multiattack (Khodumodumo)
6e89088d-4bb3-564a-82b7-87cc719ab92e.description: The khodumodumo makes three attacks with its tongues, uses Reel, and makes one attack with its bite.

attributes.description: The khodumodumo makes three attacks with its tongues, uses Reel, and makes one attack with its bite.

6e2b59d5-4b84-5a7b-9aab-4c0adac96439.name: Reel (Khodumodumo)
6e2b59d5-4b84-5a7b-9aab-4c0adac96439.description: The khodumodumo pulls each creature grappled by it up to 25 feet straight toward it.

attributes.description: The khodumodumo pulls each creature grappled by it up to 25 feet straight toward it.

913021a5-a7f8-517b-87b0-71e6474839ae.name: Tongue
913021a5-a7f8-517b-87b0-71e6474839ae.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +11 to hit, reach 50 ft., one creature. Hit: The target is grappled (escape DC 18). Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained, and the khodumodumo can't use the same tongue on another target. In addition, at the start of each of the target's turns, the target takes 8 (1d4 + 6) piercing damage.

7d374fc5-978c-5b1f-a7f5-ffc4c6ca97e0.name: Corrosive Mold
7d374fc5-978c-5b1f-a7f5-ffc4c6ca97e0.description: A creature that starts its turn grappled by the kirikari must succeed on a DC 15 Constitution saving throw or take 9 (2d8) acid damage.

attributes.description: A creature that starts its turn grappled by the kirikari must succeed on a DC 15 Constitution saving throw or take 9 (2d8) acid damage.

c81c1655-093d-59b1-88f4-e2c15ae0367d.name: Misty Veil
c81c1655-093d-59b1-88f4-e2c15ae0367d.description: The kirikari emits a light fog within 30 feet of itself. The mist moves with the kirikari, lightly obscuring the area around it. If dispersed by a wind of moderate or greater speed (at least 10 miles per hour), the mist reappears at the start of the kirikari’s next turn.

985d92db-bb38-5415-b933-047b27452a27.name: Unseen Attacker
985d92db-bb38-5415-b933-047b27452a27.description: On each of its turns, the kirikari can use a bonus action to take the Hide action. If the kirikari is hidden from a creature and hits it with an attack, the target takes an extra 7 (2d6) damage from the attack.

attributes.description: On each of its turns, the kirikari can use a bonus action to take the Hide action. If the kirikari is hidden from a creature and hits it with an attack, the target takes an extra 7 (2d6) damage from the attack.

429291bd-7767-55bc-ab90-335453296eca.name: Bite (Kirikari)
429291bd-7767-55bc-ab90-335453296eca.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 31 (4d12 + 5) piercing damage plus 10 (3d6) poison damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 15). Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained, and the kirikari can't bite another target.

4725b258-0b6c-536a-879f-806e54e394a9.name: Blinding Veil
4725b258-0b6c-536a-879f-806e54e394a9.description: The kirikari expels a cloud of intensified mist, heavily obscuring everything within 30 feet of it. The mist thins back to lightly obscuring the area at the end of the kirikari's next turn.

1965f893-edc3-5f53-bb83-bd11b0d06cbc.name: Multiattack (Kirikari)
1965f893-edc3-5f53-bb83-bd11b0d06cbc.description: The kirikari makes two slam attacks.

attributes.description: The kirikari makes two slam attacks.

8c331d6f-cc0a-563b-8e37-ff98884b24b4.name: Slam (Kirikari)
8c331d6f-cc0a-563b-8e37-ff98884b24b4.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 16 (2d10 + 5) bludgeoning damage plus 9 (2d8) acid damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 16 (2d10 + 5) bludgeoning damage plus 9 (2d8) acid damage.

d3b4f4c9-69f2-5108-bc49-a3ae92fa45e0.name: Bigger They Are
d3b4f4c9-69f2-5108-bc49-a3ae92fa45e0.description: Once per turn, when the knight ab-errant hits a creature that is Medium or smaller with a melee weapon, it can deal one extra die of damage.

attributes.description: Once per turn, when the knight ab-errant hits a creature that is Medium or smaller with a melee weapon, it can deal one extra die of damage.

e822d676-ee89-5c1e-9b2d-b98a1788117d.name: Harder They Fall
e822d676-ee89-5c1e-9b2d-b98a1788117d.description: When the knight ab-errant takes damage from a critical hit, it must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw with a DC equal to the damage taken or be knocked prone.

attributes.description: When the knight ab-errant takes damage from a critical hit, it must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw with a DC equal to the damage taken or be knocked prone.

4f07cd92-5c59-5419-abbc-e1046a490ed3.name: Magic Resistance (Knight Ab-errant)
4f07cd92-5c59-5419-abbc-e1046a490ed3.description: The knight ab-errant has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

attributes.description: The knight ab-errant has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

4205bad4-8f56-51a7-a5c1-9162dbb65052.name: Reckless
4205bad4-8f56-51a7-a5c1-9162dbb65052.description: At the start of its turn, the knight ab-errant can gain advantage on all melee weapon attack rolls during that turn, but attack rolls against it also have advantage until the start of its next turn.

attributes.description: At the start of its turn, the knight ab-errant can gain advantage on all melee weapon attack rolls during that turn, but attack rolls against it also have advantage until the start of its next turn.

1d417b73-c156-55b9-9c06-45507ac60d6f.name: Fist (Knight Ab-errant)
1d417b73-c156-55b9-9c06-45507ac60d6f.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (2d4 + 4) bludgeoning damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (2d4 + 4) bludgeoning damage.

cb36270f-666f-555b-8d9e-d94700b9b41a.name: Multiattack (Knight Ab-errant)
cb36270f-666f-555b-8d9e-d94700b9b41a.description: The knight ab-errant makes two melee attacks: one with its sweeping maul and one with its fist.

attributes.description: The knight ab-errant makes two melee attacks: one with its sweeping maul and one with its fist.

c1526ce2-4fd6-5342-aaef-a17326e9c889.name: Sweeping Maul
c1526ce2-4fd6-5342-aaef-a17326e9c889.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 18 (4d6 + 4) bludgeoning damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 14 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 18 (4d6 + 4) bludgeoning damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 14 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone.

bbd403db-7fe3-5a5f-92a6-08aa664b3362.name: Cunning Action
bbd403db-7fe3-5a5f-92a6-08aa664b3362.description: On each of its turns, the spellclerk can use a bonus action to take the Dash, Disengage, or Hide action.

attributes.description: On each of its turns, the spellclerk can use a bonus action to take the Dash, Disengage, or Hide action.

4dd72da6-a0d7-5af7-ac4f-a75b30ab1e6b.name: Pack Tactics (Kobold Spellclerk)
4dd72da6-a0d7-5af7-ac4f-a75b30ab1e6b.description: The kobold has advantage on attack rolls against a creature if at least one of the kobold’s allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally isn’t incapacitated.

attributes.description: The kobold has advantage on attack rolls against a creature if at least one of the kobold’s allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally isn’t incapacitated.

4c640432-1fce-5ab0-be02-50cdf284a6fe.name: Spellcasting (Kobold Spellclerk)
4c640432-1fce-5ab0-be02-50cdf284a6fe.description:
The kobold spellclerk is a 2nd-level spellcaster. Its spellcasting ability is Intelligence (spell save DC 13, +5 to hit with spell attacks). It has the following wizard spells prepared:

- **Cantrips** (At Will): fire bolt, message, minor illusion
- **1st Level** (3 slots): comprehend languages, feather fall, grease, illusory script, sleep
