- **1st Level** (3 slots): comprehend languages, feather fall, grease, illusory script, sleep

6ce00268-eee0-58ff-acf7-86fb3a2982f4.name: Sunlight Sensitivity (Kobold Spellclerk)
6ce00268-eee0-58ff-acf7-86fb3a2982f4.description: While in sunlight, the kobold has disadvantage on attack rolls, as well as on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight.

attributes.description: While in sunlight, the kobold has disadvantage on attack rolls, as well as on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight.

6240fdc3-f556-5c3a-969a-72a5793c6aa9.name: Multiattack (Kobold Spellclerk)
6240fdc3-f556-5c3a-969a-72a5793c6aa9.description: The kobold spellclerk makes two melee attacks.

attributes.description: The kobold spellclerk makes two melee attacks.

5a109f02-c413-5924-b2f7-f01de67305aa.name: Immutable Form (Kobold War Machine)
5a109f02-c413-5924-b2f7-f01de67305aa.description: The kobold war machine is immune to any spell or effect that would alter its form.

attributes.description: The kobold war machine is immune to any spell or effect that would alter its form.

86323921-0aec-5dbf-8b91-6c6d37b7d2f8.name: Operators
86323921-0aec-5dbf-8b91-6c6d37b7d2f8.description:
The kobold war machine can either take an action or move up to its speed each turn, not both. The war machine can hold up to three Small operators. If it has at least one operator, it can move and act normally as long as the operator spends its entire turn operating the war machine. When it has more than one operator, it has additional traits as long as the additional operators spend their entire turns operating the war machine.

If a creature scores a critical hit against the kobold war machine, the creature can target one of the operators with the attack instead. Otherwise, the operators can’t be targeted and are immune to damage while operating the kobold war machine.

When it has more than one operator, it has additional traits as long as the additional operators spend their entire turns operating the war machine.

If a creature scores a critical hit against the kobold war machine, the creature can target one of the operators with the attack instead. Otherwise, the operators can’t be targeted and are immune to damage while operating the kobold war machine.

2830d35f-c17b-50fc-8751-3296cc3a36ab.name: Ram Them! (Two or More Operators)
2830d35f-c17b-50fc-8751-3296cc3a36ab.description: If the kobold war machine moves at least 15 feet straight toward a target and then hits it with a spiked wheel attack on the same turn, the target takes an extra 11 (2d10) piercing damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 16 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone.

03000ecf-b03a-5e92-afaa-eadbd81b0df3.name: Siege Monster (Kobold War Machine)
03000ecf-b03a-5e92-afaa-eadbd81b0df3.description: The kobold war machine deals double damage to objects and structures.

attributes.description: The kobold war machine deals double damage to objects and structures.

92796706-05fc-5639-b4cd-71e237cdf2fb.name: That Way! (Three or More Operators)
92796706-05fc-5639-b4cd-71e237cdf2fb.description: The kobold war machine can take the Dash or Disengage action as a bonus action on each of its turns.

attributes.description: The kobold war machine can take the Dash or Disengage action as a bonus action on each of its turns.

cb9665da-206b-5f89-ae4d-185d62e34ff3.name: Fire Breath
cb9665da-206b-5f89-ae4d-185d62e34ff3.description: The kobold war machine exhales fire in a 30-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 16 Dexterity saving throw, taking 35 (10d6) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

attributes.description: The kobold war machine exhales fire in a 30-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 16 Dexterity saving throw, taking 35 (10d6) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

0b9f507b-234d-5c52-9c04-7d17f9b9da0d.name: Multiattack (Kobold War Machine)
0b9f507b-234d-5c52-9c04-7d17f9b9da0d.description: The kobold war machine makes two spiked wheel attacks. Alternatively, it can make three spit fire attacks.

attributes.description: The kobold war machine makes two spiked wheel attacks. Alternatively, it can make three spit fire attacks.

732e6f4a-e498-5818-b6b5-ce59254c3b5b.name: Spiked Wheel
732e6f4a-e498-5818-b6b5-ce59254c3b5b.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 17 (2d10 + 6) piercing damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 17 (2d10 + 6) piercing damage.

7aac9c59-654d-5d98-bbd1-e8809e4cd4cb.name: Spit Fire
7aac9c59-654d-5d98-bbd1-e8809e4cd4cb.description: Ranged Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, range 120 ft., one target. Hit: 14 (4d6) fire damage.

attributes.description: Ranged Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, range 120 ft., one target. Hit: 14 (4d6) fire damage.

92c24c76-af00-56e2-861f-2d218e374635.name: Fire Absorption (Lambent Witchfyre)
92c24c76-af00-56e2-861f-2d218e374635.description: Whenever the lambent witchfyre is subjected to fire damage, it takes no damage and instead regains a number of hp equal to the fire damage dealt.

attributes.description: Whenever the lambent witchfyre is subjected to fire damage, it takes no damage and instead regains a number of hp equal to the fire damage dealt.

9f4cd050-9e8e-5e85-aa17-d6cffcd3ed1b.name: Fire Form
9f4cd050-9e8e-5e85-aa17-d6cffcd3ed1b.description: The lambent witchfyre can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing. A creature that touches the lambent witchfyre or hits it with a melee attack while within 5 feet of it takes 5 (1d10) fire damage. In addition, the lambent witchfyre can enter a hostile creature’s space and stop there. The first time it enters a creature’s space on a turn, that creature takes 5 (1d10) fire damage and catches fire; until someone takes an action to douse the fire, the creature takes 5 (1d10) fire damage at the start of each of its turns.

A creature that touches the lambent witchfyre or hits it with a melee attack while within 5 feet of it takes 5 (1d10) fire damage. In addition, the lambent witchfyre can enter a hostile creature’s space and stop there. The first time it enters a creature’s space on a turn, that creature takes 5 (1d10) fire damage and catches fire; until someone takes an action to douse the fire, the creature takes 5 (1d10) fire damage at the start of each of its turns.

7fc16594-8939-5a8e-9008-e530d14f4e46.name: Illumination (Lambent Witchfyre)
7fc16594-8939-5a8e-9008-e530d14f4e46.description: The lambent witchfyre sheds bright light in a 30-foot radius and dim light for an additional 30 feet.

attributes.description: The lambent witchfyre sheds bright light in a 30-foot radius and dim light for an additional 30 feet.

1395b8a9-5c15-5278-9fd7-ce5b91ded73c.name: Blazing Touch
1395b8a9-5c15-5278-9fd7-ce5b91ded73c.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 13 (3d6 + 3) fire damage. If the target is a creature or a flammable object, it ignites. Until a creature takes an action to douse the fire, the target takes 5 (1d10) fire damage at the start of each of its turns. If a creature is slain by this attack, the lambent witchfyre regains hp equal to the damage dealt. The body of a creature slain by this attack turns to ash, along with any nonmagical items it was wearing or carrying. The creature can be restored to life only by means of a resurrection or wish spell.

a337d99f-7590-5a18-969c-1bcde63a99dd.name: Multiattack (Lambent Witchfyre)
a337d99f-7590-5a18-969c-1bcde63a99dd.description: The lambent witchfyre makes three blazing touch attacks.

13ff0df5-59b3-56bb-886b-634e7b63af6d.name: Illumination (Lantern Beetle)
13ff0df5-59b3-56bb-886b-634e7b63af6d.description: The beetle sheds bright light in a 10-foot radius and dim light for an additional 10 feet. When it dies, its body continues to glow for another 6 hours.

attributes.description: The beetle sheds bright light in a 10-foot radius and dim light for an additional 10 feet. When it dies, its body continues to glow for another 6 hours.

76924fa1-6662-51b5-ac03-7567fd241d29.name: Horn
76924fa1-6662-51b5-ac03-7567fd241d29.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 1 piercing damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 1 piercing damage.

1a845193-fa91-5867-95b1-13bd507464f0.name: Innate Spellcasting (Lava Keeper)
1a845193-fa91-5867-95b1-13bd507464f0.description:
The lava keeper’s innate spellcasting ability is Wisdom (spell save DC 17). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:
At will: move earth, stone shape
3/day each: wall of fire, wall of stone
1/day each: conjure elemental (earth or fire elemental only), earthquake, fire storm

1/day each: conjure elemental (earth or fire elemental only), earthquake, fire storm

d560ce7e-ec41-591a-9a8c-3bd0a922a179.name: Lava Dribble
d560ce7e-ec41-591a-9a8c-3bd0a922a179.description: Each creature that starts its turn within 5 feet of the lava keeper must make a DC 19 Dexterity saving throw, taking 7 (2d6) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

attributes.description: Each creature that starts its turn within 5 feet of the lava keeper must make a DC 19 Dexterity saving throw, taking 7 (2d6) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

1764dc4a-5350-5b81-900a-052a88416e7e.name: Fumarole
1764dc4a-5350-5b81-900a-052a88416e7e.description: The crater between the lava keeper's shoulders erupts in a plume of fire, rock, and toxic smoke. Each creature within 60 feet of the lava keeper must make a DC 19 Constitution saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 21 (6d6) bludgeoning damage and 21 (6d6) fire damage and becomes poisoned for 1 minute. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't poisoned. A poisoned target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. The eruption surrounds the lava keeper in a 20-foot-radius sphere of smoke, considered heavily obscured until the end of its next turn. A wind of moderate or greater speed (at least 10 miles per hour) disperses the smoke.

9ca5d000-629f-5967-9d74-7d13ef6f2e3c.name: Lava Lob
9ca5d000-629f-5967-9d74-7d13ef6f2e3c.description: Ranged Weapon Attack: +13 to hit, range 60/240 ft., one target. Hit: 21 (6d6) fire damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 19 Dexterity saving throw or take 10 (3d6) fire damage at the start of its next turn.

a0974d92-4e05-5b4a-9f47-ec8020e9b437.name: Multiattack (Lava Keeper)
a0974d92-4e05-5b4a-9f47-ec8020e9b437.description: The lava keeper makes four slam attacks. Alternatively, it can use its Lava Lob twice.

attributes.description: The lava keeper makes four slam attacks. Alternatively, it can use its Lava Lob twice.

5bf44c4e-299a-598e-8fad-f286132c4424.name: Slam (Lava Keeper)
5bf44c4e-299a-598e-8fad-f286132c4424.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +13 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 25 (4d8 + 7) bludgeoning damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +13 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 25 (4d8 + 7) bludgeoning damage.

2f909b31-da0e-5ff6-8096-a58c762a2ef6.name: Glowing Eye
2f909b31-da0e-5ff6-8096-a58c762a2ef6.description: As a bonus action, the lazavik makes its single eye shine with a brilliant golden light. Its eye sheds bright light in a line that is 90 feet long and 5 feet wide, or it sheds bright light in a 30-foot cone. Each creature in the area illuminated by the lazavik’s eye gains the lazavik’s Swamp Stride trait as long as it remains on the illuminated path. The lazavik can douse its light at any time (no action required).

f933c36d-6c9f-5122-a3d0-017778a9155a.name: Hold Breath (Lazavik)
f933c36d-6c9f-5122-a3d0-017778a9155a.description: The lazavik can hold its breath for 30 minutes.

attributes.description: The lazavik can hold its breath for 30 minutes.

1e3739a1-d378-50db-99cf-b46955a2e52b.name: Speak with Beasts (Lazavik)
1e3739a1-d378-50db-99cf-b46955a2e52b.description: The lazavik can communicate with beasts as if they shared a language.

attributes.description: The lazavik can communicate with beasts as if they shared a language.

08a2a122-c90a-5096-b07d-2589a8a7e6bb.name: Swamp Stride
08a2a122-c90a-5096-b07d-2589a8a7e6bb.description: Difficult terrain composed of mud, reeds, or other marshy terrain doesn’t cost the lazavik extra movement. In addition, it can pass through nonmagical hazards, such as quicksand, without being hindered by them and through nonmagical plants without taking damage from them, despite thorns, spines, or a similar hazard.

In addition, it can pass through nonmagical hazards, such as quicksand, without being hindered by them and through nonmagical plants without taking damage from them, despite thorns, spines, or a similar hazard.

81f3294e-5498-5787-9b50-b84e0d065e7c.name: Eye Flare
81f3294e-5498-5787-9b50-b84e0d065e7c.description: The lazavik's eye flares with blinding light in a 15-foot cone. Each creature in the area much make a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 10 (3d6) radiant damage and is blinded for 1 minute. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't blinded. The creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

593cd24c-c4a9-5312-934f-35d95290aa3f.name: Reed Whip
593cd24c-c4a9-5312-934f-35d95290aa3f.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (2d4 + 4) slashing damage.

b44b3f43-e2e3-5438-92ca-1f79c77abe4b.name: Blood Frenzy (Leech Swarm)
b44b3f43-e2e3-5438-92ca-1f79c77abe4b.description: The leech swarm has advantage on melee attack rolls against any creature that doesn’t have all its hp.

attributes.description: The leech swarm has advantage on melee attack rolls against any creature that doesn’t have all its hp.

43b017ea-8e0f-5586-8a4a-cb956acdcf88.name: Blood Sense (Leech Swarm)
43b017ea-8e0f-5586-8a4a-cb956acdcf88.description: The leech swarm can pinpoint, by scent, the location of creatures that aren’t undead or constructs within 30 feet of it.

attributes.description: The leech swarm can pinpoint, by scent, the location of creatures that aren’t undead or constructs within 30 feet of it.

56ec6767-1a20-5dcd-bd5a-6a0da3caae32.name: Swarm (Leech Swarm)
56ec6767-1a20-5dcd-bd5a-6a0da3caae32.description: The leech swarm can occupy another creature’s space and vice versa, and the swarm can move through any opening large enough for a Tiny leech. The swarm can’t regain hp or gain temporary hp.

attributes.description: The leech swarm can occupy another creature’s space and vice versa, and the swarm can move through any opening large enough for a Tiny leech. The swarm can’t regain hp or gain temporary hp.

f73ef19d-0311-5bf9-9372-30d30acdcea4.name: Bites (Leech Swarm)
f73ef19d-0311-5bf9-9372-30d30acdcea4.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 0 ft., one creature in the swarm's space. Hit: 14 (4d6) piercing damage, or 7 (2d6) piercing damage if the swarm has half its hp or fewer. If the target is a creature other than a construct or an undead, it must succeed on a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw or lose 2 (1d4) hp at the start of each of its turns as leeches attach to it and drain its blood. Any creature can take an action to find and remove the leeches with a successful DC 13 Wisdom (Perception) check. The leeches also detach if the target takes fire damage.

4a96ee36-d45c-5ef2-9809-058b34b6aa1f.name: Light Sensitivity
4a96ee36-d45c-5ef2-9809-058b34b6aa1f.description: While in bright light, the lunarchidna has disadvantage on attack rolls, as well as on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight.

f1b64abe-5c23-5e0b-a53c-5605953baeac.name: Shadow Stealth (Lesser Lunarchidna)
f1b64abe-5c23-5e0b-a53c-5605953baeac.description: While in dim light or darkness, the lunarchidna can take the Hide action as a bonus action.

attributes.description: While in dim light or darkness, the lunarchidna can take the Hide action as a bonus action.

091f3ed3-7134-5561-9f45-774b2b2391d3.name: Bite (Lesser Lunarchidna)
091f3ed3-7134-5561-9f45-774b2b2391d3.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) necrotic damage. The target must succeed on a DC 12 Constitution saving throw or its hp maximum is reduced by an amount equal to the damage taken. This reduction lasts until the target finishes a long rest. The target dies if this effect reduces its hp maximum to 0.

cbf515e7-3ee8-5911-9f5e-94af282866eb.name: Multiattack (Lesser Lunarchidna)
cbf515e7-3ee8-5911-9f5e-94af282866eb.description: The lunarchidna makes one bite attack and two claw attacks.

attributes.description: The lunarchidna makes one bite attack and two claw attacks.

e6dd11e6-13d5-5175-8a83-f2cf86a551e0.name: Innate Spellcasting (Light Drake)
e6dd11e6-13d5-5175-8a83-f2cf86a551e0.description:
The light drake’s innate spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 12, +4 to hit with spell attacks). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:
At will: dancing lights, light, guiding star, starburst
3/day each: color spray, faerie fire

3/day each: color spray, faerie fire

8aff96f8-0f80-5497-a350-e0d71b124a69.name: Reflective Scales
8aff96f8-0f80-5497-a350-e0d71b124a69.description: When a light drake is within 5 feet of a source of light, that source of light sheds bright light and dim light for an additional 10 feet. While the light drake wears or carries an object that sheds light from the daylight spell, the light within 10 feet of the drake is sunlight.

3d2a017d-afeb-5e83-91a1-70e9fc283385.name: Breath Weapon (Light Drake)
3d2a017d-afeb-5e83-91a1-70e9fc283385.description: A light drake can breathe a 30-foot line of brilliant white light. Each creature in that line must make a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 5 (2d4) radiant damage and is blinded for 1 minute. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't blinded. A blinded creature can make a DC 13 Constitution saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

20ef7f1e-86d2-5445-9df3-d0373a26da6b.name: Incorporeal Movement (Liminal Drake)
20ef7f1e-86d2-5445-9df3-d0373a26da6b.description: The drake can move through other creatures and objects as if they were difficult terrain. It takes 5 (1d10) force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.

attributes.description: The drake can move through other creatures and objects as if they were difficult terrain. It takes 5 (1d10) force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.

fe1b7022-7160-58df-aee9-4b37134d1f1b.name: Nauseating Luminance
fe1b7022-7160-58df-aee9-4b37134d1f1b.description:
When a creature that can see the drake starts its turn within 60 feet of the drake, the drake can force it to make a DC 16 Constitution saving throw if the drake isn’t incapacitated and can see the creature. On a failed save, the creature is incapacitated until the start of its next turn.

Unless surprised, a creature can avert its eyes to avoid the saving throw at the start of its turn. If it does so, it can’t see the drake until the start of its next turn, when it can avert its eyes again. If the creature looks at the drake in the meantime, it must immediately make the save.

e2a81272-aefe-52c3-8109-b7a92b24ffe1.name: Void Dweller
e2a81272-aefe-52c3-8109-b7a92b24ffe1.description: When traveling through the void between stars, the liminal drake magically glides on solar winds, making the immense journey in an impossibly short time.

attributes.description: When traveling through the void between stars, the liminal drake magically glides on solar winds, making the immense journey in an impossibly short time.

c8f254f8-0320-553c-849d-2afad970880c.name: Bite (Liminal Drake)
c8f254f8-0320-553c-849d-2afad970880c.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +12 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 14 (2d10 + 3) piercing damage plus 18 (4d8) cold damage.

c54b7cc7-6182-59de-ba61-3f11ccf7511a.name: Claw (Liminal Drake)
c54b7cc7-6182-59de-ba61-3f11ccf7511a.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +12 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) slashing damage plus 9 (2d8) cold damage.

4c022f58-38e3-5354-83ab-9c677c126456.name: Multiattack (Liminal Drake)
4c022f58-38e3-5354-83ab-9c677c126456.description: The liminal drake makes three attacks: one with its bite and two with its claws.

attributes.description: The liminal drake makes three attacks: one with its bite and two with its claws.

a51e613a-c39d-5d2f-9bec-c5d4cd90c06f.name: Stellar Breath
a51e613a-c39d-5d2f-9bec-c5d4cd90c06f.description: The drake exhales star fire in a 30-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 17 Dexterity saving throw, taking 18 (4d8) fire damage and 18 (4d8) radiant damage on a failed save, and half as much damage on a successful one.

9d0512e9-af27-57ad-a7cd-4178f71965b9.name: Warp Space
9d0512e9-af27-57ad-a7cd-4178f71965b9.description: The liminal drake can fold in on itself to travel to a different plane. This works like the plane shift spell, except the drake can only affect itself, not other creatures, and it can't use the effect to banish an unwilling creature to another plane.

1bf8a3d6-ad93-5109-85c5-92d14575b899.name: Expert Lockpicker
1bf8a3d6-ad93-5109-85c5-92d14575b899.description: The locksmith can use any piece of its mechanical body to pick locks and disarm traps, as if its entire body was made up of several sets of thieves’ tools. It is proficient in using pieces of itself in this way. In addition, the locksmith has advantage on ability checks to pick locks and disarm traps.

4f17d807-c241-505b-8ad0-20a328f78609.name: Innate Spellcasting (Locksmith)
4f17d807-c241-505b-8ad0-20a328f78609.description:
The locksmith’s innate spellcasting ability is Intelligence (spell save DC 15). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:
At will: mending
3/day each: arcane lock, knock
1/day: forcecage

d562a708-fd4c-5c9e-ad66-2a7047793b05.description: The locksmith emits a cloud of rust in a 60-foot cone. Each creature in that area must succeed on a DC 16 Dexterity saving throw, taking 35 (10d6) acid damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

df779813-f7ef-5488-8600-e3fb4fb74cd6.name: Multiattack (Locksmith)
df779813-f7ef-5488-8600-e3fb4fb74cd6.description: The locksmith makes two key blade attacks.

f0e43841-64a1-5481-a53a-625d8e5300fa.name: Leech Luck
f0e43841-64a1-5481-a53a-625d8e5300fa.description: If a creature within 60 feet of the luck leech rolls a 20 on an ability check, attack roll, or saving throw, the luck leech gains 1 luck point. It can’t have more than 4 luck points at a time.

attributes.description: If a creature within 60 feet of the luck leech rolls a 20 on an ability check, attack roll, or saving throw, the luck leech gains 1 luck point. It can’t have more than 4 luck points at a time.

e4b56bd5-8bcf-5a84-9467-aca5ac1de20c.name: Reserve of Fortune
e4b56bd5-8bcf-5a84-9467-aca5ac1de20c.description: If the luck leech doesn’t have 4 luck points at sunset, it gains 2 luck points. It can’t have more than 4 luck points at a time. In addition, if the luck leech rolls a 1 on the d20 for an attack roll, ability check, or saving throw while it has at least 1 luck point, it can reroll the die and must use the new roll. This trait doesn’t expend luck points.

In addition, if the luck leech rolls a 1 on the d20 for an attack roll, ability check, or saving throw while it has at least 1 luck point, it can reroll the die and must use the new roll. This trait doesn’t expend luck points.

b63a1be8-0c10-5a2d-b13c-da49f3176223.name: Turn Luck
b63a1be8-0c10-5a2d-b13c-da49f3176223.description:
As a bonus action, the luck leech can spend 1 luck point to: 
* Gain advantage on its next attack or saving throw 
* Cast misty step
* Increase the necrotic damage of its next successful biting arms attack by an extra 9 (2d8) 
* Force each creature that is concentrating on a spell within 60 feet of it to make a DC 16 Constitution saving throw, losing its concentration on the spell on a failure.

0bb920f2-e1fe-5dc1-81c5-0c7e8fff3dae.name: Biting Arms

06c20684-a73f-5d8a-97f6-ae3cc2d06213.name: Feast of Fortune
06c20684-a73f-5d8a-97f6-ae3cc2d06213.description: Each creature the luck leech can see within 30 feet of it must make a DC 16 Charisma saving throw. On a failure, the creature takes 27 (6d8) psychic damage, becomes blinded until the end of its next turn, and is cursed with falling fortunes. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't blinded or cursed. For each creature that fails this saving throw, the luck leech gains 1 luck point.

ccdd885f-f6b5-5214-bd0b-fdc4773925eb.name: Descendant of The Moon
ccdd885f-f6b5-5214-bd0b-fdc4773925eb.description: Magical light created by the lunarian can’t be extinguished.

attributes.description: Magical light created by the lunarian can’t be extinguished.

c451f18f-ffbb-5d68-8267-f61f687def30.name: Major Surface Curse
c451f18f-ffbb-5d68-8267-f61f687def30.description: A lunarian can never be in the presence of natural light. It takes 9 (2d8) radiant damage at the beginning of its turn if it is exposed to direct moonlight or sunlight. If this damage reduces the lunarian to 0 hp, it dies and turns to moondust.

ba95b821-aebf-57a9-a4f2-0b3fa6a66fed.name: Moon-Touched Weapons
ba95b821-aebf-57a9-a4f2-0b3fa6a66fed.description: The lunarian’s weapon attacks are magical. When the lunarian hits with any weapon, the weapon deals an extra 4 (1d8) radiant damage (included in the attack). A creature that takes radiant damage from a lunarian’s weapon sheds dim light in a 10-foot radius for 1 hour.

f1656941-f4dc-56ff-8af7-a150719e7dca.name: Summon Shadowbeam (Recharge 6)
f1656941-f4dc-56ff-8af7-a150719e7dca.description: As a bonus action, the lunarian summons a beam of pale light, shot through with undulating waves of shadow, centered on a point it can see within 60 feet of it. The beam is a 10-foot-radius, 40-foot-high cylinder and lasts for 1 minute. As a bonus action on each of its turns, the lunarian can move the beam up to 20 feet in any direction. A creature that enters or starts its turn in the beam must make a DC 13 Constitution saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 11 (2d10) necrotic damage and is cursed with the minor surface curse. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn’t cursed.

64b65359-decb-5d60-8145-6254fe61ef80.name: Distracting Swoop
64b65359-decb-5d60-8145-6254fe61ef80.description: If the lymarien moves at least 20 feet straight toward a creature and then hits it with a claw attack on the same turn, that target must succeed on a DC 11 Wisdom saving throw or be distracted until the end of its next turn. A distracted creature has disadvantage on its next attack roll or ability check.

088ee6f4-50a0-5108-a719-8417b53b973a.description: The lymarien can communicate with beasts as if they shared a language.

3eb8d1bb-5408-53a5-b075-40753b1a1afe.name: Swarm (Lymarien Swarm)
3eb8d1bb-5408-53a5-b075-40753b1a1afe.description: The swarm can occupy another creature’s space and vice versa, and the swarm can move through any opening large enough for a Tiny lymarien. The swarm can’t regain hp or gain temporary hp.

attributes.description: The swarm can occupy another creature’s space and vice versa, and the swarm can move through any opening large enough for a Tiny lymarien. The swarm can’t regain hp or gain temporary hp.

e5a4fbbe-2cd1-5875-a12d-16e9145487c8.name: Claws (Lymarien Swarm)
e5a4fbbe-2cd1-5875-a12d-16e9145487c8.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 0 ft., one creature in the swarm's space. Hit: 21 (6d6) slashing damage, or 10 (3d6) slashing damage if the swarm has half its hp or fewer.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 0 ft., one creature in the swarm's space. Hit: 21 (6d6) slashing damage, or 10 (3d6) slashing damage if the swarm has half its hp or fewer.

bbf64785-a101-508c-8599-31d4bd3eca2f.name: Flight of the Fey
bbf64785-a101-508c-8599-31d4bd3eca2f.description: The lymarien swarm lifts a Large or smaller creature in its space. The target must succeed on a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw or be lifted directly upward to a height up to the swarm's flying speed. When the swarm moves, the lifted creature moves with it. At the end of the swarm's turn, the swarm drops the creature, which takes falling damage as normal.

At the end of the swarm's turn, the swarm drops the creature, which takes falling damage as normal.

f31a181d-b730-50e0-bf2f-d9e37d803b1d.name: Inspire
f31a181d-b730-50e0-bf2f-d9e37d803b1d.description: As a bonus action, the mad piper can play a tune that inspires a friendly creature it can see within 30 feet of it. If the target can hear the mad piper, it has advantage on its next ability check, attack roll, or saving throw.

attributes.description: As a bonus action, the mad piper can play a tune that inspires a friendly creature it can see within 30 feet of it. If the target can hear the mad piper, it has advantage on its next ability check, attack roll, or saving throw.

cfc494ab-4e5e-59f2-b8ed-7f3f5ebe905d.name: Screaming Flail
cfc494ab-4e5e-59f2-b8ed-7f3f5ebe905d.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) bludgeoning damage plus 2 (1d4) thunder damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) bludgeoning damage plus 2 (1d4) thunder damage.

70b0c0b5-87df-5e1c-98fd-fb31adb036e9.name: Terrible Dirge
70b0c0b5-87df-5e1c-98fd-fb31adb036e9.description: The mad piper plays a haunting dirge. Each creature of the mad piper's choice that is within 30 feet of the piper and can hear the dirge must succeed o a DC 13 Wisdom saving throw or become frightened for 1 minute. A creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. If a creature's saving throw is successful or the effect ends for it, the creature is immune to the mad piper's Terrible Dirge for the next 24 hours.

51afc0be-3685-55f3-a999-0d890a0533d3.name: Lava Bound
51afc0be-3685-55f3-a999-0d890a0533d3.description: The magma octopus can exist outside of lava for up to 1 hour each day. If it remains outside of lava for 1 minute or longer, its skin begins to dry and harden like rapidly-cooled magma. While its skin is hardened, it has a walking speed of 20 feet, an Armor Class of 18, and vulnerability to cold damage. If it remains outside of lava for 1 hour or longer, it becomes petrified, transforming into basalt. Its body returns to normal if it is submerged in lava for 1 round.

1de7930b-21cb-509b-992d-268a81c3c934.name: Lava Swimmer
1de7930b-21cb-509b-992d-268a81c3c934.description: While in lava, the magma octopus has a swimming speed of 60 feet and can move through the lava as if it were water.

attributes.description: While in lava, the magma octopus has a swimming speed of 60 feet and can move through the lava as if it were water.

3a6b4205-b1bd-50b8-aa0f-28bfdde66bc6.name: Magma Blast
3a6b4205-b1bd-50b8-aa0f-28bfdde66bc6.description: The magma octopus sprays magma in a 30-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 16 Dexterity saving throw, taking 28 (8d6) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. If a creature fails the saving throw by 5 or more, it catches fire. Until someone takes an action to douse the fire, the creature takes 5 (1d10) fire damage at the start of each of its turns.

2c7b7596-21cb-5f40-86ec-cd0bb4721a7d.name: Multiattack (Magma Octopus)
2c7b7596-21cb-5f40-86ec-cd0bb4721a7d.description: The magma octopus makes four attacks with its tentacles.

attributes.description: The magma octopus makes four attacks with its tentacles.

f49591aa-226d-5cea-8d11-de6954e28502.name: Tentacle (Magma Octopus)
f49591aa-226d-5cea-8d11-de6954e28502.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 15 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d6 + 5) bludgeoning damage plus 2 (1d4) fire damage. If the target is a creature, it is grappled (escape DC 16). Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained, and it takes 2 (1d4) fire damage at the start of each of its turns. The magma octopus can grapple up to two targets at a time.

6dbb617d-a90e-580d-bd15-62e2edf2b63c.name: Controlled Polarity
6dbb617d-a90e-580d-bd15-62e2edf2b63c.description: The magnetic elemental has advantage on attack rolls against a creature if the creature is wearing metal armor. A creature attacking the magnetic elemental with a metal weapon while within 10 feet of it has disadvantage on the attack roll.

attributes.description: The magnetic elemental has advantage on attack rolls against a creature if the creature is wearing metal armor. A creature attacking the magnetic elemental with a metal weapon while within 10 feet of it has disadvantage on the attack roll.

bd8c89dd-3cfa-5594-983e-0483f77a8afd.name: Magnetism
bd8c89dd-3cfa-5594-983e-0483f77a8afd.description: When the magnetic elemental moves, Medium and smaller metal objects that aren’t being worn or carried are pulled up to 5 feet closer to the magnetic elemental. If this movement pulls the object into the elemental’s space, the item sticks to the elemental. A successful DC 15 Strength check removes a stuck item from the elemental. Objects made of gold and silver are unaffected by this trait.

attributes.description: When the magnetic elemental moves, Medium and smaller metal objects that aren’t being worn or carried are pulled up to 5 feet closer to the magnetic elemental. If this movement pulls the object into the elemental’s space, the item sticks to the elemental. A successful DC 15 Strength check removes a stuck item from the elemental. Objects made of gold and silver are unaffected by this trait.

24512671-3d30-50bd-ad1d-5b4fc2e36e0e.name: Magnetic Pulse
24512671-3d30-50bd-ad1d-5b4fc2e36e0e.description:
The magnetic elemental releases a magnetic pulse, choosing to pull or push nearby metal objects. Objects made of gold or silver are unaffected by the elemental's Pulse. 
* Pull. Each creature that is wearing metal armor or holding a metal weapon within 5 feet of the magnetic elemental must succeed on a DC 15 Strength saving throw or the metal items worn or carried by it stick to the magnetic elemental. A creature that is made of metal or is wearing metal armor and that fails the saving throw is stuck to the elemental and grappled (escape DC 15). If the item is a weapon and the wielder can't or won't let go of the weapon, the wielder is stuck to the elemental and grappled (escape DC 15). A stuck object can't be used. Grappled and stuck creatures and objects move with the elemental when it moves. A creature can take its action to remove one creature or object from the elemental by succeeding on a DC 15 Strength check. The magnetic elemental's Armor Class increases by 1 for each creature grappled in this way. 
* Push. Each creature that is wearing metal armor or holding a metal weapon within 10 feet of the elemental must make a DC 15 Strength saving throw. On a failure, a target takes 21 (6d6) force damage and is pushed up to 10 feet away from the elemental. On a success, a target takes half the damage and isn't pushed. A creature grappled by the elemental has disadvantage on this saving throw.

14c08424-b2d7-5efe-a192-f59faa6a8a99.name: Multiattack (Magnetic Elemental)
14c08424-b2d7-5efe-a192-f59faa6a8a99.description: The magnetic elemental makes two slam attacks.

attributes.description: The magnetic elemental makes two slam attacks.

2e46e99c-549f-5b0a-8877-5180e5cf5f1c.name: Absorb Malleable
2e46e99c-549f-5b0a-8877-5180e5cf5f1c.description: As a bonus action, the major malleable absorbs one minor or moderate malleable within 5 feet of it into its body, regaining a number of hp equal to the absorbed malleable’s remaining hp. The major malleable is affected by any conditions, spells, and other magical effects that were affecting the absorbed malleable.

The major malleable is affected by any conditions, spells, and other magical effects that were affecting the absorbed malleable.

bbf93df9-768f-5ccf-8d95-dd1a5d50a223.name: Amorphous (Major Malleable)
bbf93df9-768f-5ccf-8d95-dd1a5d50a223.description: The malleable can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing.

attributes.description: The malleable can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing.

135a0d3c-3ec7-5e9f-bb5b-8c22eb2fbba9.name: Controlled Mutability
135a0d3c-3ec7-5e9f-bb5b-8c22eb2fbba9.description: Any spell or effect that would alter the malleable’s form only alters it until the end of the malleable’s next turn. Afterwards, the malleable returns to its amorphous form. In addition, the malleable can use its action to change itself into any shape, but it always looks like an inside-out fleshy creature no matter the shape it takes. If it changes into the shape of a creature, it doesn’t gain any statistics or special abilities of that creature; it only takes on the creature’s basic shape and general appearance.

6d3ca383-684b-5088-9d1a-b5516871917b.name: Psychic Absorption
6d3ca383-684b-5088-9d1a-b5516871917b.description: Whenever the malleable is subjected to psychic damage, it takes no damage and instead regains a number of hp equal to the psychic damage dealt.

attributes.description: Whenever the malleable is subjected to psychic damage, it takes no damage and instead regains a number of hp equal to the psychic damage dealt.

792a921d-14d6-5c7b-8ee4-3848e7f5f78e.name: Spider Climb (Major Malleable)
792a921d-14d6-5c7b-8ee4-3848e7f5f78e.description: The malleable can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

attributes.description: The malleable can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

3c3b2352-7131-5589-9e08-8b5d2a7c1c59.name: Flesh Tendril
3c3b2352-7131-5589-9e08-8b5d2a7c1c59.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 20 (4d6 + 6) bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Huge or smaller creature, it is grappled (escape DC 16).

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 20 (4d6 + 6) bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Huge or smaller creature, it is grappled (escape DC 16).

3e45784e-c5d3-54b5-b124-10aa4e4426f4.name: Join Malleables
3e45784e-c5d3-54b5-b124-10aa4e4426f4.description: As long as the malleable is within 10 feet of one other major malleable, both malleables can use this action option at the same time to join together to create a massive malleable. The new malleable's hp total is equal to the combined hp total of both major malleables, and it is affected by any conditions, spells, and other magical effects currently affecting either of the major malleables. The new malleable acts on the same initiative count as the malleables that formed it and occupies any unoccupied space that previously contained at least one of the malleables that formed it.

8476ec31-7afe-5d92-9d28-0ec4c7fe9ed9.name: Multiattack (Major Malleable)
8476ec31-7afe-5d92-9d28-0ec4c7fe9ed9.description: The malleable makes three flesh tendril attacks.

attributes.description: The malleable makes three flesh tendril attacks.

793eb5cf-fc10-5c9d-934b-c7cf30f6e3e4.name: Psychic Drain
793eb5cf-fc10-5c9d-934b-c7cf30f6e3e4.description: One creature grappled by the malleable must make a DC 16 Intelligence saving throw, taking 45 (10d8) psychic damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. The target's hp maximum is reduced by an amount equal to the damage taken. This reduction lasts until the target finishes a long rest. The target dies and becomes a minor malleable if this effect reduces its hp maximum to 0.

The target dies and becomes a minor malleable if this effect reduces its hp maximum to 0.

154a9764-fa3d-504e-9652-fe4d619c7331.name: Separate Malleables
154a9764-fa3d-504e-9652-fe4d619c7331.description: The major malleable can split into eight minor malleables or two moderate malleables. The new malleables' hp totals are equal to the major malleable's hp total divided by the number of malleables created (rounded down) and are affected by any conditions, spells, and other magical effects that affected the major malleable. The new malleables act on the same initiative count as the major malleable and occupy any unoccupied space that previously contained the major malleable.

0d80956d-477d-5a74-8a91-e63cc477ac66.name: Sudden Separation
0d80956d-477d-5a74-8a91-e63cc477ac66.description: When the major malleable takes 20 damage or more from a single attack, it can choose to immediately use Separate Malleables. If it does so, the damage is divided evenly among the separate malleables it becomes.

attributes.description: When the major malleable takes 20 damage or more from a single attack, it can choose to immediately use Separate Malleables. If it does so, the damage is divided evenly among the separate malleables it becomes.

594e1251-7d8a-55b7-914e-9db1134dadd6.name: Roaring Transformation
594e1251-7d8a-55b7-914e-9db1134dadd6.description: When the manggus changes from its true form into its hydra form, it unleashes a mighty roar. Each creature within 30 feet of it and that can hear the roar must succeed on a DC 15 Wisdom saving throw or be frightened until the end of its next turn. If the target fails the saving throw by 5 or more, it is also paralyzed until the end of its next turn. If a creature’s saving throw is successful, it is immune to the Roaring Transformation of all manggus for the next 24 hours.

ad5ddbb8-9aee-5bac-a146-13d2d14955db.name: Shapechanger (Manggus)
ad5ddbb8-9aee-5bac-a146-13d2d14955db.description: The manggus can use its action to polymorph into a Large, three-headed hydra, or back into its true form. Its statistics, other than its size, are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn’t transformed. The manggus reverts to its true form if it dies.

attributes.description: The manggus can use its action to polymorph into a Large, three-headed hydra, or back into its true form. Its statistics, other than its size, are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn’t transformed. The manggus reverts to its true form if it dies.

d44305eb-354b-5878-9ee7-0093ec141c92.name: Three-Headed (Hydra Form Only)
d44305eb-354b-5878-9ee7-0093ec141c92.description:
The manggus has three heads. While it has more than one head, the manggus has advantage on saving throws against being blinded, charmed, deafened, frightened, stunned, and knocked unconscious.

Whenever the manggus takes 15 or more damage in a single turn, one of its heads dies. If all its heads die and the manggus still lives, the manggus immediately reverts to its true form and can’t change into its hydra form again until it finishes a long rest.

At the end of its turn, the manggus regrows two heads for each of its heads that died since its last turn, unless it has taken fire damage since its last turn. The manggus regains 5 hp for each head regrown in this way.

d83b5f69-bf16-5fad-9ab8-f78a15af8ed8.name: Bite (Manggus)
d83b5f69-bf16-5fad-9ab8-f78a15af8ed8.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (1d10 + 4) piercing damage.

ad749e53-6947-548e-8e3c-1ed506a66257.name: Greataxe (Manggus)
ad749e53-6947-548e-8e3c-1ed506a66257.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 17 (2d12 + 4) slashing damage.

ec1da667-c75d-5d5c-a22e-c8af7a20266a.name: Multiattack (Manggus)
ec1da667-c75d-5d5c-a22e-c8af7a20266a.description: In hydra form, the manggus makes as many bite attacks as it has heads. In giant form, it makes two greataxe attacks.

64f35606-76e3-560f-b42b-74383e75743f.name: False Appearance (Mangrove Treant)
64f35606-76e3-560f-b42b-74383e75743f.description: While the mangrove treant remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from an ordinary mangrove tree.

attributes.description: While the mangrove treant remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from an ordinary mangrove tree.

ca4e7c6a-09a6-5c8c-adc6-13351347d8bf.name: Grasping Roots
ca4e7c6a-09a6-5c8c-adc6-13351347d8bf.description: The treant has advantage on Strength and Dexterity saving throws made against effects that would knock it prone.

attributes.description: The treant has advantage on Strength and Dexterity saving throws made against effects that would knock it prone.

280b5c98-dc45-5bac-b5e3-0ced0ac887b4.name: Siege Monster (Mangrove Treant)
280b5c98-dc45-5bac-b5e3-0ced0ac887b4.description: The mangrove treant deals double damage to objects and structures.

attributes.description: The mangrove treant deals double damage to objects and structures.

bb559c14-0696-5481-9b4b-94624808bd19.name: Tiny Spies
bb559c14-0696-5481-9b4b-94624808bd19.description: The mangrove treant can communicate with mosquitos as if they shared a language. The mosquitos alert the treant to the presence of intruders, and the treant has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks to notice creatures within 60 feet of it.

attributes.description: The mangrove treant can communicate with mosquitos as if they shared a language. The mosquitos alert the treant to the presence of intruders, and the treant has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks to notice creatures within 60 feet of it.

2931cefb-e61a-53f2-a409-b8a2c5b9864f.name: Mangrove Mosquitos
2931cefb-e61a-53f2-a409-b8a2c5b9864f.description:
The mangrove treant calls a swarm of mosquitos from its branches. The swarm of mosquitos uses the statistics of a swarm of insects, except it has a flying speed of 30 feet. The swarm acts an ally of the treant and obeys its spoken commands. The swarm remains for 1 day, until the treant dies, or until the treant dismisses it as a bonus action.

The treant can have only one swarm of mosquitos at a time. If it calls another, the previous swarm disperses.

be7eb45c-4d78-5b26-91aa-a60651db894b.name: Multiattack (Mangrove Treant)
be7eb45c-4d78-5b26-91aa-a60651db894b.description: The mangrove treant makes two slam attacks.

23dbab0b-831f-5728-a3e2-9f7c7941ee6c.name: Slam (Mangrove Treant)
23dbab0b-831f-5728-a3e2-9f7c7941ee6c.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 18 (3d8 + 5) bludgeoning damage.

5d06dd4d-e024-541f-b7a4-a1b7bd3175f6.name: Innate Spellcasting (Mari Lwyd)
5d06dd4d-e024-541f-b7a4-a1b7bd3175f6.description:
The mari lwyd’s innate spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 12, +4 to hit with spell attacks). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:
At will: chill touch, mage hand
3/day each: animate dead, hideous laughter, suggestion

7bbb69fa-f6ac-577f-b2d1-8e91b9b61d83.name: Turn Resistance (Mari Lwyd)
7bbb69fa-f6ac-577f-b2d1-8e91b9b61d83.description: The mari lwyd has advantage on saving throws against any effect that turns undead.

974e2ce3-edb7-5fc9-b57e-e45a645871d3.name: Turned by Rhyme
974e2ce3-edb7-5fc9-b57e-e45a645871d3.description: A creature can use its action to formally challenge the mari lwyd to a duel of rhymes. If no creature attacks the mari lwyd until the beginning of its next turn, it uses its action to recite a rhyme. The challenger must respond to the rhyme and succeed on a DC 14 Charisma (Performance) check. On a success, the mari lwyd is treated as if it is turned for 1 minute or until it takes damage.

70dcbba3-8e99-510d-af16-edcb1699f20d.name: Cloying Stench
70dcbba3-8e99-510d-af16-edcb1699f20d.description: Any creature that starts its turn within 10 feet of the marsh dire must succeed on a DC 16 Constitution saving throw or be poisoned until the end of its next turn. On a successful saving throw, the creature has advantage on saving throws against the marsh dire’s Cloying Stench for the next 24 hours.

6cbdf9e3-797f-5a3d-99db-d3a3c8bcf51f.name: Strangling Vine
6cbdf9e3-797f-5a3d-99db-d3a3c8bcf51f.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 10 ft., one creature. Hit: 13 (2d8 + 4) bludgeoning damage plus 7 (2d6) necrotic damage. If the target is Medium or smaller, it is grappled (escape DC 15). Until this grapple ends, the target can't breathe, speak, or cast spells with verbal components; is restrained; and takes 7 (2d6) necrotic damage at the start of each of the marsh dire's turns. The marsh dire has three vines, each of which can grapple only one target.

d9a0dbf6-8b78-531b-b758-ef4748157534.name: Absorb Malleable (Massive Malleable)
d9a0dbf6-8b78-531b-b758-ef4748157534.description: As a bonus action, the massive malleable absorbs one minor, moderate, or major malleable within 5 feet of it into its body, regaining a number of hp equal to the absorbed malleable’s remaining hp. The massive malleable is affected by any conditions, spells, and other magical effects that were affecting the absorbed malleable.

1e0dfff7-2510-52ee-8d3a-bfea06f23034.description: One creature grappled by the malleable must make a DC 18 Intelligence saving throw, taking 72 (16d8) psychic damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. The target's hp maximum is reduced by an amount equal to the damage taken. This reduction lasts until the target finishes a long rest. The target dies and becomes a minor malleable if this effect reduces its hp maximum to 0.

55ef9d07-3f38-5d53-bddd-20a6591f3a60.name: Separate Malleables (Massive Malleable)
55ef9d07-3f38-5d53-bddd-20a6591f3a60.description: The massive malleable can split into sixteen minor malleables, four moderate malleables, or two major malleables. The new malleables' hp totals are equal to the massive malleable's hp total divided by the number of malleables created (rounded down) and are affected by any conditions, spells, and other magical effects that affected the massive malleable. The new malleables act on the same initiative count as the massive malleable and occupy any unoccupied space that previously contained the massive malleable.

8914c693-562f-5e68-afd3-15d89bcfb99c.name: Sudden Separation (Massive Malleable)
8914c693-562f-5e68-afd3-15d89bcfb99c.description: When the massive malleable takes 30 damage or more from a single attack, it can choose to immediately use Separate Malleables. If it does so, the damage is divided evenly among the separate malleables it becomes.

bb69db49-8df8-53d9-8fec-d06c3d8e5e99.name: Create Potion of Healing
bb69db49-8df8-53d9-8fec-d06c3d8e5e99.description: The mead archon touches a container containing 1 pint of alcohol and turns it into a potion of healing. If the potion is not consumed within 24 hours, it reverts back to its original form.

fd74c1ba-ead1-51b3-ad6f-27a82268cd2c.name: Divine Guzzle
fd74c1ba-ead1-51b3-ad6f-27a82268cd2c.description:
The mead archon drinks a pint of alcohol and chooses one of the following effects: 
* The archon belches fire in a 15-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw, taking 14 (4d6) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. 
* The archon has advantage on attack rolls and saving throws until the end of its next turn. 
* The archon regains 10 hit points.

If a creature poisoned this way takes damage, it can repeat the saving throw, ending the condition on a success.

ef933844-06f4-5f6f-a13b-f6c23a66cde6.name: Trampling Charge (Mei Jiao Shou)
ef933844-06f4-5f6f-a13b-f6c23a66cde6.description: If the mei jiao shou moves at least 20 feet straight toward a creature and then hits it with a head bash attack on the same turn, that target must succeed on a DC 16 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone. If the target is prone, the mei jiao shou can make one stomp attack against it as a bonus action.

88385a0a-6e73-5872-a1f1-f368d3e968df.name: Earth-Shaking Thump
88385a0a-6e73-5872-a1f1-f368d3e968df.description: The mei jiao shou rears up and lands heavily, kicking up a shower of debris and rattling and cracking the ground. Each creature in contact with the ground within 30 feet of the mei jiao shou must make a DC 16 Dexterity saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 22 (4d10) bludgeoning damage and is knocked prone. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't knocked prone. The area then becomes difficult terrain.

a2de42c6-88cd-53c4-ab4a-4d9903f2c065.name: False Appearance (Mineral Ooze)
a2de42c6-88cd-53c4-ab4a-4d9903f2c065.description: While the ooze remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from an oily pool or wet rock.

attributes.description: While the ooze remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from an oily pool or wet rock.

8516617f-9f02-54cf-8638-f0d24d2d097a.name: Mineralize
8516617f-9f02-54cf-8638-f0d24d2d097a.description: As a bonus action when it has encased a creature, the ooze hardens the minerals in its body, turning the surface of its body into a stone-like material. While mineralized, the ooze has a walking speed of 5 feet, and it has resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage. The ooze remains mineralized until the creature it has encased dies, or until the ooze takes a bonus action to end it.

The ooze remains mineralized until the creature it has encased dies, or until the ooze takes a bonus action to end it.

f45b4f0d-005a-5687-96f8-3693629b9014.name: Encase
f45b4f0d-005a-5687-96f8-3693629b9014.description: The mineral ooze encases a Medium or smaller creature grappled by it. The encased target is blinded, restrained, and unable to breathe, and it must succeed on a DC 14 Constitution saving throw at the start of each of the ooze's turns or take 7 (2d6) acid damage. If the ooze moves, the encased target moves with it. The ooze can have only one creature encased at a time. An encased creature can try to escape by taking an action to make a DC 12 Strength check. The creature has disadvantage on this check if the ooze is mineralized. On a success, the creature escapes and enters a space of its choice within 5 feet of the ooze. Alternatively, a creature within 5 feet of the ooze can take an action to pull a creature out of the ooze. Doing so requires a successful DC 12 Strength check, and the creature making the attempt takes 7 (2d6) acid damage. The creature making the attempt has disadvantage on the check if the ooze is mineralized.

70773c1b-3f77-51ee-88aa-7fda4649aefc.description: The mineral ooze makes two slam attacks. If both attacks hit a Medium or smaller target, the target is grappled (escape DC 12), and the ooze uses its Encase on the target.

4b59a3fe-c189-50e5-bcbd-ad52b64cd493.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it is grappled (escape DC 12).

2dcc57e5-c624-5a82-ba0e-3269c4351c6b.name: Join Malleables (Minor Malleable)
2dcc57e5-c624-5a82-ba0e-3269c4351c6b.description:
As long as the malleable is within 10 feet of at least three other minor malleables, each minor malleable in range can use this action option at the same time to join together and create a larger malleable. The new malleable's hp total is equal to the combined hp total of all the minor malleables. and it is affected by any conditions, spells, and other magical effects that affected any of the minor malleables. The new malleable acts on the same initiative count as the malleables that formed it and occupies any unoccupied space that previously contained at least one of the malleables that formed it. 
* Four minor malleables can join to create one moderate malleable. 
* Eight minor malleables can join to create one major malleable. 
* Sixteen minor malleables can join to create one massive malleable.

d682b78a-b2c8-5777-9ac9-d7800ef2c90a.name: Join Malleables (Moderate Malleable)

The new malleable acts on the same initiative count as the malleables that formed it and occupies any unoccupied space that previously contained at least one of the malleables that formed it. 
* Two moderate malleables can join to create one major malleable. 
* Four moderate malleables can join to create one massive malleable.

54a271f2-b199-5d85-8fb8-2912aff4fc72.name: Multiattack (Moderate Malleable)
54a271f2-b199-5d85-8fb8-2912aff4fc72.description: The malleable makes two flesh tendril attacks.

attributes.description: The malleable makes two flesh tendril attacks.

9e82b148-2e32-5473-a9ea-877828a6a51d.name: Psychic Drain (Moderate Malleable)
9e82b148-2e32-5473-a9ea-877828a6a51d.description: One creature grappled by the malleable must make a DC 14 Intelligence saving throw, taking 22 (5d8) psychic damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. The target's hp maximum is reduced by an amount equal to the damage taken. This reduction lasts until the target finishes a long rest. The target dies and becomes a minor malleable if this effect reduces its hp maximum to 0.

c5e0aafc-169d-5d49-b6f1-baf7b8c6c558.name: Separate Malleables (Moderate Malleable)
c5e0aafc-169d-5d49-b6f1-baf7b8c6c558.description: The moderate malleable can split into four minor malleables. The new malleables' hp totals are equal to the moderate malleable's hp total divided by 4 (rounded down) and are affected by any conditions, spells, and other magical effects that affected the moderate malleable. The new malleables act on the same initiative count as the moderate malleable and occupy any unoccupied space that previously contained the moderate malleable.

4ee49df0-3e03-5157-9c6b-083f556c63be.name: Sudden Separation (Moderate Malleable)
4ee49df0-3e03-5157-9c6b-083f556c63be.description: When the moderate malleable takes 10 damage or more from a single attack, it can choose to immediately use Separate Malleables. If it does so, the damage is divided evenly among the separate malleables it becomes.

420d89d4-c176-5d6f-9db9-e2f6b533dc36.name: Celestial Freedom
420d89d4-c176-5d6f-9db9-e2f6b533dc36.description: The moonkite ignores difficult terrain, and magical effects can’t reduce its speed or cause it to be restrained. It can spend 5 feet of movement to escape from nonmagical restraints or being grappled. In addition, it has advantage on saving throws against spells and effects that would banish it from its current plane or that would bind it to a particular location or creature. The moonkite can grant this trait to anyone riding it.

f273a1cb-6c43-5784-a3a6-4f35e9652943.name: Magic Resistance (Moonkite)

33f83ddd-dfa2-5a96-a75a-61b0a0bc3b91.name: Magic Weapons (Moonkite)
33f83ddd-dfa2-5a96-a75a-61b0a0bc3b91.description: The moonkite’s weapon attacks are magical and silvered.

9ccd2956-23b1-5c3a-8d67-9f39cc75b4f0.description: The moonkite makes four wing buffet attacks. Alternatively, it can use Radiant Arrow twice.

688a9941-e7df-5fc2-9c50-aa2f96a7f00f.name: Planar Traveler
688a9941-e7df-5fc2-9c50-aa2f96a7f00f.description: The moonkite can transport itself to a different plane of existence. This works like the plane shift spell, except the moonkite can affect only itself and a willing rider, and can't banish an unwilling creature to another plane.

0cd32f4f-a9ed-596f-bfcd-e09c2885a344.name: Radiant Arrow
0cd32f4f-a9ed-596f-bfcd-e09c2885a344.description: Ranged Spell Attack: +7 to hit, range 150 ft., one target. Hit: 14 (4d6) radiant damage.

b59a9771-f437-5155-9358-b093e0c7823e.name: Wing Buffet (Moonkite)
b59a9771-f437-5155-9358-b093e0c7823e.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d8 + 4) bludgeoning damage. If the moonkite scores a critical hit, the target must succeed on a DC 15 Constitution saving throw or be blinded for 1 minute. The creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

a57bc241-d826-50d6-92a8-aeea55b73cb5.name: Earth Glide (Mountain Dryad)
a57bc241-d826-50d6-92a8-aeea55b73cb5.description: The mountain dryad can burrow through nonmagical, unworked earth and stone. While doing so, the dryad doesn’t disturb the material it moves through.

9b954cee-68c0-538f-a522-4e6f89edce7a.name: Magic Resistance (Mountain Dryad)
9b954cee-68c0-538f-a522-4e6f89edce7a.description: The mountain dryad has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

attributes.description: The mountain dryad has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

1fa867d1-598b-5f8f-bdd1-038aaae1c83d.name: Mountain’s Aspect
1fa867d1-598b-5f8f-bdd1-038aaae1c83d.description:
Each day at sunrise, the mountain dryad chooses one of the following: 
* Hardened Face. The mountain dryad chooses one of bludgeoning, piercing, or slashing damage types. The mountain dryad has resistance to the chosen damage type until the next sunrise. 
* Vaunted Peaks. The mountain dryad has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks until the next sunrise. 
* Rockslider. As a bonus action once before the next sunrise, the mountain dryad can make the ground within 30 feet of it difficult terrain. This difficult terrain doesn’t cost the dryad extra movement.

e3dc863f-bf2c-5f1e-819a-6c8a9f86bc38.name: Siege Monster (Mountain Dryad)
e3dc863f-bf2c-5f1e-819a-6c8a9f86bc38.description: The mountain dryad deals double damage to objects and structures.

attributes.description: The mountain dryad deals double damage to objects and structures.

599e5172-657c-5d97-a6ae-6fa3fb0b0eb9.name: Mountain's Awe
599e5172-657c-5d97-a6ae-6fa3fb0b0eb9.description: The mountain dryad emits a magical aura that radiates out from it for 1 minute. Each creature that starts its turn within 30 feet of the dryad must succeed on a DC 16 Charisma saving throw or be charmed for 1 minute. A charmed creature is incapacitated and, if it is more than 5 feet away from the mountain dryad, it must move on its turn toward the dryad by the most direct route, trying to get within 5 feet. It doesn't avoid opportunity attacks, but before moving into damaging terrain, such as lava or a pit, and whenever it takes damage from a source other than the dryad, it can repeat the saving throw. While charmed within 5 feet of the dryad, a Medium or smaller creature must climb the dryad, no check required. After climbing 20 feet, the charmed creature throws itself off the mountain dryad, taking falling damage and landing prone in an unoccupied space within 5 feet of the mountain dryad. A charmed creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

a4812f44-550e-5020-bd75-05fa689adcc0.name: Hunter’s Foresight
a4812f44-550e-5020-bd75-05fa689adcc0.description: The mountain nymph can see the immediate future of a creature affected by her hunter’s mark spell. While hunter’s mark is active on a creature, the mountain nymph has advantage on attack rolls against the creature and on saving throws against the creature’s spells and special abilities.

0257c628-fced-566f-b4b9-481195da53ba.name: Innate Spellcasting (Mountain Nymph)
0257c628-fced-566f-b4b9-481195da53ba.description:
The mountain nymph’s innate spellcasting ability is Wisdom (spell save DC 15). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:
At will: hunter’s mark
3/day each: misty step, spike growth
1/day: pass without trace

dfd853fd-104a-5885-879f-0c8be6df4923.description: The mountain nymph can move across and climb rocky surfaces without needing to make an ability check. Additionally, difficult terrain composed of rocks or rocky debris doesn’t cost her extra movement.

33241e79-1688-5a25-b517-f713ac12a91b.description: When the mountain nymph makes a ranged attack with a bow, she doesn’t have disadvantage on the attack roll from being within 5 feet of a hostile creature, though she may still have disadvantage from other sources.

87c3c99a-2dbb-5e97-9427-13214b98bdab.description: Ranged Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, range 150/600 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d8 + 4) piercing damage.

068646c7-16b9-557a-afa3-9d4cbf1c9389.name: Charge (Mountain Strider)
068646c7-16b9-557a-afa3-9d4cbf1c9389.description: If the mountain strider moves at least 15 feet straight toward a target and then hits it with a headbutt attack on the same turn, the target takes an extra 5 (2d4) bludgeoning damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 13 Strength saving throw or be pushed up to 10 feet away from the mountain strider and knocked prone.

e9a74983-d86e-560c-aa6b-598520dca2ed.name: Sure-Footed

a57beaae-fc8f-5dd0-ad56-fc8018195fc0.name: Headbutt (Mountain Strider)
a57beaae-fc8f-5dd0-ad56-fc8018195fc0.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (2d4 + 3) bludgeoning damage.

c7c6a9b0-fce1-532c-be9b-a267abeca248.name: Revenge for the Fallen
c7c6a9b0-fce1-532c-be9b-a267abeca248.description: When an ally the mountain strider can see is reduced to 0 hp within 30 feet of the mountain strider, the strider can move up to half its speed and make a headbutt attack.

0ea10264-3560-508c-a333-45ae48255783.name: Thunderous Bleat
0ea10264-3560-508c-a333-45ae48255783.description: The mountain strider releases a loud bleat in a 15-foot cone. Each creature in the area must make a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw, taking 7 (2d6) thunder damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

9b6c106b-a230-526b-8539-73c4db7e0331.name: Hold Breath (Murgrik)
9b6c106b-a230-526b-8539-73c4db7e0331.description: The murgrik can hold its breath for 30 minutes.

2c7dd382-7dff-5cbb-83ff-6352f0a15688.name: Keen Scent

77be70ca-c64c-5576-9f3b-2e470c41577b.name: Tentacle Flight
77be70ca-c64c-5576-9f3b-2e470c41577b.description: The murgrik flies by spinning its tentacles. If it is grappling a creature with its tentacles, its flying speed is halved.

e73db439-0f5f-548d-baf0-86cc770f3d54.name: Bite (Murgrik)
e73db439-0f5f-548d-baf0-86cc770f3d54.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 15 (2d8 + 6) piercing damage.

1cf12844-e02e-5ac0-a902-85c441de94f3.name: Multiattack (Murgrik)
1cf12844-e02e-5ac0-a902-85c441de94f3.description: The murgrik makes three attacks: one with its bite and two with its tentacles.

attributes.description: The murgrik makes three attacks: one with its bite and two with its tentacles.

9b39ebd4-aff6-580a-a171-1942a3defb75.name: Stomach Maw
9b39ebd4-aff6-580a-a171-1942a3defb75.description:
The murgrik makes one bite attack against a Medium or smaller target it is grappling. If the attack hits, the target is also swallowed, and the grapple ends. While swallowed, the target is blinded and restrained, it has total cover against attacks and other effects outside the murgrik, and it takes 14 (4d6) acid damage at the start of each of the murgrik's turns. The murgrik can only have one creature swallowed at a time.

If the murgrik takes 20 damage or more on a single turn from the swallowed creature, the murgrik must succeed on a DC 14 Constitution saving throw at the end of that turn or regurgitate the creature, which falls prone in a space within 5 feet of the murgrik. If the murgrik dies, a swallowed creature is no longer restrained by it and can escape from the corpse by using 10 feet of movement, exiting prone.

94d67b27-a73b-5e18-bacf-362698030a3e.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (1d6 + 6) bludgeoning damage. The target is grappled (escape DC 18) if it is a Medium or smaller creature and the murgrik doesn't have two other creatures grappled. Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained.

7975575c-bc46-5fe8-a431-0e9dd51042b8.name: Unsettling Ululations
7975575c-bc46-5fe8-a431-0e9dd51042b8.description: The stalk on the murgrik's head unleashes a dispiriting wail. Each creature within 30 feet of the murgrik that can hear it must make a DC 14 Wisdom saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 21 (6d6) psychic damage and is frightened for 1 minute. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't frightened. A creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

b06fd25b-a732-51c3-b6af-a7561da6dbc3.name: Bound in Jelly
b06fd25b-a732-51c3-b6af-a7561da6dbc3.description: The mydnari and its jelly are wholly reliant on each other. If the mydnari’s jelly is somehow separated from its master, the jelly dies within 1 minute. If the mydnari is separated from its jelly, it loses its blindsight, Acid Glob action, and Jelly Symbiosis trait.

4de90d27-19f7-5ece-bbf8-19a57da7ba35.name: Jelly Symbiosis
4de90d27-19f7-5ece-bbf8-19a57da7ba35.description: A creature that touches the mydnari or hits it with a melee attack while within 5 feet of it takes 2 (1d4) acid damage.

86732ec0-ff5d-5ac8-8bd9-aee1da8f34ac.name: Ooze Empathy
86732ec0-ff5d-5ac8-8bd9-aee1da8f34ac.description: A mydnari can use its Animal Handling skill on ooze-type creatures with an Intelligence score of 5 or lower. An ooze never attacks a mydnari unless provoked.

23d37a6b-f532-5f31-a169-d15d88e27e41.name: Acid Glob
23d37a6b-f532-5f31-a169-d15d88e27e41.description: Ranged Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, range 30/60 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d4 + 3) acid damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 12 Constitution saving throw or be poisoned for 1 minute. The target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

57c5015d-b5b2-5c7e-84a7-708e5b263122.name: Keeper of Secrets
57c5015d-b5b2-5c7e-84a7-708e5b263122.description: The satarre mystic has advantage on all Intelligence (Arcana) checks related to the planes and planar travel.

860ce33f-e6e1-5954-8625-b2976902ff9f.name: Levitate
860ce33f-e6e1-5954-8625-b2976902ff9f.description: As a bonus action, a mystic can rise or descend vertically up to 10 feet and can remain suspended there. This trait works like the levitate spell, except there is no duration, and the mystic doesn’t need to concentrate to continue levitating each round.

a5e6a36c-f575-5a5b-b50e-b438475ec833.name: Planar Commander
a5e6a36c-f575-5a5b-b50e-b438475ec833.description: As a bonus action, the mystic commands an angel, elemental, or fiend ally within 30 feet of it to use a reaction to make one attack against a creature that dealt damage to the mystic in the previous round.

45088f8e-7b32-552f-9143-d1e9405b6117.name: Void Fortitude
45088f8e-7b32-552f-9143-d1e9405b6117.description: If damage reduces the satarre mystic to 0 hp, it must make a Constitution saving throw with a DC of 5 + the damage taken, unless the damage is radiant or from a critical hit. On a success, the satarre mystic drops to 1 hp instead.

65f21e4e-2838-5a16-85c9-f297daa302be.name: Multiattack (Mystic)
65f21e4e-2838-5a16-85c9-f297daa302be.description: The satarre mystic makes two void claw attacks. Alternatively, it can use Void Bolt twice.

5fc58dcc-a5d8-5b1d-91f7-2bb453d2fe9e.name: Unveil
5fc58dcc-a5d8-5b1d-91f7-2bb453d2fe9e.description: The mystic unveils a darker reality to up to three creatures it can see within 30 feet of it. Each target must succeed on a DC 13 Wisdom saving throw or be frightened until the end of its next turn.

a5e34820-f529-5b33-abc5-8bd8113bddbc.name: Void Bolt
a5e34820-f529-5b33-abc5-8bd8113bddbc.description: Ranged Spell Attack: +5 to hit, range 50 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (2d8) necrotic damage.

f0c852e8-7cfb-5631-9947-d48b3cbd1315.name: Void Claw (Mystic)
f0c852e8-7cfb-5631-9947-d48b3cbd1315.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) slashing damage plus 4 (1d8) necrotic damage. The target must succeed on a DC 13 Constitution saving throw or its speed is reduced by 10 feet until the end of its next turn.

cf6f1c46-7525-55f7-87ea-c046c6b1e56c.name: Void Deflection
cf6f1c46-7525-55f7-87ea-c046c6b1e56c.description: When a creature the mystic can see targets it with a ranged spell attack, the mystic can attempt to deflect the spell. The mystic makes a Constitution saving throw. If the result is higher than the attack roll, the mystic is unaffected by the spell.

72dbb829-5dcd-5b2e-8d24-abd705f7eadd.name: Blunting Ambiance
72dbb829-5dcd-5b2e-8d24-abd705f7eadd.description: Each creature that deals piercing or slashing damage with a bladed weapon while within 30 feet of the naizu-ha must roll the damage twice and take the lower result.

47556861-3ff8-5b04-8f9b-b88f76e2a4d1.name: Dagger Form (1/Day)
47556861-3ff8-5b04-8f9b-b88f76e2a4d1.description: As a bonus action, the naizu-ha transforms into a magical dagger. A creature that wields the naizu-ha while it is in this form gains +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls with the dagger, and attacks with the dagger score a critical hit on a roll of 19 or 20. In addition, the wielder can’t take the Disengage action unless it succeeds on a DC 12 Wisdom saving throw.

b6124fbd-43cd-56a8-a1de-93ea439ab229.name: Spider Climb (Naizu-Ha)
b6124fbd-43cd-56a8-a1de-93ea439ab229.description: The naizu-ha can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

b00c7c85-79c2-5731-bc23-cea7b881ac1a.name: Tripping Charge
b00c7c85-79c2-5731-bc23-cea7b881ac1a.description: If the naizu-ha moves at least 15 feet straight toward a creature and then hits it with a scythe tail attack on the same turn, that target must succeed on a DC 14 Dexterity saving throw or be knocked prone. If the target is prone, the naizu-ha can make one dagger legs attack against it as a bonus action.

86dd66b8-a15e-5d2b-91ed-031ced1d8852.name: Dagger Legs

7d7bcd45-6a08-5635-8507-d59f85d2919a.name: Multiattack (Naizu-Ha)
7d7bcd45-6a08-5635-8507-d59f85d2919a.description: The naizu-ha makes three attacks: two with its scissor claws and one with its scythe tail. If both scissor claws attacks hit the same target, the target must succeed on a DC 14 Dexterity saving throw or take an extra 7 (2d6) slashing damage.

0c05dde1-f43f-56a2-a999-6cb1379fe72d.name: Keen Sight (Narshark)
0c05dde1-f43f-56a2-a999-6cb1379fe72d.description: The narshark has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight.

attributes.description: The narshark has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight.

8b7223c0-3633-5358-9810-c9cea0541935.name: Magical Horn
8b7223c0-3633-5358-9810-c9cea0541935.description: The narshark’s horn can be attacked and severed (AC 18; hp 5; immunity to bludgeoning, poison, and psychic damage) or destroyed (hp 15). If its horn is severed, the narshark loses its flying speed, loses 4 (1d8) hp at the start of each of its turns, and goes into a frenzy. While in a frenzy, the narshark has advantage on bite attack rolls and attack rolls against it have advantage.

While in a frenzy, the narshark has advantage on bite attack rolls and attack rolls against it have advantage.

1dd0a962-0944-5da3-beab-75e6af3bb47a.name: Magical Horns
1dd0a962-0944-5da3-beab-75e6af3bb47a.description: The narshark gains its ability to fly from its magical horn. The horn can be severed from a living narshark, but doing so drives it into a panicked rage as it attempts to slay all those around it. Strangely, narsharks never use their horns in combat, possibly in fear of accidentally breaking them. A narshark’s horn is commonly used in the creation of magic items that grant flight, and narsharks are often the target of hunters seeking to turn a profit.

a4a41f8d-1633-591f-997e-38da3cf791a2.name: Bite (Narshark)
a4a41f8d-1633-591f-997e-38da3cf791a2.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) piercing damage. If the creature isn't an undead or a construct, it must succeed on a DC 13 Constitution saving throw or lose 2 (1d4) hp at the start of each of its turns as one of the shark's teeth chips off into the wound. Any creature can take an action to stanch the wound by removing the tooth. The wound also closes and the tooth pops out if the target receives magical healing.

761e5ee0-c2d2-50c6-894d-297efa313b73.name: Devil’s Sight (Nephirron Devil)
761e5ee0-c2d2-50c6-894d-297efa313b73.description: Magical darkness doesn’t impede the nephirron’s darkvision.

7f6ac38b-7a0c-50c4-8f06-1b354aec4d2c.name: Innate Spellcasting (Nephirron Devil)
7f6ac38b-7a0c-50c4-8f06-1b354aec4d2c.description:
The nephirron devil’s spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 20). The nephirron can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:
At will: detect thoughts, protection from evil and good, teleport (self plus 150 pounds only)
3/day each: flame strike, scrying, wall of ice
1/day each: confusion, mass suggestion, shapechange (dragon or humanoid form only)

5eec6286-ddbd-55f5-b83c-be00aab0f9ad.name: Master Liar
5eec6286-ddbd-55f5-b83c-be00aab0f9ad.description: The nephirron has advantage on Charisma (Deception) checks when telling a lie.

3bf21e80-f551-5e78-a8b2-715d65af931d.name: Bite (Nephirron Devil)
3bf21e80-f551-5e78-a8b2-715d65af931d.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +13 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 26 (4d8 + 8) piercing damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 19 Constitution saving throw or fall unconscious for 1 minute, or until it takes damage or someone uses an action to shake or slap it awake. Dragons and dragon-like creatures, such as dragonborn, have disadvantage on this saving throw.

e46ecc74-bf96-5b60-9988-f9a7ecac852f.name: Multiattack (Nephirron Devil)
e46ecc74-bf96-5b60-9988-f9a7ecac852f.description: The nephirron devil makes one bite attack and two claw attacks.

9867b386-eb02-531a-b1b6-95a8e901c6f1.name: Sculpt Breath
9867b386-eb02-531a-b1b6-95a8e901c6f1.description: When the nephirron is in the area of a spell, such as fireball, or a breath weapon, it can create a hole in the spell or breath weapon, protecting itself from the effects. If it does so, the nephirron automatically succeeds on its saving throw against the spell or breath weapon and takes no damage if it would normally take half damage on a successful save.

If it does so, the nephirron automatically succeeds on its saving throw against the spell or breath weapon and takes no damage if it would normally take half damage on a successful save.

a9771523-f8a5-5cb9-ab20-289515b87265.name: Spine Trap
a9771523-f8a5-5cb9-ab20-289515b87265.description:
With 10 minutes of work, the nharyth can create a web of nearly transparent spines in a 20-foot cube. The web must be anchored between two solid masses or layered across a floor, wall, or ceiling. A web of spines layered over a flat surface has a depth of 5 feet. The web is difficult terrain, and the spines forming it are nearly transparent, requiring a successful DC 20 Wisdom (Perception) check to notice them.

A creature that starts its turn in the web of spines or that enters the web during its turn must succeed on a DC 16 Dexterity saving throw or 1d4 spines stick to it. At the start of each of its turns, the creature takes 1d4 piercing damage for each spine stuck to it. A creature, including the target, can take its action to remove 1d4 spines. If a creature starts its turn with more than 4 spines stuck to it, the creature must succeed on a DC 16 Constitution saving throw or be paralyzed for 1 minute. The paralyzed creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

The nharyth can plant up to 24 spines in a web when creating it. Once it has used 24 spines in webs, it must finish a long rest before it can use this trait again.

Hit: 12 (3d6 + 2) piercing damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 16 Constitution saving throw or its speed is halved until the end of its next turn. If the nharyth scores a critical hit, the target doesn't make a saving throw and is paralyzed until the end of its next turn instead.
