75ca21a6-6a39-5be0-9cb9-7812f7e6f609.name: Spellcasting (Servant of the Unsated God)
75ca21a6-6a39-5be0-9cb9-7812f7e6f609.description:
The servant of the Unsated God is a 4th-level spellcaster. Its spellcasting ability is Wisdom (spell save DC 13, +5 to hit with spell attacks). It has the following cleric spells prepared:

- **Cantrips** (At Will): guidance, mending, resistance, thaumaturgy
- **1st Level** (4 slots): bane, command, inflict wounds, protection from evil and good
- **2nd Level** (3 slots): blindness/deafness, hold person, spiritual weapon

132c0118-44ab-5504-89e1-968347c4627f.name: Stench (Servant of the Unsated God)
132c0118-44ab-5504-89e1-968347c4627f.description: Any creature that starts its turn within 5 feet of the servant must succeed on a DC 13 Constitution saving throw or be poisoned until the start of its next turn. If a creature’s saving throw is successful or the effect ends for it, the creature is immune to the servant’s Stench for the next 24 hours. A servant using this ability can’t also benefit from Master of Disguise.

687e12f3-459e-5840-855d-0e40f4309b67.name: Sunlight Sensitivity (Servant of the Unsated God)
687e12f3-459e-5840-855d-0e40f4309b67.description: While in sunlight, the servant has disadvantage on attack rolls, as well as on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight.

084cd970-3861-5571-a4e4-30a7800596cb.name: Turning Defiance (Servant of the Unsated God)
084cd970-3861-5571-a4e4-30a7800596cb.description: The servant and any ghouls within 30 feet of it have advantage on saving throws against effects that turn undead.

60a83316-8b5a-548c-a591-2b0bfff5b4fa.name: Bite (Servant of the Unsated God)
60a83316-8b5a-548c-a591-2b0bfff5b4fa.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) piercing damage, and, if the target is a humanoid, it must succeed on a DC 13 Constitution saving throw or contract darakhul fever.

891fc7b0-0786-5ac3-999c-64c614b99e66.name: Hungering Strike
891fc7b0-0786-5ac3-999c-64c614b99e66.description: A shadowy jaw superimposes over the servant of the Unsated God's mouth and reaches out to a creature within 30 feet of it. The target must make a DC 13 Constitution saving throw, taking 21 (6d6) necrotic damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

33c837c1-35aa-58dc-bf32-3ce56fedfe70.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) bludgeoning damage plus 9 (2d8) necrotic damage. The mace is magical and infused with the Unsated God's power while in the servant's hands.

f9247ac5-a4f3-5be2-bcca-2a502eb569cb.description: The shadow boxer can magically communicate with cats within 120 feet of it, using a limited telepathy.

669da018-4f53-50c5-b573-6dad5c343914.name: Pounce (Shadow Boxer)
669da018-4f53-50c5-b573-6dad5c343914.description: If the shadow boxer moves at least 20 feet straight toward a creature and then hits it with a claw attack on the same turn, that target must succeed on a DC 13 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone. If the target is prone, the shadow boxer can make one bite attack against it as a bonus action.

d3156ec2-4f43-565e-a37c-48a1d6e05fd9.name: Project Silhouette
d3156ec2-4f43-565e-a37c-48a1d6e05fd9.description: As a bonus action, the shadow boxer projects a shadow on a surface within 60 feet of it. The shadow boxer can shape it to resemble the shadow of any Medium or smaller beast, but the shadow can’t be larger than a 10-foot cube. Each creature that starts its turn within 60 feet of the shadow and that can see the shadow must succeed on a DC 13 Wisdom saving throw or be incapacitated until the end of its next turn and use its movement on its next turn to follow the shadow. As a bonus action, the shadow boxer can move the shadow up to 30 feet along a solid surface. The shadow moves in a natural manner for the type of creature it represents.

7cfa64e0-fd19-55fc-b835-ab6795bf5a6e.description: The shadow boxer magically turns invisible until it attacks or until its concentration ends (as if concentrating on a spell). Any equipment the shadow boxer wears or carries is invisible with it.

d4c107c3-a476-5cc0-8370-cd465ea62c68.name: Blacklight Strobe
d4c107c3-a476-5cc0-8370-cd465ea62c68.description: The visual flicker of the shadow giant moving between the Material Plane and the Shadow Realm has a physical effect on viewers. A creature that starts its turn within 30 feet of the shadow giant and that can see it must succeed on a DC 18 Wisdom saving throw or be unable make more than one melee or ranged attack on its turn and unable to use bonus actions or reactions until the start of its next turn.

e85300fa-62c6-5fa7-a135-e5fad37f686d.description:
At the start of its next turn, it returns to the Material Plane in an unoccupied space of its choice that it can see within 40 feet of the space where it vanished. If no unoccupied space is available within that range, it appears in the nearest unoccupied space.

While in the Plane of Shadow, the shadow giant can see and hear 120 feet into the Material

86f7eb97-5c14-55da-950f-05d8dd2475a8.description: The shadow giant directs its shadow to stretch out in a 60-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 18 Constitution saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 52 (15d6) cold damage and has disadvantage on attack rolls and saving throws until the end of its next turn. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and doesn't have disadvantage.

18b66875-dcd2-5182-9d34-bcf9efea729b.name: Tenebrous Talons

9d6691b0-94e2-5571-b78c-3aad954eed4f.name: Death Throes
9d6691b0-94e2-5571-b78c-3aad954eed4f.description: When the shadow of death dies, it explodes, and each creature within 30 feet of it must make a DC 22 Constitution saving throw, taking 35 (10d6) necrotic damage on a failed save, or half as much on a successful one.

0e20550c-fa9b-5d23-8fa0-3f6c94adea3d.description:
At the start of each of the shadow of death’s turns, each creature within 15 feet of it must succeed on a DC 22 Constitution saving throw or take 10 (3d6) necrotic damage.

In addition, light within 30 feet of the shadow of death is less effective. Bright light in the area becomes dim light, and dim light in the area becomes darkness.

7053c55e-5e65-50bb-b391-18d0e02eb113.name: Weapons of Death
7053c55e-5e65-50bb-b391-18d0e02eb113.description:
The shadow of death’s weapon attacks are magical. When the shadow of death hits with any weapon, the weapon deals an extra 10 (3d6) necrotic damage (included in the attack).

A creature that takes necrotic damage from the shadow death’s weapon must succeed on a DC 22 Constitution saving throw or its hp maximum is reduced by an amount equal to the necrotic damage taken. The reduction lasts until the target finishes a long rest. The target dies if this effect reduces its hp maximum to 0.

The reduction lasts until the target finishes a long rest. The target dies if this effect reduces its hp maximum to 0.

549efe7f-dfda-5d0e-9420-532493c28374.name: Multiattack (Shadow of Death)
549efe7f-dfda-5d0e-9420-532493c28374.description: The shadow of death can use Vision of Ending. It then makes three shortsword attacks.

923ac946-4c53-5467-8b3b-4c38b19c5d2e.name: Shortsword (Shadow of Death)
923ac946-4c53-5467-8b3b-4c38b19c5d2e.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +15 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 15 (2d6 + 8) piercing damage plus 10 (3d6) necrotic damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +15 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 15 (2d6 + 8) piercing damage plus 10 (3d6) necrotic damage.

09a3cc76-6891-534b-af99-b92363999dc9.name: Teleport (Shadow of Death)
09a3cc76-6891-534b-af99-b92363999dc9.description: The shadow of death magically teleports, along with any equipment it is wearing or carrying, up to 120 feet to an unoccupied space it can see.

attributes.description: The shadow of death magically teleports, along with any equipment it is wearing or carrying, up to 120 feet to an unoccupied space it can see.

c6dc231a-89e8-57f9-ae3a-0227278b082f.name: Vision of Ending
c6dc231a-89e8-57f9-ae3a-0227278b082f.description: Each creature that is not undead within 60 feet of the shadow of death that can see it must succeed on a DC 22 Wisdom saving throw or become frightened for 1 minute. While frightened in this way, the creature is also paralyzed as it sees visions of its death. A creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. If a creature's saving throw is successful or the effect ends for it, the creature is immune to this shadow of death's Vision of Ending for the next 24 hours.

a0841369-7ca8-5e0b-b495-a8e5f71f6f9a.name: Shapechanger (Shiftshroom)
a0841369-7ca8-5e0b-b495-a8e5f71f6f9a.description: The shiftshroom can use its action to alter its appearance into a more frightening fungus, such as a poisonous deathcap mushroom, or back into its true form. Alternatively, it can change back into its true form as a reaction when it takes damage. Its statistics are the same in each form, and it reverts to its true form if it dies. While in its frightening form, the shiftshroom can take only the Dodge, Disengage, and Hide actions. Any creature that starts its turn within 10 feet of a shiftshroom in its frightening form must succeed on a DC 10 Wisdom saving throw or be frightened of the shiftshroom until the start of its next turn. On a successful saving throw, the creature is immune to this feature for 24 hours.

78b4cd73-be1a-5278-8f2f-b6cb9ab7782e.name: Slam (Shiftshroom)
78b4cd73-be1a-5278-8f2f-b6cb9ab7782e.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 4 (1d6 + 1) bludgeoning damage.

823a0c50-490a-5aa1-8386-d15399796c6c.name: Limited Invisibility
823a0c50-490a-5aa1-8386-d15399796c6c.description: When the shimmer seal is on an icy surface or underwater, it is invisible. In all other terrain, the shimmer seal has advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks. Seals, other pinnipeds, and creatures chosen by the shimmer seal can see it.

85642844-d141-53fd-9533-68086024a15c.name: Sureflippered
85642844-d141-53fd-9533-68086024a15c.description: The shimmer seal can move across and climb icy surfaces without needing to make an ability check. Additionally, difficult terrain composed of ice or snow doesn’t cost it extra movement.

9873c124-a0f5-5689-aa1c-78501327c5da.name: Underwater Propulsion
9873c124-a0f5-5689-aa1c-78501327c5da.description: When the shimmer seal is underwater, it can take the Dash action as a bonus action on each of its turns.

1d22f38a-a975-56bc-b70b-9c80f7e92b1f.name: Multiattack (Shimmer Seal)
1d22f38a-a975-56bc-b70b-9c80f7e92b1f.description: The shimmer seal makes two tusk attacks.

attributes.description: The shimmer seal makes two tusk attacks.

3cd7db2f-3142-546e-99bf-ddedf5409afe.name: Tusk
3cd7db2f-3142-546e-99bf-ddedf5409afe.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 14 (3d6 + 4) slashing damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 14 (3d6 + 4) slashing damage.

951693df-7eea-5ad9-b57c-d28d75be722a.name: Echolocation (Shriekbat)
951693df-7eea-5ad9-b57c-d28d75be722a.description: The shriekbat can’t use its blindsight while deafened.

fb785d21-423e-59f6-a7fb-5ec7ed2ddd5d.name: Bite (Shriekbat)
fb785d21-423e-59f6-a7fb-5ec7ed2ddd5d.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +11 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 20 (3d8 + 7) piercing damage.

d8d563a2-d65d-5321-bcb1-ab5e7f2c7015.name: Multiattack (Shriekbat)
d8d563a2-d65d-5321-bcb1-ab5e7f2c7015.description: The shriekbat makes two attacks: one with its bite and one with its talons.

attributes.description: The shriekbat makes two attacks: one with its bite and one with its talons.

62025997-f0f6-58e0-a503-55c3354e47a1.name: Shriek (Shriekbat)
62025997-f0f6-58e0-a503-55c3354e47a1.description: The shriekbat emits a powerful burst of sound in a 30-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 16 Constitution saving throw, taking 42 (12d6) thunder damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. If the saving throw fails by 5 or more, the target is also stunned for 1 minute. A stunned creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

0177ade6-43cb-5cf3-9bb6-e770d862e5f5.name: Talons (Shriekbat)
0177ade6-43cb-5cf3-9bb6-e770d862e5f5.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +11 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 17 (3d6 + 7) slashing damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 19). Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained, and the shriekbat can't use its talons on another target.

4ccf473e-ec7f-5545-89e4-4e3212cdbe3d.name: Many Eyes
4ccf473e-ec7f-5545-89e4-4e3212cdbe3d.description: The shukankor has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight and on saving throws against being blinded.

attributes.description: The shukankor has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight and on saving throws against being blinded.

6d725f52-e6aa-5219-b69d-ce76c21acd2e.name: Self-made Pack
6d725f52-e6aa-5219-b69d-ce76c21acd2e.description: The shukankor has advantage on attack rolls against a creature if at least one of its duplicates is within 5 feet of the creature and the duplicate isn’t incapacitated.

attributes.description: The shukankor has advantage on attack rolls against a creature if at least one of its duplicates is within 5 feet of the creature and the duplicate isn’t incapacitated.

2e69ff65-7140-5604-b853-0549dbc5f660.name: Beak (Shukankor)
2e69ff65-7140-5604-b853-0549dbc5f660.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 15 (2d8 + 6) piercing damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 15 (2d8 + 6) piercing damage.

fe3236cf-7800-52d5-8e16-cc7784ada35f.name: Duplicating Terror
fe3236cf-7800-52d5-8e16-cc7784ada35f.description: The shukankor magically duplicates itself, creating four replicas. Each replica uses the statistics of an axe beak, except it also has the shukankor's Many Eyes and Self-made Pack traits. The shukankor can communicate telepathically with a replica as long as they are within 120 feet of each other. The replicas act as allies of the shukankor and obey its telepathic commands. The replicas remain until killed or dismissed by the shukankor as a bonus action. Slain or dismissed replicas melt into a foul-smelling puddle of green goo. A replica that survives for 24 hours breaks its telepathic link with the shukankor, becoming a free-thinking creature, and grows into a full shukankor after 1 month.

b7e2aa1c-ba10-53a5-a05f-e1399b3a8e3f.name: Multiattack (Shukankor)
b7e2aa1c-ba10-53a5-a05f-e1399b3a8e3f.description: The shukankor makes three attacks: one with its beak and two with its claws.

9a39b82c-b0dd-58a1-b21a-81be55ba8d34.name: Sacrifice Replica
9a39b82c-b0dd-58a1-b21a-81be55ba8d34.description: When a creature the shukankor can see targets it with an attack, the shukankor forces a replica within 5 feet of it to jump in the way. The chosen replica becomes the target of the attack instead.

323be0a0-eca0-5640-b81c-374e3ca604ad.name: Innate Spellcasting (Shurale)
323be0a0-eca0-5640-b81c-374e3ca604ad.description:
The shurale’s spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 15). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components.
At will: dancing lights, invisibility (self only), minor illusion
3/day each: detect thoughts, major image, misty step
1/day: confusion

f3c7476e-82fd-51fd-ae76-d0a469ce50f1.description: The shurale’s weapon attacks are magical.

attributes.description: The shurale’s weapon attacks are magical.

bf4aba10-9e7f-56a5-b8e3-109b597088cc.name: Mirthful Regeneration
bf4aba10-9e7f-56a5-b8e3-109b597088cc.description: The shurale regains 5 hp at the start of its turn for each creature within 30 feet of it that is incapacitated with laughter from its Tickle action. If a creature dies while suffering from the laughter, the shurale gains 15 temporary hp.

073fbe99-95c9-5196-9a00-b948fe2f5077.name: Battleaxe
073fbe99-95c9-5196-9a00-b948fe2f5077.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d8 + 4) slashing damage, or 9 (1d10 + 4) slashing damage if used with two hands.

b3e7c231-5465-5625-b5f5-568098067d0b.name: Multiattack (Shurale)
b3e7c231-5465-5625-b5f5-568098067d0b.description: The shurale can use Tickle. It then makes three attacks: one with its gore and two with its battleaxe.

attributes.description: The shurale can use Tickle. It then makes three attacks: one with its gore and two with its battleaxe.

8c34eaa4-8f9d-575a-9611-b8b900da7093.name: Tickle
8c34eaa4-8f9d-575a-9611-b8b900da7093.description: The shurale touches a creature within 5 feet of it. The target must succeed on a DC 15 Wisdom saving or begin to laugh uncontrollably for 1 minute. While laughing, the target falls prone, is incapacitated, and unable to move. The target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. If a creature's saving throw is successful or the effect ends for it, the creature is immune to the shurale's Tickle for the next 24 hours. If the target fails the saving throw three times, it must succeed on a DC 15 Constitution saving throw or be reduced to 0 hp and begin dying. On a success, the laughter ends on the target, as normal.

0bd3d3b8-1ea6-556d-ac08-306899ad47d3.name: Drinking Buddy
0bd3d3b8-1ea6-556d-ac08-306899ad47d3.description: A creature that shares a drink with a silenal has advantage on saving throws against being charmed and poisoned for 1 hour. During this time, if the creature takes violent action against the silenal, the creature has disadvantage on these saving throws for the remainder of the duration.

67ed6d35-efec-500c-9ac9-ba8541ee3f77.name: Drunken Clarity
67ed6d35-efec-500c-9ac9-ba8541ee3f77.description: When the silenal is within 5 feet of an alcoholic beverage, it has truesight out to a range of 90 feet. In addition, it notices secret doors hidden by magic within 30 feet of it.

3aace969-2002-5bd1-aaf6-2a006579c0a2.name: Hide in the Fray
3aace969-2002-5bd1-aaf6-2a006579c0a2.description: The silenal can take the Hide action as a bonus action if it is within 10 feet of two other creatures engaged in combat with each other.

attributes.description: The silenal can take the Hide action as a bonus action if it is within 10 feet of two other creatures engaged in combat with each other.

440ab1f4-f6ce-5f2a-96f5-bd5887b044f9.name: Liquid Courage (Recharge 4-6)
440ab1f4-f6ce-5f2a-96f5-bd5887b044f9.description: As a bonus action, the silenal imbibes nearby alcohol to gain access to a hidden reservoir of audacity and grit. The silenal gains 10 (3d6) temporary hp for 1 minute.

attributes.description: As a bonus action, the silenal imbibes nearby alcohol to gain access to a hidden reservoir of audacity and grit. The silenal gains 10 (3d6) temporary hp for 1 minute.

06149a7b-e0ce-5d72-8e21-a7a8ac7a37af.name: Cause Row
06149a7b-e0ce-5d72-8e21-a7a8ac7a37af.description: The silenal magically stirs humanoids it can see within 60 feet of it into a frenzy. The frenzied patrons use the statistics of 4d4 commoners or 1 bar brawl. The frenzied patrons don't attack the silenal. The patrons remain frenzied for 10 minutes, until the silenal dies, or until the silenal calms and disperses the mass as a bonus action.

940fa71e-284a-5276-adac-9b01e9c30b64.description: Ranged Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, range 20/40 ft., one target. Hit: 14 (4d4 + 4) piercing damage.

d8a5ae6f-0552-5984-8ed1-13699f5b5e99.name: Tankard
d8a5ae6f-0552-5984-8ed1-13699f5b5e99.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d6 + 4) bludgeoning damage plus 7 (2d6) poison damage. The target must succeed on a DC 15 Constitution saving throw or be poisoned for 1 minute. The target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

f3ee9828-9d62-5d00-ac62-0d9969f5c491.name: Breath Weapons (Silver Dragon Wyrmling Skeleton)
f3ee9828-9d62-5d00-ac62-0d9969f5c491.description:
The dragon uses one of the following breath weapons: 
* Shard Breath. The skeleton exhales a 15-foot cone of bone shards. Each creature in that area must make a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw, taking 18 (4d8) piercing damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. 
* Noxious Breath. The skeleton exhales a 15-foot cone of gas. Each creature in the area must succeed on a DC 13 Constitution saving throw or become poisoned for 1 minute. A creature poisoned in this way can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the poisoned condition on itself on a success.

attributes.description:

* Shard Breath. The skeleton exhales a 15-foot cone of bone shards. Each creature in that area must make a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw, taking 18 (4d8) piercing damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. 
* Noxious Breath. The skeleton exhales a 15-foot cone of gas. Each creature in the area must succeed on a DC 13 Constitution saving throw or become poisoned for 1 minute. A creature poisoned in this way can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the poisoned condition on itself on a success.

79260a2b-71e0-5685-a32e-b2b677635c8a.name: Disruptive Ploy
79260a2b-71e0-5685-a32e-b2b677635c8a.description: As a bonus action, the snake performs a minor ploy with its mage hands against a target it can see within 30 feet of it. The target must succeed on a DC 14 Dexterity saving throw or have disadvantage on its next ability check, attack roll, or saving throw (the snake’s choice) as the snake magically removes the target’s helmet, upends the target’s quiver, or performs some other form of distraction.

attributes.description: As a bonus action, the snake performs a minor ploy with its mage hands against a target it can see within 30 feet of it. The target must succeed on a DC 14 Dexterity saving throw or have disadvantage on its next ability check, attack roll, or saving throw (the snake’s choice) as the snake magically removes the target’s helmet, upends the target’s quiver, or performs some other form of distraction.

d492dd45-1540-5967-aa45-512e61c3d9c4.name: One Hundred Mage Hands
d492dd45-1540-5967-aa45-512e61c3d9c4.description: The snake is surrounded by one hundred, magical, spectral hands. The hands can’t be targeted by spells or attacks and are immune to damage. The hands float within 30 feet of the snake and move with their serpent commander. The snake can decide if the hands are visible. Each hand can carry an object weighing up to 10 pounds and no more than three hands can work in tandem to carry one larger object. The snake’s Dexterity (Sleight of Hand) checks have a range of 30 feet. Whenever the snake makes a Dexterity (Sleight of Hand) check, it can make up to four such checks as part of the same action, but each check must be against a different target. The snake can perform actions normally restricted to creatures with hands, such as opening a door, stirring a bowl of soup, or carrying a lantern. The hands can’t wield weapons or shields or make attacks, except as part of the snake’s Flying Fists action.

1a4aa9b8-cae6-5a44-8901-351dbb7ab393.name: Bite (Snake with a Hundred Mage Hands)
1a4aa9b8-cae6-5a44-8901-351dbb7ab393.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft. creature. Hit: 9 (2d4 + 4) piercing damage.

0780e476-6cc2-5bab-ba70-6867876fdd7c.name: Flying Fists
0780e476-6cc2-5bab-ba70-6867876fdd7c.description: The snake unleashes a flurry of spectral punches in a 30-foot cone. Each creature in the area must make a DC 14 Dexterity saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 10 (3d6) bludgeoning damage and is knocked prone. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't knocked prone.

66fad89d-3294-5c88-ae64-59145d347c65.name: False Appearance (Snow Person Form Only)
66fad89d-3294-5c88-ae64-59145d347c65.description: While the snow terror remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from an ordinary snow person.

attributes.description: While the snow terror remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from an ordinary snow person.

472285f8-cbcc-5435-8bbd-60880e7b67c2.name: Shapechanger (Snow Terror)
472285f8-cbcc-5435-8bbd-60880e7b67c2.description:
The snow terror can use its action to polymorph into a Large snow person, a snowy likeness of the creature it most recently killed, or back into its true form. Its statistics are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn’t transformed. It reverts to its true form if it dies.

While in the form of the creature it most recently killed, creatures that knew the mimicked creature have disadvantage on their Wisdom saving throws against its Horrifying Visage.

attributes.description:
The snow terror can use its action to polymorph into a Large snow person, a snowy likeness of the creature it most recently killed, or back into its true form. Its statistics are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn’t transformed. It reverts to its true form if it dies.

While in the form of the creature it most recently killed, creatures that knew the mimicked creature have disadvantage on their Wisdom saving throws against its Horrifying Visage.

80eb9a70-dc2f-5875-8af8-db0b8bf33afd.name: Bite (Snow Terror)
80eb9a70-dc2f-5875-8af8-db0b8bf33afd.description:
Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 14 (3d6 + 4) piercing damage plus 14 (4d6) acid damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it must succeed on a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw or be swallowed by the snow terror. A swallowed creature is blinded and restrained, it has total cover against attacks and other effects outside the snow terror, and it takes 14 (4d6) acid damage at the start of each of the snow terror's turns. The snow terror can have only one creature swallowed at a time.

If the snow terror takes 15 or more damage on a single turn from the swallowed creature, it must succeed on a DC 16 Constitution saving throw at the end of that turn or regurgitate the swallowed creature, which falls prone in a space within 10 feet of the snow terror. If the snow terror dies, a swallowed creature is no longer restrained by it and can escape from the corpse by using 10 feet of movement, exiting prone.

The snow terror can have only one creature swallowed at a time.

If the snow terror dies, a swallowed creature is no longer restrained by it and can escape from the corpse by using 10 feet of movement, exiting prone.

03523276-361e-5b6a-8bef-992713024cac.name: Horrifying Visage
03523276-361e-5b6a-8bef-992713024cac.description: Each non-undead creature within 60 feet of the snow terror that can see it must succeed on a DC 13 Wisdom saving throw or be frightened for 1 minute. A creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. If a creature's saving throw is successful or the effect ends for it, the creature is immune to this snow terror's Horrifying Visage for the next 24 hours.

28ae3c18-5fa9-5c1b-a088-40eb98b3cd24.name: Shadow Webs
28ae3c18-5fa9-5c1b-a088-40eb98b3cd24.description: The somberweave’s webs are anchored in the Material Plane and the Shadow Realm, existing in both simultaneously. Except for effects and attacks from the somberweave, a creature in contact with or restrained by a somberweave’s webs has half cover and is immune to any spell or effect that would move it to a different plane, such as the banishment and plane shift spells.

a191db91-c0fc-58d1-ac45-6c9c24d2dcc7.name: Shadow Shift
a191db91-c0fc-58d1-ac45-6c9c24d2dcc7.description: The somberweave touches a creature restrained by its webbing and transports itself and the creature into the Shadow Realm or the Material Plane, the somberweave's choice. The somberweave and the target appear within 5 feet of each other in unoccupied spaces in the chosen plane. The destination location must be within 10 feet of the somberweave's anchored web. If the target is unwilling, it can make a DC 14 Charisma saving throw. On a success, the somberweave is transported but the target isn't.

25eafda9-1f5e-508e-99cf-e3530e0af800.name: Nullifying Howl
25eafda9-1f5e-508e-99cf-e3530e0af800.description:
The spellhound lets out a high-pitched, multiphonic howl to disrupt magical effects within 60 feet of it. Any spell of 3rd level or lower within the area ends. For each spell of 4th-level or higher in the area, the spellhound makes an ability check, adding its Constitution modifier to the roll. The DC equals 10 + the spell's level. On a success, the spell ends.

In addition, each spellcaster within 30 feet of the spellhound that can hear the howl must succeed on a DC 14 Constitution saving throw or be stunned until the end of its next turn.

210bad50-c957-5443-8c5e-9c4d4448ae82.name: Filthy
210bad50-c957-5443-8c5e-9c4d4448ae82.description: The sporous crab makes its home in grime and muck and is covered in filth. A creature that touches the sporous crab or hits it with a melee attack while within 5 feet of it must succeed on a DC 12 Constitution saving throw or be poisoned until the end of its next turn. If a creature fails the saving throw by 5 or more, it also contracts sewer plague. On a successful saving throw, the creature is immune to the crab’s Filthy trait for the next 24 hours.

f38a18d7-a320-5ef9-89d2-da648ca6b97d.name: Claw (Sporous Crab)
f38a18d7-a320-5ef9-89d2-da648ca6b97d.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) bludgeoning damage.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) bludgeoning damage.

d11eb84a-dd87-56f6-b5ff-2ea6ccf9e173.name: Multiattack (Sporous Crab)
d11eb84a-dd87-56f6-b5ff-2ea6ccf9e173.description: The sporous crab makes two claw attacks.

attributes.description: The sporous crab makes two claw attacks.

7b1494da-6a6b-5f3b-a29c-a0b6655e439a.name: Spore
7b1494da-6a6b-5f3b-a29c-a0b6655e439a.description: The sporous crab sprays spores in a 15-foot cone. Each creature in the area must make a DC 12 Constitution saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 7 (2d6) poison damage and becomes infected with the crab's spores. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't infected with spores. After 1 hour, small bubbles and bumps appear across the skin of the infected creature. At the end of each long rest, the infected creature must make a DC 12 Constitution saving throw. On a success, the infected creature's body fights off the spores and no longer has to make the saving throw. If a creature fails the saving throw every day for 7 days, young sporous crabs hatch from the creature's skin, and the creature takes 9 (2d8) slashing damage. The spores can also be removed with a lesser restoration spell or similar magic.

b00532c3-ab22-5cff-8db3-4351857eb86b.name: Water Walker
b00532c3-ab22-5cff-8db3-4351857eb86b.description: The spurred water skate can move across the surface of water as if it were harmless, solid ground. This trait works like the water walk spell.

b468a8e4-8b44-517d-9776-44e9d75aa418.name: Stabbing Forelimbs
b468a8e4-8b44-517d-9776-44e9d75aa418.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) piercing damage. The target is grappled (escape DC 12) if it is a Medium or smaller creature and the skate doesn't have two other creatures grappled. Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained. If the target is in a liquid, the skate can hold it under the surface, and the target risks suffocating.

86d9102a-b4f4-5c46-8e25-b1b169e8dadb.name: Kinship with Fire
86d9102a-b4f4-5c46-8e25-b1b169e8dadb.description: When the ssadar is subjected to fire damage, it takes no damage and instead has advantage on melee attack rolls until the end of its next turn.

1d603744-ede1-5bea-860a-63cc2e2ea2c2.name: One with Fire
1d603744-ede1-5bea-860a-63cc2e2ea2c2.description: Ssadars have an affinity for fire and hold beings of fire in high esteem. Ssadar priests bless ssadar warriors by imbuing them with fire before sending them into battle. A non-ssadar fire-wielder who enters a ssadar city might earn enough respect from the ssadar to be sacrificed last or in a grander ritual to the greatest of their gods.

8e76edaa-54e9-5e45-9367-8e66499644ae.name: Longsword (Ssadar)

0a98db4c-bb88-5b24-843c-f82e83825344.name: Multiattack (Ssadar)
0a98db4c-bb88-5b24-843c-f82e83825344.description: The ssadar makes two attacks: one with its bite and one with its longsword. Alternatively, it can use Spit Fire twice.

41cede65-6f33-553f-a066-cb9e7c23a191.name: Spit Fire (Ssadar)
41cede65-6f33-553f-a066-cb9e7c23a191.description: Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, range 60 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (2d6) fire damage. If the target is a creature or a flammable object, it ignites. Until a creature takes an action to douse the fire, the target takes 2 (1d4) fire damage at the start of each of its turns.

1b0c882b-c920-514b-81d5-49cc17d5dfb4.name: Mouth Compartment
1b0c882b-c920-514b-81d5-49cc17d5dfb4.description: The stellar rorqual’s mouth is a compartment that is 60 feet long, 40 feet wide, and 30 feet high with a single entry and exit. The rorqual can control the ambient pressure, temperature, gravity, moisture, and breathable air levels inside its mouth, allowing creatures and objects within it to exist comfortably in spite of conditions outside the rorqual. Creatures and objects within the rorqual have total cover against attacks and other effects outside the rorqual. As an action, a creature inside the rorqual can interact with the crystalline growths inside the rorqual’s mouth and sense what the rorqual senses, gaining the benefits of its blindsight.

26613d7e-7e00-5b98-a0c0-c052150e2982.name: Stellar Burst
26613d7e-7e00-5b98-a0c0-c052150e2982.description: When the stellar rorqual dies, it releases all of its stored solar energy in a massive explosion. Each creature within 120 feet of the rorqual must make a DC 18 Dexterity saving throw, taking 21 (6d6) fire damage and 21 (6d6) radiant damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

65bbd2ff-9fc0-5dfa-923e-04528d85bfce.name: Void Flier
65bbd2ff-9fc0-5dfa-923e-04528d85bfce.description: When flying between stars, the stellar rorqual magically glides on solar winds, making the immense journey through the Void in an impossibly short time.

1892ec7a-71ad-56b6-9c40-f308ddb1636d.name: Planar Dive
1892ec7a-71ad-56b6-9c40-f308ddb1636d.description: The stellar rorqual can transport itself and any willing creature inside its mouth to the Astral, Ethereal, or Material Planes or to the Void. This works like the plane shift spell, except the stellar rorqual can transport any number of willing creatures as long as they are inside its mouth. The stellar rorqual can't use this action to banish an unwilling creature.

ec33bc7b-72a0-5cbc-a07a-3b8fcebedd60.description: While the stone creeper remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from an ordinary vine.

34209bf7-8d8a-5136-a6b1-dac153cfbb70.name: Mass of Vines
34209bf7-8d8a-5136-a6b1-dac153cfbb70.description: The stone creeper can move through a space as narrow as 1 foot wide without squeezing.

1aa698f5-8a62-5723-a07f-d23ae12d78d1.description: The stone creeper can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

bfc751d7-156d-54ec-a7f3-c29b2b68fa92.name: Acid-coated Thorn
bfc751d7-156d-54ec-a7f3-c29b2b68fa92.description: Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, range 20/60 ft., one creature. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) piercing damage plus 2 (1d4) acid damage.

a6f853fb-2938-52c5-951d-ec24549f464f.name: Thorned Vine
a6f853fb-2938-52c5-951d-ec24549f464f.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 10 ft., one creature. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) piercing damage plus 5 (2d4) acid damage.

fcdc7319-3a26-5f71-8b25-916c1e190082.name: Weaken Stone
fcdc7319-3a26-5f71-8b25-916c1e190082.description: While climbing on a wall or ceiling made of worked stone, the stone creeper injects its acid into the mortar, weakening the structure. Each creature within 10 feet of the wall or in a 10-foot cube beneath the ceiling must make a DC 12 Dexterity saving throw, taking 7 (2d6) bludgeoning damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. A creature that fails its saving throw when beneath a ceiling is also knocked prone and buried. The buried target is restrained and unable to breathe or stand up. A creature, including the target, can take its action to remove the rubble and free the buried target by succeeding on a DC 10 Strength check.

77ab18f7-141c-55bf-94c2-732c4f703d4f.name: Innate Spellcasting (Storm Maiden)
77ab18f7-141c-55bf-94c2-732c4f703d4f.description:
The storm maiden’s innate spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 13, +5 to hit with spell attacks). She can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:
At will: create or destroy water, ray of frost, misty step, thunderwave
1/day each: sleet storm, wind wall

bea7cb36-0709-5f9e-ac24-acda5e8a803c.description: The storm maiden makes two thunderous slam attacks.

39f8d5dd-3442-5511-8227-6748b3f8a7b2.description: Ranged Spell Attack: +5 to hit, range 120 ft., one target. Hit: 14 (4d6) lightning damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 13 Constitution saving throw or be incapacitated until the end of its next turn.

6532526f-4bf3-5d37-9ed2-c4ed85195105.name: Iron Scent
6532526f-4bf3-5d37-9ed2-c4ed85195105.description: The boar can pinpoint, by scent, the location of ferrous metal within 60 feet of it.

9e4e5643-e9d1-5918-b42e-30907ee7fd0d.name: Lightning Hide
9e4e5643-e9d1-5918-b42e-30907ee7fd0d.description: A creature that touches the boar or hits it with a melee attack while within 5 feet of it takes 5 (2d4) lightning damage.

45b27f2b-af78-5f3e-9011-91db347a08c0.name: Relentless (Recharges after a Short or Long Rest) (Stormboar)
45b27f2b-af78-5f3e-9011-91db347a08c0.description: If the boar takes 15 damage or less that would reduce it to 0 hp, it is reduced to 1 hp instead.

47e06526-c492-57f4-9ed6-0ca7d97dc528.name: Thunder Charge
47e06526-c492-57f4-9ed6-0ca7d97dc528.description: If the boar moves at least 20 feet straight toward a target and then hits it with a tusk attack on the same turn, the target takes an extra 11 (2d10) thunder damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 15 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone.

5ff64958-fb10-51c4-8c08-652abbf0fac8.name: Lightning Run
5ff64958-fb10-51c4-8c08-652abbf0fac8.description: The boar becomes a bolt of living lightning and moves up to its speed without provoking opportunity attacks. It can move through creatures and objects as if they were difficult terrain. It takes 5 (1d10) force damage and is pushed to the closest unoccupied space if it ends its turn inside an object. Each creature in the boar's path must make a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw, taking 22 (4d10) lightning damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

It can move through creatures and objects as if they were difficult terrain. It takes 5 (1d10) force damage and is pushed to the closest unoccupied space if it ends its turn inside an object. Each creature in the boar's path must make a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw, taking 22 (4d10) lightning damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

70cea0bb-537f-518a-9931-bf26e9d4e946.name: Thunder Leap
70cea0bb-537f-518a-9931-bf26e9d4e946.description: The boar moves up to 20 feet, jumping over obstacles in its way. Difficult terrain doesn't cost it extra movement when it leaps. Each creature within 10 feet of the boar when it leaps and each creature within 10 feet of where it lands must make a DC 15 Constitution saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 16 (3d10) thunder damage and is pushed up to 10 feet away from the boar. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't pushed.

7fba985d-f008-5043-ac12-cec253ea6470.name: Tusk (Stormboar)
7fba985d-f008-5043-ac12-cec253ea6470.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) slashing damage and 11 (2d10) lightning damage. In addition, nonmagical metal armor worn by the target is partly devoured by the boar and takes a permanent and cumulative -2 penalty to the AC it offers. The armor is destroyed if the penalty reduces its AC to 10.

attributes.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) slashing damage and 11 (2d10) lightning damage. ef0a9bc6-0f74-525b-913b-0af852381110.name: Strobe
ef0a9bc6-0f74-525b-913b-0af852381110.description:
As a bonus action, the strobing fungus can start emitting a powerful, strobing light. It rapidly alternates between shedding bright light in a 60-foot radius and shedding no light, creating a dizzying effect unless the area’s ambient light is bright light. Each creature within 60 feet of the strobing fungus and that can see the light must succeed on a DC 14 Constitution saving throw or be blinded for 1 minute. A blinded creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

Unless surprised, a creature with a shield or other similarly-sized object can use its reaction to raise the object and protect its eyes from the light, avoiding the saving throw. If it does so, it can’t use that object for anything else. For example, a creature using a shield to protect its eyes loses the shield’s bonus to its Armor Class while using the shield in this way. If the creature looks at the strobing fungus or lowers or uses the object protecting its eyes, it must immediately make the save.

While emitting light, the strobing fungus can’t attack. It can stop emitting light at any time (no action required).

7cfe7327-c6b4-5b76-83aa-3b6f4b036a38.name: Arboreal Tactician
7cfe7327-c6b4-5b76-83aa-3b6f4b036a38.description: The sulsha is adept at fighting while climbing. It doesn’t provoke opportunity attacks when it climbs out of an enemy’s reach, and it has advantage on attack rolls against a creature if the creature is climbing.

31d0d4cc-615c-51e9-b59b-8c7fb3ba8a76.description: The sulsha’s long jump is up to 30 feet and its high jump is up to 15 feet, with or without a running start.

65bf8b93-2e6d-5dac-af03-11b0e95a0d57.description: The sulsha makes three attacks: one with its bite, one with its slam, and one with its tail spur. Alternatively, it makes two bomb attacks.

131642ad-662a-5ca0-98ba-c66ddd05d8ca.name: Slam (Sulsha)

a6a253e7-7bb1-58dc-b4f0-f06824fa1837.name: Terrifying Display
a6a253e7-7bb1-58dc-b4f0-f06824fa1837.description: The sulsha beats furiously on its chest and hollers with rage. Each creature within 30 feet of the sulsha that can see or hear it must succeed on a DC 14 Wisdom saving throw or be frightened for 1 minute. A creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

28e14633-184e-5b0d-b85f-8350528fa4c5.name: Discern Food Preferences
28e14633-184e-5b0d-b85f-8350528fa4c5.description: The swamp lily can use an action to read the surface thoughts of all creatures within 60 feet of it. This works like the detect thoughts spell, except the lily can only determine each creature’s favorite food. Each creature within range must succeed on a DC 15 Wisdom saving throw or have disadvantage on its saving throw against the lily’s Fake Feast action.

3289bf4e-aa49-5f17-99e4-5951d78adfcd.name: Fake Feast
3289bf4e-aa49-5f17-99e4-5951d78adfcd.description:
The swamp lily magically creates the image of a banquet within 5 feet of itself that compels creatures to eat from it. Each creature within 60 feet of the banquet that can see the banquet must succeed on a DC 15 Wisdom saving throw or be charmed by the lily. The lily must take a bonus action on its subsequent turns to maintain the illusion. The illusion ends if the lily is incapacitated.

While charmed by the lily, a target is incapacitated and ignores the banquets of other lilies. If the charmed target is more than 5 feet away from the lily's banquet, the target must move on its turn toward the banquet by the most direct route, trying to get within 5 feet. It doesn't avoid opportunity attacks, but before moving into damaging terrain, such as lava or a pit, and whenever it takes damage from a source other than the lily, the target can repeat the saving throw. A charmed target can also repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns. If the saving throw is successful, the effect ends on it. A target that successfully saves is immune to this swamp lily's Fake Feast for the next 24 hours.

If the charmed target starts its turn within 5 feet of the banquet, it eats the feast and must make a DC 15 Constitution saving throw. On a failure, the creature takes 21 (6d6) poison damage and is poisoned for 1 minute. On a success, the creature takes half the damage and isn't poisoned.

4db4bffb-7452-5ffb-bf2c-28ad4ff5d7e8.name: Root

Hit: 12 (2d8 + 3) bludgeoning damage, and the target must make a DC 15 Constitution saving throw, taking 10 (3d6) poison damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

a1bc0061-ecbf-5dcd-8f4d-4963b865c22e.name: Cloud of Insects
a1bc0061-ecbf-5dcd-8f4d-4963b865c22e.description: A cloud of biting and stinging insects surrounds the swamp naga. A creature that starts its turn within 5 feet of the naga must make a DC 14 Constitution saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 9 (2d8) poison damage and is poisoned for 1 minute. On a success, it takes half the damage and isn’t poisoned. A poisoned creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. A wind of moderate or greater speed (at least 10 miles per hour) disperses the insect cloud for 1 minute. As a bonus action, the naga can disperse the cloud for 1 minute.

2b4c75f5-1102-5505-a7a6-0ea11a32301e.name: Insect and Serpent Passivism
2b4c75f5-1102-5505-a7a6-0ea11a32301e.description: No insects or serpents can willingly attack the swamp naga. They can be forced to do so through magical means.

477d558a-7fb5-5c55-bcd5-402d5979d6bb.name: Rejuvenation (Swamp Naga)
477d558a-7fb5-5c55-bcd5-402d5979d6bb.description: If it dies, the swamp naga returns to life in 1d6 days and regains all its hp. Only a wish spell or removing the naga from its swamp for 1 year can prevent this trait from functioning.

aba09472-1cad-5545-907a-fd61c326604d.name: Spellcasting (Swamp Naga)
aba09472-1cad-5545-907a-fd61c326604d.description:
The swamp naga is an 8th-level spellcaster. Its spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 14, +6 to hit with spell attacks), and it needs only verbal components to cast its spells. It knows the following sorcerer spells:

- **Cantrips** (At Will): dancing lights, mage hand, message, poison spray
- **1st Level** (4 slots): charm person, fog cloud, silent image, sleep
- **2nd Level** (3 slots): blindness/deafness, hold person, suggestion
- **3rd Level** (3 slots): hypnotic pattern, stinking cloud, water breathing
- **4th Level** (2 slots): blight

50f91c4b-0a47-54bf-8d7c-609e97935d31.name: Constrict (Swamp Naga)
50f91c4b-0a47-54bf-8d7c-609e97935d31.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 14 (3d6 + 4) bludgeoning damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 14). Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained, and the naga can't constrict another target.

b579ba22-d37f-5b5a-96d7-2cced43c5a00.name: Bludgeoning Bounce
b579ba22-d37f-5b5a-96d7-2cced43c5a00.description: Whenever the swampgas bubble is subjected to bludgeoning damage, it takes no damage and instead is pushed up to 10 feet away from the source of the bludgeoning damage. If the bubble is subjected to bludgeoning damage while attached to a creature, the bubble must succeed on a DC 13 Strength saving throw or detach from the creature and be pushed up to 5 feet away.

7ee76df9-c5e4-573c-9a07-2f7f68eff977.name: Fiery Death
7ee76df9-c5e4-573c-9a07-2f7f68eff977.description: If the swampgas bubble has half its hp or fewer and takes any fire damage, it dies explosively. Each creature within 20 feet of the bubble must make a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw, taking 7 (2d6) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

aa693524-8f4a-5b9a-9d1e-5e812122c86c.name: Pseudopod (Swampgas Bubble)
aa693524-8f4a-5b9a-9d1e-5e812122c86c.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) bludgeoning damage plus 4 (1d8) poison damage.

46b40891-8400-57ed-9ce5-5c963be61e01.name: Suffocating Grasp
46b40891-8400-57ed-9ce5-5c963be61e01.description:
Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) bludgeoning damage. If the target is Medium or smaller, the swampgas bubble attaches to the target's head, and the target is blinded while the bubble is attached. While attached, the bubble can't make pseudopod attacks against the target. At the start of each of the bubble's turns, the target takes 9 (2d8) poison damage and begins suffocating as it breathes in the poisonous gases within the bubble. A creature is affected even if it holds its breath, but creatures that don't need to breathe aren't affected.

The bubble can detach itself by spending 5 feet of its movement. It does so if its target falls unconscious or dies. A creature, including the target, can take its action to detach the bubble by succeeding on a DC 13 Strength check.

484de3ca-489f-5593-b62e-9b6b816162b8.name: Fire Hazard
484de3ca-489f-5593-b62e-9b6b816162b8.description: When the ooze takes fire damage, it bursts into flame. The ooze continues burning until it takes cold damage or is immersed in water. A creature that touches the ooze or hits it with a melee attack while within 5 feet of it while it is burning takes 5 (1d10) fire damage. While burning, the ooze’s weapon attacks deal an extra 5 (1d10) fire damage.

8804bc76-af8e-5678-a688-967e642c8ad5.name: Sticky Situation
8804bc76-af8e-5678-a688-967e642c8ad5.description: A creature covered in the ooze’s tar has its speed halved for 1 minute. In addition, the tar ignites if touched by a source of fire or if a creature covered with tar takes fire damage. The tar burns until a creature takes an action to snuff out the flames. A creature that starts its turn covered with burning tar takes 10 (2d10) fire damage. A humanoid that dies while covered in tar rises 1 hour later as tar ghoul, unless the humanoid is restored to life or its body is destroyed.

e0ac9b38-92d7-52dc-8ea5-6f38e6f9fcd6.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 13 (2d8 + 4) piercing damage. If the tembril scores a critical hit against a Medium or smaller target and the damage reduces the target to below half its hp maximum, the target must succeed on a DC 15 Constitution saving throw or be instantly killed as its head is removed. A creature is immune to this effect if it is immune to piercing damage or doesn't have or need a head.

0e7e7591-41c7-5ce3-bc89-53077cd444ec.name: Maddening Chitter
0e7e7591-41c7-5ce3-bc89-53077cd444ec.description: The tembril chitters maddeningly in a 30-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 15 Wisdom saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 21 (6d6) psychic damage and is incapacitated for 1 minute. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't incapacitated. If a creature fails the saving throw by 5 or more, it also suffers short-term madness. An incapacitated creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the incapacitated condition on itself on a success.

0c43b7d7-9d10-585e-8a4c-f3b709109b98.name: Head Slam
0c43b7d7-9d10-585e-8a4c-f3b709109b98.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 21 (3d10 + 5) bludgeoning damage. If the tetomatli scores a critical hit against a target wearing metal armor, the target must succeed on a DC 15 Strength saving throw or its armor is destroyed. A creature wearing magical armor has advantage on this saving throw. A creature wearing adamantine armor is unaffected.

f35b0eae-2df8-5753-94cc-721bce2418ee.name: Tremor

a53844ba-6260-57a0-b905-37adb424c912.name: Contortionist
a53844ba-6260-57a0-b905-37adb424c912.description: The thin giant can contort its body into unnatural positions, allowing it to easily move through any opening large enough for a Medium creature. It can squeeze through any opening large enough for a Small creature. The giant’s destination must still have suitable room to accommodate its volume.

41c673f8-850a-5dee-a86a-ccf7159362d7.name: Consuming Bite
41c673f8-850a-5dee-a86a-ccf7159362d7.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 15 (2d8 + 6) piercing damage plus 7 (2d6) necrotic damage. The target's hp maximum is reduced by an amount equal to the necrotic damage taken, and the giant regains hp equal to that amount. This reduction lasts until the target finishes a long rest. The target dies if this effect reduces its hp maximum to 0.

fded1f5c-6ab8-5be0-90a5-bd7baca70da2.description: Difficult terrain composed of nonmagical plants doesn’t cost the thornheart guardian extra movement. In addition, the thornheart guardian can pass through nonmagical plants without being slowed by them and without taking damage from them if they have thorns, spines, or a similar hazard.

7025756b-de9c-5d86-93a7-39119f75e554.name: Barbed Greatsword

76a16253-9692-5bc0-86f8-b692ef071faf.name: Grasp of the Briar
76a16253-9692-5bc0-86f8-b692ef071faf.description: The thornheart guardian summons grasping, thorny vines to impede and drain the life of its foes. The ground within 20 feet of the thornheart guardian becomes difficult terrain for 1 minute. This difficult terrain doesn't cost the thornheart guardian extra movement. A creature that enters or starts its turn in the area must succeed on a DC 16 Strength saving throw or be restrained by the plants. A restrained creature takes 7 (2d6) necrotic damage at the start of each of its turns. A creature, including the restrained target, can take its action to break the target free of the vines by succeeding on a DC 16 Strength check.

a7fe86f6-eaa8-57bb-954e-6e19fb25becf.description: When the thrummren's rider is the target of an attack the thrummren can see, the thrummren can choose to become the target of the attack instead.

c77fbfaa-3eaf-52db-af76-ba77f9eea712.name: Thunder Stomp
c77fbfaa-3eaf-52db-af76-ba77f9eea712.description: The thrummren rears back and slams its front hooves into the ground. Each creature within 20 feet of the thrummren must make a DC 17 Strength saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 35 (10d6) thunder damage, is pushed up to 10 feet away from the thrummren, and is deafened until the end of its next turn. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't pushed or deafened.

d6f4f916-0d74-5c35-a49f-1a31dc6ea7a7.description: With 1 minute of work, the tidehunter can create a net out of seaweed, rope, or similar material. The tidehunter typically carries 2 nets.

97c0fc72-1011-512a-9d86-43f39b98336d.name: Claw (Tidehunter)
97c0fc72-1011-512a-9d86-43f39b98336d.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 13 (2d8 + 4) bludgeoning damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 15). The tidehunter has two claws, each of which can grapple only one target.

ae0cb126-3fdc-5cb7-850e-12f7c9ed491b.name: Entangle Weapon
ae0cb126-3fdc-5cb7-850e-12f7c9ed491b.description: When the tidehunter is targeted by a melee weapon attack, the attacker must succeed on a DC 16 Dexterity saving throw or miss the attack as the tidehunter uses its net to interfere with the weapon. The tidehunter must have an empty net to use this reaction.

9eb5547a-9b09-57d3-9ebb-ff6a78db080f.name: Multiattack (Tidehunter)
9eb5547a-9b09-57d3-9ebb-ff6a78db080f.description: The tidehunter makes three attacks, only one of which can be with its net. It can use Reel in place of two claw attacks.

45ed0f3e-541e-577d-afdd-f8a218de3bdf.name: Net
45ed0f3e-541e-577d-afdd-f8a218de3bdf.description: Ranged Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, range 20/60 ft., one target. Hit: A Large or smaller creature hit by the net is restrained until it is freed. The net has no effect on creatures that are formless, or creatures that are Huge or larger. A creature can use its action to make a DC 15 Strength check, freeing itself or another creature within its reach on a success. Dealing 15 slashing damage to the net (AC 13) also frees the creature without harming it, ending the effect and destroying the net.

2263cd21-4b09-5a20-8375-7b1a9633d2e4.name: Reel (Tidehunter)
2263cd21-4b09-5a20-8375-7b1a9633d2e4.description: The tidehunter pulls one creature restrained by its net up to 20 feet straight toward it. If the target is within 10 feet of the tidehunter at the end of this pull, the tidehunter can make one claw attack against it as a bonus action.

9f253b49-c224-5c2a-9cb6-48368a0f787d.name: Siege Monster (Timingila)
9f253b49-c224-5c2a-9cb6-48368a0f787d.description: The timingila deals double damage to objects and structures.

98765cba-ef94-5040-a6be-2b77cf9084c4.name: Water Breathing (Timingila)
98765cba-ef94-5040-a6be-2b77cf9084c4.description: The timingila can breathe only underwater.

attributes.description: The timingila can breathe only underwater.

d858f629-4673-5f9a-bb0e-bc0ddbede960.name: Bite (Timingila)
d858f629-4673-5f9a-bb0e-bc0ddbede960.description:
Melee Weapon Attack: +14 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 25 (3d10 + 9) piercing damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it must succeed on a DC 18 Dexterity saving throw or be swallowed by the timingila. A swallowed creature is blinded and restrained, it has total cover against attacks and other effects outside the timingila, and it takes 21 (6d6) acid damage at the start of each of the timingila's turns.

If the timingila takes 30 damage or more on a single turn from a creature inside it, the timingila must succeed on a DC 20 Constitution saving throw at the end of that turn or regurgitate all swallowed creatures, which fall prone in a space within 10 feet of the timingila. If the timingila dies, a swallowed creature is no longer restrained by it and can escape from the corpse by using 20 feet of movement, exiting prone.

f80e1aa8-45c5-5912-beca-966525dc642a.name: Breach
f80e1aa8-45c5-5912-beca-966525dc642a.description: The timingila swims up to its swimming speed without provoking opportunity attacks. If it breaches the water's surface, it crashes back down, creating a wave in a 30-foot-wide, 120-footlong line that is 30 feet tall. Any Gargantuan or smaller vehicles in the line are carried up to 100 feet away from the timingila and have a 50 percent chance of capsizing.

65db04c3-aafe-5e7f-a2f4-0c39901df523.name: Multiattack (Timingila)
65db04c3-aafe-5e7f-a2f4-0c39901df523.description: The timingila makes four attacks: one with its bite, one with its tail slap, and two with its flippers.

c60423d7-20b5-5ddf-abc6-34e756d9ec59.name: Resonating Roar
c60423d7-20b5-5ddf-abc6-34e756d9ec59.description:
The timingila roars in a 90-foot cone. Each creature in the area must make a DC 18 Constitution saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 45 (10d8) thunder damage and is deafened for 1 minute. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't deafened. A creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

If a vehicle is in the area, the roar travels into the vehicle and resonates inside it. Each creature inside the vehicle, even if the creature is outside the roar's area, must succeed on a DC 18 Constitution saving throw or take half the damage from the roar.

47d0c476-6808-5768-92ca-dad82c927a9a.name: Keen Smell (Tormented Qiqirn)
47d0c476-6808-5768-92ca-dad82c927a9a.description: The qiqirn has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on smell. Self-loathing. A creature the qiqirn can hear can use its action to say “qiqirn” and make a Charisma (Intimidation) check. If it does so, the qiqirn must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw with a DC equal to the creature’s Charisma (Intimidation) check or be frightened of that creature until the end of its next turn. If the qiqirn succeeds on the saving throw, it can’t be frightened by that creature for the next 24 hours.

98622da2-6977-53a3-90ac-c5cadceb76a8.name: Multiattack (Tormented Qiqirn)
98622da2-6977-53a3-90ac-c5cadceb76a8.description: The tormented qiqirn makes two bite attacks. Alternatively, it can use Spiteful Howl twice.

attributes.description: The tormented qiqirn makes two bite attacks. Alternatively, it can use Spiteful Howl twice.

3044e3a0-cef6-5424-8380-507a4a1ef793.name: Protective Spirits
3044e3a0-cef6-5424-8380-507a4a1ef793.description: When the qiqirn takes damage, the spirits infusing it rise up to protect it. Roll 2d8 and reduce the damage by the result.

attributes.description: When the qiqirn takes damage, the spirits infusing it rise up to protect it. Roll 2d8 and reduce the damage by the result.

b74cc87e-f5eb-576d-afc9-60f7e165a4d2.name: Spiteful Howl
b74cc87e-f5eb-576d-afc9-60f7e165a4d2.description: The qiqirn releases a spiteful howl at one creature it can see within 30 feet of it. If the target can hear the qiqirn, it must make a DC 16 Wisdom saving throw, taking 18 (4d8) necrotic damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

attributes.description: The qiqirn releases a spiteful howl at one creature it can see within 30 feet of it. If the target can hear the qiqirn, it must make a DC 16 Wisdom saving throw, taking 18 (4d8) necrotic damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

78a66681-077f-5385-b751-09592f49a7bb.name: Unnerving Whispers
78a66681-077f-5385-b751-09592f49a7bb.description: The qiqirn whispers the last words of the spirits infusing it into the minds of up to three creatures it can see within 60 feet of it. Each creature must succeed on a DC 16 Wisdom saving throw or take 21 (6d6) psychic damage and suffer a random effect for 1 minute. Roll a d6 to determine the effect: unconscious (1), deafened (2), incapacitated (3), stunned (4), frightened (5), paralyzed (6). A creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

95aeb6a9-2db5-5eb3-9813-206651e581a3.name: Light Invisibility
95aeb6a9-2db5-5eb3-9813-206651e581a3.description: The lunarchidna is invisible while in bright or dim light.

attributes.description: The lunarchidna is invisible while in bright or dim light.

dfd3c665-e5f9-5f0b-ad96-f7dcd5c5bf10.name: Spellcasting (Transcendent Lunarchida)
dfd3c665-e5f9-5f0b-ad96-f7dcd5c5bf10.description:
The lunarchidna is a 8th-level spellcaster. Its spellcasting ability is Intelligence (spell save DC 15, +7 to hit with spell attacks). The lunarchidna has the following wizard spells prepared:

- **Cantrips** (At Will): minor illusion, mage hand, poison spray, ray of frost
- **1st Level** (4 slots): color spray, detect magic, magic missile, shield
- **2nd Level** (3 slots): alter self, suggestion, web
- **3rd Level** (3 slots): counterspell, fireball, major image
- **4th Level** (2 slots): black tentacles, confusion

9fbb5d09-04e0-5b0b-9f5d-f03fed9cfc47.name: Bite (Transcendent Lunarchida)
9fbb5d09-04e0-5b0b-9f5d-f03fed9cfc47.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) necrotic damage. The target must succeed on a DC 13 Constitution saving throw or its hp maximum is reduced by an amount equal to the damage taken. This reduction lasts until the target finishes a long rest. The target dies if this effect reduces its hp maximum to 0.

809ebc04-ff9a-57d3-b5b8-c03acf7017a5.name: Claw (Transcendent Lunarchida)
809ebc04-ff9a-57d3-b5b8-c03acf7017a5.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (2d4 + 3) slashing damage.

161b345f-b9e7-5460-9d2c-80dff7135eaf.name: Lunar Beam
161b345f-b9e7-5460-9d2c-80dff7135eaf.description: The lunarchidna flashes a beam of moonlight in a 30-foot line that is 5 feet wide. Each creature in that line must make a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw, taking 28 (8d6) radiant damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

8d33309a-951c-5d36-9d8e-72058c9846da.name: Multiattack (Transcendent Lunarchida)
8d33309a-951c-5d36-9d8e-72058c9846da.description: The lunarchidna makes three attacks: one with its bite and two with its claws.

5ad8d530-c1c8-52d1-b3b0-0c14f94c04f3.name: Web (Transcendent Lunarchida)
5ad8d530-c1c8-52d1-b3b0-0c14f94c04f3.description: Ranged Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, range 30/60 ft., one creature. Hit: The target is restrained by webbing. As an action the restrained target can make a DC 13 Strength check, bursting the webbing on a success. The webbing can also be attacked and destroyed (AC 10; hp 5; vulnerability to fire damage; immunity to bludgeoning, poison, and psychic damage).

7ffb0ecd-05a8-5e55-bfff-6a2e0b35d724.name: False Appearance (Tree Form Only)
7ffb0ecd-05a8-5e55-bfff-6a2e0b35d724.description: While the skinner remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from a normal tree.

attributes.description: While the skinner remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from a normal tree.

1ae01ef8-a16b-53e3-9830-2607d5b6d682.name: Inhabit Tree
1ae01ef8-a16b-53e3-9830-2607d5b6d682.description: As a bonus action, the skinner touches a Medium or larger tree that is not a creature and disappears inside it. While inside the tree, the skinner has tremorsense with a radius of 30 feet, has an AC of 15, has a speed of 0, and has vulnerability to fire damage. When the skinner is reduced to 15 hp, the tree dies and the skinner appears within 5 feet of the dead tree or in the nearest unoccupied space. The skinner can exit the tree as a bonus action, appearing within 5 feet of the tree in the nearest unoccupied space, and the tree reverts to being an object. The skinner can inhabit a tree for only 3 days at most before the tree dies, requiring the skinner to seek another vessel.

e6d9afd9-e841-55ff-852e-6bf727f18ecf.name: Magic Resistance (Tree Skinner)
e6d9afd9-e841-55ff-852e-6bf727f18ecf.description: The skinner has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

0912c3c9-5f11-5497-80d1-f017268129e0.name: Squeeze
0912c3c9-5f11-5497-80d1-f017268129e0.description: The tree skinner makes one vine whip attack against a creature it is grappling. If the attack hits, the target is also unable to breathe or cast spells with verbal components until this grapple ends.

799b9733-f7a3-5670-b5a0-7470bc267277.name: Vine Whip

a6ab4f47-24a6-5648-bc3e-c9ff873fddb4.name: Blood Frenzy (Tricenatorus)
a6ab4f47-24a6-5648-bc3e-c9ff873fddb4.description: The tricenatorus has advantage on melee attack rolls against any creature that doesn’t have all its hp.

99877305-b659-555c-b56f-e8a5082e8f81.name: Relentless (Recharges after a Short or Long Rest) (Tricenatorus)
99877305-b659-555c-b56f-e8a5082e8f81.description: If the tricenatorus takes 40 damage or less that would reduce it to 0 hp, it is reduced to 1 hp instead.

5df52225-50bf-5f03-a6f0-0a1964692918.description: The tricenatorus has twenty-four tail spikes. Used spikes regrow when the tricenatorus finishes a long rest.

c67abef0-11d0-5931-8c1a-1c20e3d4b073.name: Bite (Tricenatorus)
c67abef0-11d0-5931-8c1a-1c20e3d4b073.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +12 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 34 (4d12 + 8) piercing damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it is grappled (escape DC 18). Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained, and the tricenatorus can't bite another target.

66374dc7-14ac-59b7-b2af-210b4585ef2a.description: The tricenatorus makes two attacks: one with its bite and one with its gore, or two with its tail spikes. It can't use its gore against a creature restrained by its bite.

a525b210-ff1b-57dd-a56a-600925603c40.description: Ranged Weapon Attack: +12 to hit, range 150/300 ft., one target. Hit: 26 (4d8 + 8) piercing damage.

e6318a06-5614-593c-8a99-cc20d63e4a4b.name: Regeneration (Trollkin Raider)
e6318a06-5614-593c-8a99-cc20d63e4a4b.description: The trollkin regains 1 hp at the start of its turn. If the trollkin takes acid or fire damage, this trait doesn’t function at the start of the trollkin’s next turn. The trollkin dies only if it starts its turn with 0 hp and doesn’t regenerate.

464fd46c-2a2d-5516-b37a-08f71d96d8fd.name: Thick Hide
464fd46c-2a2d-5516-b37a-08f71d96d8fd.description: The trollkin’s skin is thick and tough, granting it a +1 bonus to Armor Class. This bonus is included in the trollkin’s AC.

789cbdfb-83ab-5f30-85f7-3d694eeee72f.name: Claw (Trollkin Raider)
789cbdfb-83ab-5f30-85f7-3d694eeee72f.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 3 (1d4 + 1) slashing damage.

e6323fed-9fee-5f64-bafc-3d4e38c1b646.name: Multiattack (Trollkin Raider)
e6323fed-9fee-5f64-bafc-3d4e38c1b646.description: The trollkin makes two spear attacks or one bite attack and two claw attacks.

f9dfe002-06fb-5503-a8ef-d6fc96616285.name: Spear (Trollkin Raider)
f9dfe002-06fb-5503-a8ef-d6fc96616285.description: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. Hit: 4 (1d6 + 1) piercing damage, or 5 (1d8 + 1) piercing damage if used with two hands to make a melee attack.

733338b1-f409-5e8d-a4af-f4914547317b.name: Devil’s Sight (Tzepharion)
733338b1-f409-5e8d-a4af-f4914547317b.description: Magical darkness doesn’t impede the tzepharion’s darkvision.

attributes.description: Magical darkness doesn’t impede the tzepharion’s darkvision.

53348336-505e-5371-9972-83783e6a4c96.name: Eye of Rage
53348336-505e-5371-9972-83783e6a4c96.description: As a bonus action, the tzepharion incites rage in up to three beasts or monstrosities it can see within 60 feet of it. Each target must succeed on a DC 15 Wisdom saving throw or become enraged until the end of its next turn. While enraged, it has advantage on its attack rolls, but it is unable to distinguish friend from foe and must attack the nearest creature other than the tzepharion. This trait doesn’t work on targets with an Intelligence of 6 or higher.

a9cb8d08-9110-5dcc-8eeb-2466b869ff09.name: Magic Resistance (Tzepharion)
a9cb8d08-9110-5dcc-8eeb-2466b869ff09.description: The tzepharion has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

4d9c02ff-35cb-5c21-96b9-a8af5d136e95.name: Pack Tactics (Tzepharion)
4d9c02ff-35cb-5c21-96b9-a8af5d136e95.description: The tzepharion has advantage on attack rolls against a creature if at least one of the devil’s allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally isn’t incapacitated.

41f4282f-2015-5f6a-b943-242755688236.name: Multiattack (Tzepharion)
41f4282f-2015-5f6a-b943-242755688236.description: The tzepharion devil makes one bite attack and four claw attacks.

attributes.description: The tzepharion devil makes one bite attack and four claw attacks.

0eb1f731-5971-5d67-959a-54f7dd826d8c.name: Soul Jolt
0eb1f731-5971-5d67-959a-54f7dd826d8c.description: The tzepharion leaps up to 20 feet through the air and makes a claw attack against a target within reach. If it hits, the target must succeed on a DC 15 Wisdom saving throw or its soul is forced out of its body, appearing 20 feet in a random direction away from its body, for 1 minute. The creature has control of its soul, which is invisible and can move through creatures and objects as if they were difficult terrain, but it can't cast spells or take any actions. The creature's body is knocked unconscious and can't be awoken until its soul returns, but it can take damage as normal. The creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, reoccupying its body on a success. Alternatively, a creature can reoccupy its body early if it starts its turn within 5 feet of its body. If a creature doesn't return to its body within 1 minute, the creature dies. If its body is reduced to 0 hp before the creature reoccupies its body, the creature dies.

bc8f8d46-0818-59ef-bb1d-29f05169b917.description: The ulnorya is immune to any spell or effect that would alter its form.

7ed2798c-f209-588c-91b8-5eaa9b50d1cb.name: Photoadaptive Hide
7ed2798c-f209-588c-91b8-5eaa9b50d1cb.description: If the ulnorya didn’t move on its previous turn, it is invisible.

8266c801-1284-56fd-83c2-d75d0f27e700.name: Bite (Ulnorya)
8266c801-1284-56fd-83c2-d75d0f27e700.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 13 (2d8 + 4) piercing damage and the target must succeed on a DC 15 Constitution saving throw or take 7 (2d6) poison damage. If the poison damage reduces the target to 0 hp, the target is stable but poisoned for 1 hour, even after regaining hp, and is paralyzed while poisoned in this way.

a8615288-0009-544b-9593-3ff3a3bebad4.name: Multiattack (Ulnorya)
a8615288-0009-544b-9593-3ff3a3bebad4.description: The ulnorya makes four attacks: one with its bite, one with its claw, and two with its tentacles.

attributes.description: The ulnorya makes four attacks: one with its bite, one with its claw, and two with its tentacles.

8cfc0987-462b-58db-b344-b7cea1701849.name: Replicate
8cfc0987-462b-58db-b344-b7cea1701849.description:
The ulnorya separates itself into two identical copies for up to 1 hour. The new ulnoryas' hp totals are equal to the original ulnorya's hp total divided by 2 (rounded down), and each is affected by any conditions, spells, and other magical effects that affected the original ulnorya. The new ulnoryas otherwise retain the same statistics as the original, except neither has this action. The new ulnoryas act on the same initiative count as the original ulnorya and occupy any unoccupied spaces within 5 feet of the original ulnorya's space.

If one ulnorya starts its turn within 5 feet of its other half, they can each use their reactions to recombine. The recombined ulnorya's hp total is equal to the combined hp total of the two ulnoryas, and it is affected by any conditions, spells, and other magical effects currently affecting either of the combining ulnoryas. The ulnorya automatically recombines if both of its halves are still alive at the end of the hour. If only one ulnorya remains alive at the end of the hour, it gains this action after it finishes a long rest.

0184b110-cbf9-590f-8ef7-1943b3574907.name: Chaos Mace
0184b110-cbf9-590f-8ef7-1943b3574907.description: The uridimmu’s attacks with its mace are magical. When the uridimmu hits with its mace, the mace deals an extra 4d8 fire, lightning, or radiant damage (included in the attack). The uridimmu chooses the type of damage when making the attack.

f5465302-6d2d-5608-81be-61c3b88629f3.name: Heroic Aura
f5465302-6d2d-5608-81be-61c3b88629f3.description: Each friendly creature within 20 feet of the uridimmu can’t be charmed or frightened. In addition, when a friendly creature within 20 feet of the uridimmu makes an attack roll or a saving throw, it can roll a d4 and add the result to the attack roll or saving throw. The uridimmu’s aura doesn’t work in the area of an antimagic field spell or while in a temple, shrine, or other structure dedicated to a chaotic deity.

c7df761d-8924-5190-a7c6-42ef33291830.name: Innate Spellcasting (Uridimmu)
c7df761d-8924-5190-a7c6-42ef33291830.description:
The uridimmu’s spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 18). The uridimmu can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:
At will: detect evil and good, light, protection from evil and good
3/day each: dispel magic, glyph of warding, lightning bolt
1/day each: flame strike, heal, wall of fire

dfcf82ab-0537-5183-a5cc-ffb1d7cc0a77.name: Magic Resistance (Uridimmu)
dfcf82ab-0537-5183-a5cc-ffb1d7cc0a77.description: The uridimmu has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

aea908cc-0418-550d-a727-03e8c0ff3f45.name: Bite (Uridimmu)
aea908cc-0418-550d-a727-03e8c0ff3f45.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +11 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 19 (3d8 + 6) piercing damage.

0c2a26c0-b8f2-519c-83f9-5b542a8901b4.name: Heavenly Roar
0c2a26c0-b8f2-519c-83f9-5b542a8901b4.description: The uridimmu can unleash a powerful roar imbued with divine power in a 30-foot cone. A target caught within this cone must make a DC 18 Constitution saving throw, taking 45 (10d8) thunder damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. If the saving throw fails by 5 or more, the target is also frightened for 1 minute. A frightened creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. Fiends have disadvantage on this saving throw.

1eeee306-7f64-5ec0-8ab4-66574bdaf42e.name: Mace

5d086b04-748c-5788-a7ca-a5a397afec2e.name: Multiattack (Uridimmu)
5d086b04-748c-5788-a7ca-a5a397afec2e.description: The uridimmu makes three attacks: one with its bite and two with its mace.

attributes.description: The uridimmu makes three attacks: one with its bite and two with its mace.

d2b497cd-9eeb-5a23-a5cc-bb4b44579c02.name: Prehensile Tendrils
d2b497cd-9eeb-5a23-a5cc-bb4b44579c02.description: The valkruung has 10 shiny blue-gray tendrils that constantly grab at things in the environment. Each tendril can pick up or hold a Tiny object, such as a coin or piece of jewelry, that isn’t being worn or carried. If it uses all 10 of its tendrils, the valkruung can carry a single Small object, such as a backpack. The valkruung can use its tendrils to interact with objects, but it can’t use them to wield a weapon. It has advantage on Dexterity (Sleight of Hand) checks when using its tendrils and can use its tendrils to disarm opponents (see the Disarming Tendrils reaction).

06219051-7ca8-5bf9-8edb-19e366cbdb1b.name: Claws (Valkruung)
06219051-7ca8-5bf9-8edb-19e366cbdb1b.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) slashing damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 13 Constitution saving throw or be poisoned for 1 minute. While poisoned in this way, the target suffers an itchy rash, and, at the start of each of its turns, it must succeed on a DC 13 Wisdom saving or spend its action furiously scratching the rash. A creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

5bf34790-4d48-57ce-8f23-fd84d23186b5.name: Disarming Tendrils
5bf34790-4d48-57ce-8f23-fd84d23186b5.description: When a creature the valkruung can see targets it with a melee weapon attack, the attacker must succeed on a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw or its weapon is knocked out of its grasp into a random unoccupied space within 5 feet of the attacker. The valkruung can't use this reaction against attackers wielding a heavy or two-handed weapon.

3e61a177-39d2-55dc-8741-62fb93ca5c7c.name: Amphibious (Vallowex)
3e61a177-39d2-55dc-8741-62fb93ca5c7c.description: The vallowex can breathe air and water.

attributes.description: The vallowex can breathe air and water.

2768274f-db32-53ac-839e-9ab21038035d.name: Aura of Thirst
2768274f-db32-53ac-839e-9ab21038035d.description: At the start of each of the vallowex’s turns, each creature within 30 feet of it must succeed on a DC 15 Constitution saving throw or have disadvantage on its next attack roll or ability check as a gnawing thirst distracts it. For each minute a creature stays in the vallowex’s aura, it gains one level of exhaustion from dehydration. A level of exhaustion is removed if the creature uses an action to drink 1 pint of water. A vallowex is immune to its own Aura of Thirst as well as the auras of other vallowexes.
